name: 10 Min zum Zentrum, ruhig, gemütlich
neighborhood_overview:
My apartment is only a 4 minutes walk to Leonrodplatz with tram lines 12, 20 and 21 and bus line 53.

There are 2 supermarkets, dry cleaner's, a drugstore, 2 bakeries, a cafe and 6 restaurants (two Bavarian, two Italian, one Indian, one Greek) are within walking distance (3 - 7 minutes).

The Olympic Park (ideal for joggers) with the Olympic Tower offering you an awesome view over Munich (and if the weather gods are with you even as far as to the Alps) is 15 minutes walking distance from my apartment.

I can recommend a nice walk from my apartment to the Nymphenburg castle, which takes about 30 - 40 minutes.

name: Close to trade fair and subway, 15 min. to center
description: The apartment is located in the immediate vicinity of the Munich Trade Fair Center and International Congress Center and is suitable for trade fair visitors and exhibitors. But tourists are also very welcome, because the subway is close to the house and it only takes about 15-20 minutes to get to the city center. In a few steps you can walk to a beautiful park with a swimming lake and a large shopping center. There is no kitchen. Good subway connection to Oktoberfest, approx. 20 minutes.
neighborhood_overview:
I created a guidebook where you can see all important places close to my house, e. g. shops, places where you can have breakfast, restaurants etc. I especially recommend the beautiful park (Riemer Park) which is very close to my house where you can relax, walk, swim, play beach volley ball etc.

I think my room is perfect for trade fair visitors, because they can walk to the Munich fairground.

But if you are a tourist you are also welcome. You need only approx. 15 minutes to go to the center of the city by subway. On the one hand you can stay in a very quiet region of Munich, where you can relax (e. g. go to the park and walk and swim there) and sleep well and on the other hand you need only 15 minutes to go to the center of the city by subway where you can visit the important sights.

name: Charming, central, quiet 2.5 room flat Haidhausen
description: Charming, bright apartment with wooden floors and high ceilings in a representative, detached old building with small garden. Beautifully located in a fantastic spot in the French Quarter of Haidhausen: Quiet, yet very central with public transportation well attainable. Beautiful river Isar, cafes, bakeries and supermarkets are just around the corner. Fully furnished with flat screen TV, hi-fi, washing machine and completely equipped kitchen. Enjoy staying at this pleasant home!
neighborhood_overview:
Fantastic location in idyllic French Quarter of Haidhausen: Haidhausen is a quiet quarter, yet there are a huge variety of restaurants, cafes and pubs. The apartment is quietly situated at traffic-free Preysingplatz with its neoromanic brickstone church. The most beautiful French bistro in town is right next to it. You will easily find everything you need for daily life: bakeries, supermarkets, organic food stores, banks, farmacies, weekly markets and many more.
The cultural center Gasteig with its varied classic and modern offers is just around the corner. Deutsches Museum is within 10 minutes of walking distance. The river Isar with its spacious parks is just 200 meters away and invites you to go for a walk or a little run. You can also walk over to Wiener Platz with its small market stalls, the Maypole and the Hofbräukeller, one of the most beautiful beer gardens in Munich.

description:
You are invited to relax in a beautiful, spaceous room with a double bed in my cosy flat. The room is equipped with a desk. Fast Wifi is available. Kitchen and bathroom are shared spaces.
There are many cafés, shops and restaurants to discover in the neighbourhood. All public transport options are within a 5-minute walk. The main station and Marienplatz are only a stone's throw away.

Welcome to the heart of Munich!
neighborhood_overview:
As soon as you leave the house, you can go on a discovery tour. Many small cafes, shops and restaurants invite you to linger. Just around the corner is the "Kyklos," one of the oldest Greek restaurants in town. Directly opposite there is a bakery and an Indian restaurant. The best café is also just a few steps away from the house in Café Kolonial.
All public transport (S-Bahn [suburban railway], bus, tram or U-Bahn [subway]) is just a 5-minute walk away.
The city center (Marienplatz) or Oktoberfest can be reached in about 10-15 minutes.
Nevertheless, it is quiet and relaxed here. My street is a one-way street - at night there is almost no traffic. A small oasis in the middle of the city where you can experience Munich's most beautiful side.

neighborhood_overview: Maxvorstadt is Munich's arts and university district, just north of the historic city center. It is also often called the "Brain of Munich", due to its extraordinary high number of artistic and educational institutions. The district was one of the first extensions when the city of Munich grew beyond its old city fortifications. Designed in the beginning of the 19th century, construction began in 1825 in a classicistic style, which is still visible in a few streets. Located within the area are seven universities (among which you find Germany's two top universities LMU and TUM) and several museums, pubs, small shops and art galleries. Because of the high number of students during daytime there are four times as many people in the district than actually live here.

In 3 minutes walk you are at the Theresienwiese, where the Oktoberfest and Frühlingsfest ( SpringFest - small Oktoberfest ) take place. The queer partyzone is in 10 minutes walking distance. neighborhood_overview: The Maxvorstadt is architecturally and culturally one of Munich's most worth seeing neighborhoods. The Königsplatz Ensemble, the Pinakotheken and the Siegestor are among the city's architectural highlights. In addition, in addition to several museums, there are the two large universities, the Ludwig-Maximilians- and the Technical University. This mix contributes greatly to the lifestyle of the Maxvorstadt.

We have two supermarkts close by, plus several German, Greek and Italian restaurants less than 5 min walk. A bakery open 7 days a week is also around the corner. The Deutsches Museum and Gasteig Cultural Center (which houses the public library) are also very close by, being the perfect place to attend to any kind of show and concerts.

neighborhood_overview: My apartment is a perfect mixture: On the one hand, urban life is only 3 minutes away. On the other side, two blocks of houses protect the place well from noise and give it a nearly out-of-town atmosphere with a lot of green and residential streets only. Nearby, you find the contemplative Westpark with unique Asian pagodas. For guests, who prefer more down-to-earth destinations, the world's biggest beer-garden in Hirschgarten is a short bus ride away. Exactly as quickly, you can reach Nymphenburg castle - Bavaria's "Versailles". Curious to see the world's first automobile? Benz Patent-Motorwagen Nummer 1 (together with steam trains etc.) is waiting for you only 5 minutes (four stops) away by metro at "Schwanthalerhöhe" in the Verkehrszentrum/Traffic Center of Deutsches Museum. And I will be happy to give you even more hints and tips to make your trip unforgettable!

Munich Schwabing is a burrough rich with history and the arts. The biggest city parks Englischer Garten and Olympia Park are within 15 minutes walking distance and provide great outdoor oportunities, beer gardens, swimming, fitness and more etc.

Publich transport is close by, all major subway and bus/tram lines are within 5-10 minutes walk. You can get to almost any location in town within about 30 minutes.

The neighborhood is full of diverse restaurants and coffeshops, from asian to italian to ethiopian to bavarian cuisine.

10 minutes walking distance is one of Munichs nightlife hot spots (Leopoldstrasse) with clubs, bars, more restaurants, cinemas and theaters.

The burrough (as all of Munich) is extremely safe around the clock.

In case of a medical emergency, hospitals are within 15-20 minutes walking distance.

There is directly opposite the well-known Asamschlößchen (restaurant and beer garden), the Mangostin (Asian cuisine) with garden and the rafts (international restaurant and beer garden) reach them also within walking distance. Recently, there are also spas, wellness & massage and of course the Nordbad with sauna...and it is only a few minutes to the fantastic Luitpoldpark...with joggers, bikers, walkers, soccer, or just people who enjoy nature - and a great beer garden with restaurant is also available here. neighborhood_overview:
Today’s city district Haidhausen, which used to be located before the city gates of Munich, came to existence in the late 19th century and characterized by glorious historic buildings. Haidhausen has a history of craftsmanship that dates back even further - even some of the old hostelries are still preserved.

Our apartment is located in a three-minute-walking range of all important public transport connections, has a ground-level entrance and is surrounded by a quiet inner yard.

In the neighborhood you will find everything you need for a comfortable stay: shopping facilities, cafes, restaurants, a shopping mall, a cinema and tiny familiar shops.

The museum bus line will bring you to all museums in the inner-city. The Marienplatz, the Viktualienmarkt and the Church of Our Lady can also be reached in only a fifteen minute’s walk. We would also recommend a walk to the Englischer Garten (English Garden) along the river Isar.

View of the Frauenkirche from the kitchen window.

The greatest aspect of this apartment is definitely its location. It is surrounded by all the sights a person would want to see when visiting Munich. One of my favorite: The Alte Peter; a tower from which you have a spectacular view over Munich and the Alps (for a price of only 4 EUR).

Directly behind the apartment is my favorite Bar/ Restaurant called "Nage und Sauge". Its atmosphere is marked by the extravagant painting of the walls, it serves great salads and at night it can get loud and vibrant.

There are very romantic old buildings with big gardens, small houses with wonderful gardens and modern buildings. There is a fine shopping street, where you find a lot of good eating and drinking, clothes, shoes as well as restaurants with really very good and cheap food. In another direction there is a wonderful very big park and an old castle. People here are very friendly and you can ask them, if you need information or help.

The apartment is beautifully located, right on the river. Since its renaturation, the Isar has been considered one of the cleanest rivers in the world. In summer, the whole city comes together there to relax, swim, barbecue, etc. on the white pebble beaches. The Isar is actually a mountain stream that has become too large. The water is mostly crystal clear. In addition, the whole area is ideal for jogging, walking, biking, etc.

The apartment is located exactly between the trendy Glockenbachviertel and the Dreimühlenviertel. Here you will find all kinds of restaurants, bars, shops, etc.
There's something for everyone.

A supermarket is just around the corner.

The city center is a 15-minute walk.

And if you love Oktoberfest, this is the place to be - just a 5-minute walk to Theresienwiese!

name: Traumlage am Englischen Garten
description:
Relax with the whole family at this peaceful place. In a minute you are in the English Garden and can enjoy Munich's most beautiful leisure paradise!
From there you can easily reach the center during a walk or a short bike ride. Münchner Freiheit is also very close and attracts night owls with its pubs. Despite its central location in Schwabing, the accommodation is in a very quiet cul-de-sac and surrounded by greenery! A rarity!

name: Schwabing at its best
description:
In the famous "Schwabing" neighbourhood, close to BMW, Olympic park, museums area and close to public transportation (bus, tram, tube).
It's perfect for 2, nice for 4 and even 5 or 6 people can stay.
neighborhood_overview: In the nice and famous neighborhood "Schwabing" close to olympic park. Make sure to visit "Väterchen Timofei's" legacy there! He was a russian (!) hermit building a chapel, his house and even a small church from the debris of houses destroyed in WW II. The debris-hill is now called "Olympiaberg". When the Olympics were held in Munich his house and the chapel were about to be destroyed but the citizens of Munich fighted for his right to stay and the olympic facilities were planned to be built more to the north. He died aged 110 (his age was never verified) in 2004. Look it up on Wikipedia (Timofei Wassiljewitsch Prochorow)!

You´ll find lots of cool cafés, restaurants , shops and a traditional market just around the corner.

The neighbourhood is a mixture of families and single people.
You can reach some shops in walking distance
You stay in a quiet and save neighbourhood.

name: modern - central - casual :-)
description: Hello and welcome. I offer a bright, nicely furnished room in my modern and spacious 3-room apartment (110m²) in the popular neighborhood Isarvorstadt (Goetheplatz / Kapuzinerplatz) in Munich.
neighborhood_overview:
Location: Ludwigvorstadt / Isarvorstadt

Ludwigsvorstadt is multicultural, while Isarvorstadt is considered more hip. Since they together form a district of Munich, they are often mentioned in the same breath. Ludwigsvorstadt includes the main train station and the southern train station district with the German Theater. The Oktoberfest on the Theresienwiese also takes place here. The Isarvorstadt includes the Museum Island with the German Museum, all Isar bridges and the three nightlife and trendy districts on the left bank of the Isar, Gärtnerplatz, Glockenbach and Schlachthofviertel. So there is a lot on offer whether culinary, nightlife, shopping, culture and nature.

The Theresienwiese, home to the famous Oktoberfest every year, is just two bus stops away or about a 25-minute walk through Westpark.

neighborhood_overview:

We live in one of the most beautiful and oldest neighborhoods of Munich with nice nightlife, shopping and a colorful fruit & vegetable market just 5 minutes walk from us, as well as the small river Würm just around the corner for jogging, walking and cycling.

We are happy to help you further with tips and support for the huge selection of activities in and around Munich.

Some of the most beautiful destinations:

Nymphenburg Castle by King Ludwig, English Garden, Löwenbräukeller at Stiglmaierplatz, Porzellan Manufaktur Nymphenburg, Käniglicher Biergarten at Hirschgarten & the largest beer garden in the world: Chinese Tower in Engslischer Garten, Olympiapark, Olympiasta

neighborhood_overview:
Quiet, modern urban residential area; everything you need is in walking distance: bakery, supermarkets, drugstore, pharmacy.
For those, who love to go out in the evenings, the lively Schwabing (Münchner Freiheit) is just a few minutes tram (cable car) ride. You get to the city center quickly and directly via subway, as well as to the Octoberfest.
Outdoor lovers can easily reach either Petuel park or the famous English Garden for extensive walks.
For business travellers: among the companies in my neighbourhood are BMW, Accenture, Amazon, Osram, Fujitsu and Microsoft.

Also 5 minutes walking distance from the Isar River and the lovely promenade on the banks leading to the Deutsches Museum.

The Westpark is a very successful park and is the heart of the neighborhood.
(Sendling-Westpark) It became an IgA (International Garden Exhibition) In 1983. Many themed gardens still exist today. The Western Park is modelled on a pre-Alpine idyll and forms an "elongated valley landscape with lakes, small streams, artificial moraine hills, meadow slopes and forest edges" in the middle of the city. We have a Nepalese temple, Chinese and Japanese garden. In summer there are cinema, moon and stars.

Enjoy leisurely strolls along tree-lined avenues, discover hidden gems in boutique shops, and savor the diverse culinary scene at local cafes and restaurants. Haidhausen is a true gem within Munich, providing a welcoming and inviting atmosphere for residents and visitors alike. Your stay in this flat promises to be an enchanting experience, immersing you in the heart of one of Munich's most delightful neighborhoods.

Supermarket, pharmacy, bakery, butcher, restaurants, cafes, beer garden, pizzeria, McDonald's, tennis court, swimming lake within walking distance.
Good parking options.
Bus: 100 m (10 min ride to the S-Bahn)
S-Bahn train: in 20 minutes in the center of Munich.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is located in Karlsfeld in the north of Munich. It is nicely furnished, with 4 Rooms and includes Internet/WiFi. The área is very quiet with detached and duplex houses. The apartment is located in the 1st and 2nd flor without elevador. Supermarkets, pharmacy, bakery, butcher, different shops in walking distance. Restaurants: Cafes, "Biergarten", italian, greek, asian food, MC Donalds some minutes walking distance. Public indoor swimming pool, tennis courts. Very nice lake to go for a swim in summer or for jogging.

It takes about 15 minutes to get to the city center.

Pleasant neighborhood with some restaurants (Bavarian, 2 Greeks and an Italian, ice cream shop, bakery, etc.)
In the immediate vicinity 3 grocery stores for everyday needs (Aldi, Penny and Edeka)
5 min. From the Isar. In summer, pleasant place to linger in nature and sometimes one of the most beautiful places in Munich.

The Hirschgarten can be reached in 3 minutes by tram, Nymphenburg Palace with park in about 8 minutes.

The apartment is very clean and newly renovated. A new high-quality fitted kitchen with seating area is available.
It is on the fifth floor of a residential building (elevator available) and is cozy for guests. One of the bedrooms has a spacious west-facing balcony. The apartment has a bathroom with a bathtub and an extra guest toilet.

Just around the corner you can enjoy a cool Bavarian beer in the beautiful beer garden under chestnut trees.
A supermarket, a bakery, as well as a swimming pool and two parks are also just a few minutes away.
In addition, the Innsbrucker Ring U-Bahn [subway] station is very close.

You can observe there birds, boars and deers. We have 3 great food places for takeaway nearby: Vietnamese, Bavarian and Turkish. Across the street there is a bistro called Barocco. The owner is a nice fellow and we like each other a lot. Alex serves drinks and small food plates. Beside this we have 4 Italian, 1 Indian and 1 Bavarian restaurant close by.
We also have 2 supermarkets, 2 bakeries, 3 banks, 1 pharmacy and many different doctors very close by. We can pick you up on arrival from the S7 commuter train at Solln station. We can then show you around.

neighborhood_overview:
Haidhausen is also called the French Quarter, because the names of French cities or regions can be read over and over again on street signs. Nowhere else in Munich is the savoir-vivre, the French art of living, as strongly felt as here.

Haidhausen is characterised by a variety of cafes, restaurants, shops and a wide range of cultural activities, such as Gasteig, Lothringer13 and various galleries.

You will find some of the most beautiful squares in Haidhausen (Bordeauxplatz, Pariser Platz, Weißenburger Platz and Wiener Platz), where you can relax next to a fountain or have a wonderful picnic on the lawn.

The river Isar and its pebble beaches are just a short walk away, it’s possible to sunbathe and even to have a swim here.

In the immediate vicinity of the apartment is the Theresienwiese, where the famous Munich Oktoberfest takes place every year. The oldest brewery in Munich, Augustiner Bräu, is also around the corner, there is not only traditional food in an authentic ambience here, but since last year also a roof terrace and of course the best beer in the world :) The Transport Museum and the Bavaria are also within walking distance. neighborhood_overview: Here we are happy to refer to a description of the Munich homepage: Bogenhausen is one of Munich's top residential areas and is a district with many faces. At the transition from densely built city center to the surrounding area, Bogenhausen is one of the most diverse city districts. Gradually, the Gründerzeit buildings and posh villas differ in the post-war apartment blocks and generous green spaces. For those looking for more peace and quiet than the Isarvorstadt, Schwabing or Haidhausen can offer, Bogenhausen may be a welcome alternative. In many corners of the district, you don't even notice that you're still in a million-dollar city. In addition to its outstanding sights, the old Bogenhausen is also worth a walk due to its numerous Art Nouveau villas: From the late days onwards, the district was laid out according to uniform urban planningprinciples as a large-scale, representative villa and apartment building district. Mainly spared from severe war damage, its original character

neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is within walking distance to countless restaurants, bars, parks and shopping. In addition to various universities, the Pinakotheken, the Olympic Park and the English Garden, there are other, numerous attractions and excursion destinations in the immediate vicinity. Everything can be reached practically by walking, bike or public transport. It is not far to the city center and the main train station and the Theresienwiese (Oktoberfest) are by subway (subway station Josephsplatz) in 15 minutes. Other public transport is within walking distance and take you to every part of the city.
Of course, we are at your disposal for all the questions and tips - the most important thing for us is that you have a nice and pleasant stay and feel comfortable!

Alte, Neue Pinakothek, Pinakothek der Moderne and the Brandhorst Museum are just a few examples. My tip: On Sundays the entrance fee is only 1 Euro!

Towels and soap as well as your own sheets are provided.

Best shopping, very busy with many shops and restaurants, nevertheless very quiet, also on the narrow Schleißheimer Straße (one-way street), on the other side to the courtyard rural idyll with birdsong. The terrace with the wonderful roof landscape and the plants gives a feeling of Italy.
The apartment is very cozy, bright and warm. Biedermeier charm.
neighborhood_overview:
The location is very central, despite the quiet apartment, the neighborhood (Maxvorstadt) is very busy, with countless pleasant cafes, restaurants, small shops (but also supermarkets). It's home to some of Munich's world-famous beer gardens.

In addition, here is the famous Munich museum district: Alte Pinakothek, Neue Pinakothek, Pinakothek der Moderne, Glyptothek, Greek Vasens Collection, Egyptian Museum, Museum Brandhorst and many others.

You can do everything by foot, not even a bike is necessary. Best connection to public transport, which you actually do not need.

Welcome!

As well you can find a nice range of local restaurants and cafeterias. Very close to our house there is a very popular Bavarian restaurant called Franzz. Whether you want to get out for some drinks or just chill and enjoy some Also Munich´s majestic river, the "Isar", is just 10 min away with it's beautiful nature.

The entire apartment is 106m2, with a kitchen-living room and a small balcony. Important: We have two very sweet house cats "Fini & Pan" living with us, so please only contact us if you have no allergies and it is okay to live with them. Daisy & Julio
neighborhood_overview:
Location:

The Gärtnerplatz and Glockenbach districts are super central and have a lot to offer: small shops, a variety of restaurants as well as a very popular bar and trendy district. There is a lot to explore and the beautiful Viktualienmarkt is also not far away.

Good connection in all directions:

City centre can be reached within minutes with a public transport and for that you have all transportation means around the building - Ubahn, Sbahn, tram, bus.

It's very green neighbourhood and you have nice overview from the balcony. If you wanna eat somewhere very close, I recommend very nice Massa restaurant with a very reasonable prices. (http://www.massa-restaurant.de/) just around the corner.

name: München Schwabing möbliertes Appartment

name: Quiet one-bedroom apartment in the city center
description: In a quiet rear-side building only a few steps away from the main station, this 450 sq.ft. one-bedroom apartment will be your perfect starting point for exploring the city and Munich's vicinity. The size is perfect for 2 people. Also, it's ideally situated in short walking distance from Theresienwiese, the site of the Munich Oktoberfest.

The family-run hotel offers excellent public transport connections. The metro station "Theresienwiese" is 120 meters from the hotel. The main train station as well as the central bus station can be reached in 10 minutes on foot.

Rates do not include breakfasts.

For €12, a rich breakfast can be enjoyed from the buffet.

Spacious three-room apartment with large balcony and kitchen near the English Garden. 3 min walk to the subway (U6), 5 min to airport shuttle. 10min by subway to Marienplatz (city center) and 5min to Münchner Freiheit with cafés and pubs.

From the apartment it is less than 5min walk to the English Garden with small streams, beautiful beer gardens, running tracks, bike paths, playgrounds, lawns and the Isar.

Just around the corner of the house there are supermarkets, a bakery and a pharmacy.
neighborhood_overview: Nice, helpful neighbors.

NO CHILDREN (aged 1 to 10 years)!
I offer you my beautiful, centrally located, absolutely quiet, comfortable and modern 4 room apartment with 2 bathrooms (incl. 2 toilets) on the ground floor.
The apartment is lovingly furnished and fully equipped, centrally located (10 meters to the next tram stop and 1/4h to the main station) & in the heart of Bogenhausen - the most noble district of Munich - very close to the Isar river, between Chinese tower and Friedensengel.
neighborhood_overview: One of Munich's most exclusive restaurants is located in the adjoining building. The English Garden is only a 10-minute walk away. It takes just as long to walk to Prinzregentenplatz and Friedensengel.

Modern private 1- bedroom apartment with seperate bathroom and kitchen. It is very tidy, clean and very bright with friendly interior.

You have everything you need for a perfect trip.

Supermarkets are nearby and parking spots are across the street.

name: Single Apartment zum Innenhof nahe Olympia Zentrum
description:
Arriving in Munich and starting life right away… THE FLAG Munich M. offers everything you need to feel comfortable!

• Collect new energy in the cuddly bed with extra large blanket and feel-good guarantee
• Surfing through the internet via your own router with LAN & Wi-Fi and USB charger on the bed
• Exercise in the bright gym with modern appliances
• Enjoy the sunset on the large roof terrace with a nice drink
• Host 24/7: Contact person on site 24/7
neighborhood_overview: The Dante outdoor swimming pool is just a stone throw away and the Olympiapark with stadium let you be active and relax at any time. Munich's largest shopping center is also around the corner.

name: MAX – cozy 1-bedroom flat in Munich city center
description:
Just minutes on foot to the luxury boutiques of Maximilianstrasse, our apartment offers you everything you need to feel at home. Have a drink at one of the many neighborhood bars, go for a run along the river just a block away, or recharge your batteries in our cozy apartment. On-site parking: €25 per night. Ask for availability.

Fully furnished with bed sheets, towels, household and kitchen equipment including a Nespresso coffee maker, Internet, wardrobes, award-winning mattress and smart TV.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood Lehel is located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sit in the sun on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße, a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. It can get lively in the evenings in summer when the windows are open.

You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern restaurant called Frex and the restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is an institution in Munich's bar scene.

name: Ludwig - 2-bedroom apartment in Munich city center
description:
Our cozy apartment is in the center of Munich, just minutes on foot to Marienplatz, the Old Town and the boutiques on Maximilianstraße! neighborhood_overview: The neighborhood Lehel is conveniently located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sunbathe on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße, a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern restaurant called Sir Helga and the restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is famous for being one of the most "hipster" places in Munich.

neighborhood_overview: The slaughterhouse quarter (district Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt) extends between the Theresienwiese and the Isar. It is possibly one of the most traditional areas of Munich and scores with original flair, great restaurants and more and more cultural highlights. Shops (supermarket, organic market, pharmacy, bakeries) are in the immediate vicinity numerous. With the subway (the next station is close by, only 3 minutes walking distance) you are within five minutes in the city center at Marienplatz. A walk of about 25 minutes leads to the charming Glockenbachviertel with many shops and cafes. Enjoy!

name: Stylish Designers Apartment (Munich Westend)
description: Remodelled 45m² Apartment centrally located in Munich’s Westend Area, 2min walk to  subway station Schwanthalerhöhe and Theresienwiese. Restaurants, Grocery Shops, and late-night Kiosk all within 30sec. 4min walk to Oktoberfest.
neighborhood_overview:
Formerly known as the working-class neighbourhood of Munich, the Westend area has grown in both its diversity and vibrancy with a multi-cultural charm displayed in its Kebap houses, Greek taverns, Italian Trattorias, French cuisines, Thai, Vietnamese and Japanese places, as well as Vegan and of course Bavarian Restaurants and Beer Gardens. There are a variety of boutiques, Cafe’s, knick knack shops, and a fair share of designers and architects that have set up their offices here, making the area sort of trendy but not in a busy way. Westend is the home of Munich’s oldest brewery, Augustiner, which has been based here for 130 years. With a brand new shopping mall, and cozy Bavaria Park during the summer days, it makes living quite enjoyable, and it is quite possible not having to leave the area at all for a couple of days.

Lovely feature on the history of the area: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YOvoTSePI4U

This apartment is located in the middle of the famous Schillerstraße, directly at Munich Central Station. You won't find a more central location in Munich: The main station, Marienplatz, Karlsplatz-Stachus, Sendlinger Tor, the Oktoberfest and all other important hotspots are only a few minutes' walk away.

Of course, this is accompanied by a certain bustle and lively hustle of the city. Many different cultures, nationalities and people with different backgrounds live together here. It is a mix of high-class restaurants, 4-5 star hotels, bars, the German Theatre and, on the other side, shisha cafés, casinos, table dance bars and Far Eastern shops. But we must not forget that Munich itself and this area in particular are among the safest places in Europe.

The neighborhood Lehel is located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sit in the sun on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße, a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. It can get lively in the evenings in summer when the windows are open!

You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern bar/restaurant called Frex and the bar/restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is an institution in Munich's bar scene.

Surroundings / Leisure facilities: Thalkirchen is beautifully situated in the south of the city and offers many recreational and leisure possibilities due to its nature and proximity to the Isar. The famous Flaucher - within walking distance in less than 10 minutes - with its woods and meadows, playgrounds and some of Munich's most beautiful beer gardens invites you to take a walk, cycle, swim and barbecue along the river, especially in summer.
The Sendlinger Park and the DAV climbing and bouldering centre are in the immediate vicinity of the apartment. On the other side of the Isar river, easily accessible via the Thalkirchner Brücke bridge, is the Hellabrunn zoo in the neighbouring district of Untergiesing-Harlaching. Thalkirchen also has the Maria Einsiedel natural pool, one of Munich's most beautiful open-air pools.

The interior is a mixture of  modern design and flea market objects in a cozy atmosphere. The view is green with plenty of old trees in a park with a large meadow and  a huge playground. The Isar river is just a few minutes away. The subway station is five minutes by foot and there are several bus stations reachable within one minute.
neighborhood_overview:
Haidhausen is a 19th century city extension on the right river banks of the Isar. In the last 20 years it has become a fashionable urban district known for its charming streets lined with colorful buildings, little cafes, a wide range of restaurants, shops selling hand-crafted design and fashion, while still being very family-friendly.

One of the most popular spots in Haidhausen is the Wiener Platz, a bustling square surrounded by cafes, shops, and a local market. It's a great place to grab a coffee and people-watch, or pick up some fresh produce and local specialties.

Old town Lehel uniquely combines historical charm with modern lifestyle. Stroll through the cobblestone streets, discover beautiful old buildings and enjoy the proximity to the Isar or the English Garden, which invites you to take relaxing walks or sporting activities.

description:

Early check-in and luggage storage are usually possible.

Parking is available just 100 meters away (€10/24h).

Includes my exclusive insider list—you won’t find this in any travel guide! ;)

See you soon & best regards,

Lisa
neighborhood_overview: This Suite is located in the heart of Munich, within short walking distance to the main train station, the pedestrian zone "Sendlinger Straße" and the walking zone Area. In the immediate vicinity are the European Patent Office, the university hospitals and the German theater. This urban and creative district has the potential to become the new trendy neighborhood of Munich. Right in the pulsating heart of Munich - it doesn't get more central than this.

description: A modern and quiet studio with self-check-in in Westend, a trendy central area in Munich. There is everything you need for a pleasant stay, both in the apartment and in the neighborhood. From a variety of restaurants till a great bakery just on the corner to start the day with a delicious breakfast. The subway is just 300 meters from the apartment and takes you all around the city. Full equipped kitchen with dishwasher and washing machine.
neighborhood_overview: As far as the infrastructure is concerned, within two hundred meters of the apartment you will find everything you need for daily use. Among the restaurants in the neighbouhood I would suggest the Augustiner Bräustuben  in the Landsberger Straßeand the restaurant Red Pepper (international food) in the Guldeinstraße. Another recommended restaurants in the cty are the Bier und Oktoberfest Museum Stüberl (Bavarian food), the Glöckl am Dom (Bavarian food) and the  Hofbräukeller (Bavarian food).

The apartment is fully furnished and equipped!

name: Bellevue-Apartment mit Balkon
description: Light-flooded 2-room apartment with underfloor heating in Munich's north. The apartment offers everything for a stress-free stay. Nevertheless, the apartment is centrally located, a supermarket is within walking distance in a minute, two metro stations with connections to the city center in 5 minutes.
neighborhood_overview: On the opposite side of the street there is a supermarket, which is open daily, except Sundays, from 07:00 to 20:00. name: Central 110 m² · 1 Min Metro · Near Uni & Opera
description:
Oktoberfest 15 min

❗️Please read carefully and message us before booking 🙏

Spacious, quiet 110 m² flat in a historic building—just 1 min to Münchner Freiheit metro in vibrant Schwabing.

🚶‍♂️ Walk 5 min to English Garden, cafés, markets.
🚇 2–3 stops to LMU, Opera, Marienplatz.

🛏 Two bedrooms are fully separated by a large living room and hallway—ideal for privacy.

🎹 Piano, fast Wi-Fi, 🌿 high ceilings, 🍳 full kitchen.

Ideal for 1–2 adults, colleagues, or small families.
neighborhood_overview:
Experience Munich like a local in the vibrant University area and Schwabing, the city's most beloved districts.

The metro station is MÜNCHENER FREIHEIT
This is not your typical tourist spot:)

Our location is perfect for sightseeing, with major attractions such as Marienplatz, Oktoberfest, museums, and city castles all within a quick 5-15 minute journey. After a day of exploration, retreat to the tranquility of your local neighborhood.

Just a 5-minute stroll away is the English Garden, a haven for relaxation and outdoor activities. The University and main sightseeing points are a mere 5-10 minutes away.

Immerse yourself in the bohemian lifestyle, savoring traditional local cuisine in various beer gardens and neighborhood eateries.

Convenience is key, with organic supermarkets, top-rated cafes, and restaurants just a 1-5 minute walk away. Plus, the subway is practically on your doorstep, making it easy to explore everything Mu

name: Deluxe Inner City Penthouse, Rooftop Residence
neighborhood_overview: Super central inner city location close to Theresienwiese with (festival ground for Oktoberfest, its small pendant Springfestival and the Tollwood winter festival, Munich largest Christmas market) and near Clinic Quarter. Restaurants, beer gardens, outside eateries, super markets, large new shopping mall, lovely Bavaria park are all in walking distance. 10 minutes to walk or one stop by subway to Hauptbahnhof (main station). 10 minutes walk or two stops by tube to main shopping street and pedestrian area from Stachus leading up to Marienplatz with the neo gothic town hall; 15 minutes walk or 3 stops by tube to luxurious shopping quarters 5 Höfe (Five Yards), Maximilianstrasse and Opera House; 10 minute walk to adjoining hip and lively quarter Westend with its cafés, bars, restaurants and fashionable shops. 10 minutes to Sonnenstrasse with exciting nightlife in hip bars and clubs, great choice of Bavarian and international restaurants from inexpensive to exclusive, cinemas also offering

name: Hotel am Markt - TWIN Double Room München
description: We are located in the heart of Munich's old town, in the pedestrian zone at the Viktualienmarkt, within walking distance to many Bavarian restaurants, sights and attractions. A minute's walk to the famous Munich City Hall on Marienplatz, where you can easily find the metro station with direct connection to the airport. Munich is waiting for you!

We love our neighborhood and like to go to the Brezreiter to eat some white sausages. Unser Restaurant - Laurin bietet ein fantastisches Mittagsmenü und für den Abend empfehlen wir das Restaurant Zum Alten Markt. Wer jedoch Lust auf Gaudi hat dann ist man im Hofbräuhaus jederzeit herzlich willkommen 365 Tage Oktoberfest Flair und hervorragende bayerische Küche.

-

At Hotel am Markt we offer a great location and great service so you can enjoy the beautiful and historic city of München! Today our house offers beautiful hotel rooms with simple and clean equipment for everyday needs. We are located in the heart of Munich's old city center, the pedestrian street at the Viktualienmarkt located within close walking distance to many bavarian restaurants, attractions, and sights.

description: Luxurious apartment with private access, mini kitchen and bathroom with toilet. On the upper floor with Studio 1; Studio 3 in the attic. In the immediate vicinity are a supermarket, bakery, pharmacy, drugstore, organic market, and car rental. Bus stop 2 minutes, direct buses to BMW, Allianzarena (U Kieferngarten), MOC, MTC. Public transport: Schwabing 20 min., city center 30 minutes, Oktoberfest 37 minutes Airport (MVV 60 min/car 25). Perfect for cars; 5 min to A99 Salzburg/Nuremberg/Stuttgart. Free bikes available.
neighborhood_overview:
The Am Hart district is a quiet residential area near Schwabing. The house is located close to Ingolstädter Straße (an extension of the central Ludwig-/Leopoldstraße).

Many shops are nearby, organic market, drugstore, Aldi, Lidl, fitness center, car rental, pizza delivery service, pizzeria. About 1 km away is the large shopping district Euroindustriepark with a hardware store, furniture, etc.

Perfect starting point for Allianz Arena, BMW Welt and Museum, MOC/MTC, Olympic Stadium & Hall, Zenith Hall.

Walking & jogging: Close to the local recreation areas of Fröttmaninger Heide, Panzerwiese, Oberschleißheim Palace.

Direct bus tram and S-Bahn connections can all be reached in about 3-5 minutes (on foot). The apartment was elaborately renovated 2 years ago, the size alone with the beautiful living-dining room area of about 45 sqm offers plenty of space that makes all hearts beat faster. Children and pets, not suitable.

description: Welcome to your new and smart temporary home! Our PREMIUM SMART Apartments await you on spacious 32 square meters, with everything a smart traveler expects. Enjoy the high-quality and modern furnishings as well as the luxurious interior design. A queen size bed, high design floors, and a fully equipped kitchen (including a toaster, a stove with a ceramic hob, a dishwasher) provide atmospheric living like at home! In addition, your apartment offers you air conditioning!
neighborhood_overview: For many Munichers, Schwabing is not only a neighborhood, but a real attitude to life: in the afternoon in the cafe, strolling on Leopoldstraße or balmy evenings in the English Garden. TIMEHOUSE can be found where the city beats the city. Located right on the north part of Leopoldstraße, TIMEHOUSE is the perfect starting point for your personal Munich experience. Whether airport or trade fair, whether business apartment or Isar walk – from here everything is possible, only never far away. Immerse yourself in the vibe of this thriving metropolis and make yourselves a guest, but as part of it. The surrounding restaurants, cafes and shops are waiting to be discovered by you. TIMEHOUSE is your personal urban retreat and the perfect retreat after a successful and multifaceted day.

Your room charge will be paid prior to your arrival. The remaining balance of taxes (7%) will be charged upon arrival. A refundable security deposit of $XX will also be collected.
neighborhood_overview:
At Hotel am Markt we offer a great location and great service so you can enjoy the beautiful and historic city of München! Today our house offers beautiful hotel rooms with simple and clean equipment for everyday needs. We are located in the heart of Munich's old city center, the pedestrian street at the Viktualienmarkt located within close walking distance to many bavarian restaurants, attractions, and sights.

One minute walking distance from the famous Munich city hall at Marienplatz where you can easily find the subway main station with a direct connection to the Airport or Main Railstation.

name: Traumlage Lehel/Isar: Großes Zimmer, eigenes Bad!
description:
Absolutely central between the old town and the Isar: Beautiful old building room, 19 square meters, with double bed, private bathroom, large kitchen-living room and green courtyard!
Just a few steps to Praterinsel, Maximilianstraße, Deutsches Museum; a few minutes' walk to Marienplatz, the old town and all the sights.

Centrally located between the Old Town and the river Isar: pretty and recently refurbished room with a queen-size bed and private bathroom! Just a few steps away from all the famous sights of Munich.
neighborhood_overview:
The building is a well-maintained and representative old building from 1870 – top location in Lehel, in the shadow of the Bavarian Parliament in the Maximilianeum and overlooking the Maxmonument and only a few steps from the tram lines 16/19/21, the Lehel subway and the Isartor S-Bahn.
Lehel is a popular residential area, but on many corners there are also chic bars, good restaurants and good taverns. The event location on Prater Island is right around the corner. The Museum 5 Continents, the Haus der Kunst, the Bavarian National Museum and the Deutsches Museum are just a few steps away. There are also cinemas, beer gardens, the Gasteig cultural center, the Muffathalle and the Isar meadows. Last but not least, it is only a few meters to the city center, for window shopping on Maximilianstraße and in the English Garden, past the Eisbach surfers.

The apartment features a fully equipped kitchen, south-facing balcony, flat-screen TV, modern bath, high speed internet and underfloor heating for a comfortable stay. Perfect for couples or solo travelers seeking both excitement and relaxation. Your perfect Munich getaway awaits!

The apartment is on the ground floor in the lovely Lehel neighbourhood, on a quiet side street. neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood Lehel is located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sit in the sun on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße, a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. It can get lively in the evenings in summer when the windows are open!

You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern bar/restaurant called Frex and the bar/restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is an institution in Munich's bar scene.

name: Numa | Large Studio w/ Kitchenette in Obergiesing
description: The studios are located on the ground floor and top floor and offer 27 square meters in space. The bedrooms have a king-size bed with a comfortable mattress. neighborhood_overview: Obergiesing is a popular residential area known for its easy access to Munich’s city centre and to other idyllic places such as Ostpark and Perlacher Forst. The inhabitants call this area "Gateway to the South", as it is an important junction of routes and roads coming from different directions. Untergiesing, an area in the vicinity that offers numerous leisure activities such as secluded beaches along the Isar River or the romantic rose gardens hidden between the Isar River and Scheuerbad, can easily be reached from Munico. The village of Ramersdorf, is also close by, where you can visit the old town and enjoy the oldest beer garden in Munich, the "Alter Wirt".

neighborhood_overview: Obergiesing is a popular residential area known for its easy access to Munich’s city centre and to other idyllic places such as Ostpark and Perlacher Forst. The inhabitants call this area "Gateway to the South", as it is an important junction of routes and roads coming from different directions. Untergiesing, an area in the vicinity that offers numerous leisure activities such as secluded beaches along the Isar River or the romantic rose gardens hidden between the Isar River and Scheuerbad, can easily be reached from Munico. name: Numa | XL Duplex-Studio w/ Kitchenette & Sofabed
description: The Duplex-Studio is located on the top floor of the building and occupies a 56 sqm space distributed over two floors. neighborhood_overview:
Munico is located in the Obergiesing district, where there are many beautiful corners within walking distance. With its proximity to Untergiesing, which attracts more and more young and creative people with its many cafés and bars, it is located in a popular residential area.
Nearby is also the district Ramersdorf, with its many idyllic settlements and its historic town centre. Munich's oldest beer garden, the "Alte Wirt", is located here. With its church Maria, the district has one of the most important pilgrimage sites in Bavaria.
This district is also an important traffic junction in Munich and is therefore often called the "Gateway to the South". Thanks to the good connections, from here one is not only quickly in Munich's city centre and the trade fair city, but also close to beautiful local recreation areas such as the Ostpark or Perlacher Forst.

The area is also home to the football club 1860 München, giving the quarter a unique sense of character and appeal. Its proximity to the international trade fair center and Munich's outskirts provides countless possibilities for city trippers or business people. Don't worry, we’ll give you some hints on our favourite spots in and around Munich.

5 min walk to Oktoberfest!

Centrally located apartment with great connection to the city (U-Bahn Schwanthalerhöhe subway), in 5 minutes at the MAIN STATION. A stone's throw away from Oktoberfest, cafes in the Westend and the Isar.

The balcony and the kitchen can be used in consultation.
neighborhood_overview: Quiet residential area in the city center with the best connection to the city center (bus, subway, e-scooter)

name: Zimmer in moderner Wohnung
description:
Room in high-quality, spacious apartment in Sendling near Munich city center. The apartment is bright, newly renovated and is equipped with parquet, underfloor heating, bathtub, washing machine, dishwasher, terrace and front garden, floor-to-ceiling windows and electric shutters.

In 1 minute, you will be at the bus towards Marienplatz. In 8 minutes you can reach Harras, a transport hub with buses, S-Bahn, U-Bahn etc.

name: 3 Bathroom * Rhapsody In Roof * Penthouse
description:
Modern penthouse loft with direct access to the elevator. The apartment is extensively equipped and can accommodate up to 10 guests. Thanks to the 3 bathrooms (3 x shower & WC) there is no traffic jam in the morning!
In the high-quality kitchenette you can conjure up the finest dishes (microwave, stove, oven, refrigerator with freezer, kettle, hand blender, toaster, ...) and the dishwasher takes care of the dishes.
neighborhood_overview: Obersendling is a lively district located south of the city center. Within a few minutes walking distance you can reach the green Isar floodplains, which invite you to enjoy nature, take a walk or go swimming. There is also a beautiful outdoor swimming pool and the zoo Hellabrunn. In the direct neighborhood there are some very good and affordable restaurants (3 Italians, one Korean, one Greek, German restaurant, ...), as well as grocery stores (e.g. Lidl), stationery stores, bakeries, a pharmacy, ... and two banks (ATM).

name: Single Apartment with kitchenette close to Isar
description: Living in a prime location and still quiet: our single flats with equipped kitchenette, own living, dining and sleeping area and home office space (free wifi) are located in the middle of the iconic Glockenbachviertel, directly on the beautiful Isarhochufer Ideal for jogging or walking, perfect for working, perfect for enjoying. And nice and smart for those who want to stay longer and feel a bit at home even when they're far away.
neighborhood_overview:
Here you can experience Munich as its best! The Bavarian capital is the city with the highest quality of life in Germany. And apartments on the Isar and in the Glockenbachviertel are among the most sought-after hot living spots within Munich. Because here you can not only jog and walk for miles. Here it is colorful, lively, vibrant and just really nice to work, live, jog, stroll or even walk your four-legged friend. Dogs are of course welcome here.
In the direct vicinity of the Apartment Hotel are the iconic Nockherberg, the Prater and the Weideninsel, the Westermühlbach and the so beautiful Rosengarten. Within walking distance and with direct access to any number of individual stores, stores, supermarkets, trendy pubs and bars, on our doorstep is the Röcklplatz, which offers a real culinary culture, the Evergreen Cafe Szuzi, the in restaurant Fugazi in Bauhaus style with Mediterranean cuisine and of course the Wittelsbach and Reichenbach Bridge with its legendary 24-hour Reichenb

name: Helle Galeriewohnung mit Balkon zentrumsnah
description:
I go on vacation and rent out my entire apartment. It is a cozy, very bright gallery apartment with a south-facing balcony. In summer it gets quite warm, but there are roller blinds and a sunshade for protection and many windows to ventilate at night.

Very quiet location, shops and bars are within walking distance. The public transport connection to public transport is very good.

It would be nice if you could water the balcony plants once a day so that they stay beautiful for a long time.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood is very quiet and familiar. I feel very comfortable here.

Shops for daily errands around the corner Restaurants, bars, parks, sports facilities and the Isar are also nearby.

name: Apartment mit Balkon & Kitchenette in Haidhausen
description: Comfort made easy. New job, Unibeginn or city trip? Then the chic apartments with balcony into the countryside in the Living Hotel am Deutsches Museum are the ideal living space concept for shorter & longer stays. Because everything is there: equipped kitchenette, dining, working & living area and free high-speed Wi-Fi. And: we are very centrally located at the German Museum in Haidhausen, right on the Isar where Munich is colorful and lively and you can walk everywhere
neighborhood_overview: Here, in the Haidhausen district, many Munich people prefer to live, because here you get the best of two worlds: Munich pulsates here. It's colorful, creative and  cosmopolitan, but also green and completely relaxed. From the hotel, you can take public transport, which starts right outside the door, within minutes to the most beautiful and exciting corners of the city: Maximilianstraße, Marienplatz, Viktualienmarkt, Wiener Platz or the Museum Triangle in Schwabing. But here you are already in the middle of city life and can easily walk to the neighborhood from the Gasteig cultural center to the Isar, the Müllersche Volksbad, the Deutsche Museum, the Stadtcafe Film Museum, the shopping street Motorama and also the oldest cinema in the city "Die Museum Lichtspiele" on foot.

Fully equipped kitchen

• Collect new energy in the cuddly bed with extra large blanket and feel-good guarantee
• Surfing through the internet via your own router with LAN & Wi-Fi and USB charger on the bed
• Exercise in the bright gym with modern appliances
• Enjoy the sunset on the large roof terrace with a nice drink
• Host 24/7: Contact person on site 24/7
neighborhood_overview: The subway stop "Georg-Brauchle-Ring" of the U1 line is just 250 meters away. With about 12 minutes drive you can reach Munich city center as well as the main train station. The Dante outdoor swimming pool is just a stone throw away and the Olympiapark with stadium let you be active and relax at any time. Munich's largest shopping center is also around the corner.

description:
Dear guests,

welcome to our newly furnished 1-room apartment in the east of Munich. We are located directly at the subway stop Kreillerstrasse as well as at the tram stop "St.-Veit-Strasse". So you can reach the city center of Munich in only 15 minutes!

- Comfortable double bed
- Additional two sleeping places are possible due to sleeping bed in the living area
- Very well developed neighborhood with supermarket, bakery, pharmacy, etc. all within a few minutes walk.
neighborhood_overview: Extremely well connected to public transport. In addition to supermarkets, bakeries, pharmacies, etc., there are also some nice restaurants and beer gardens. The Ostpark can also be reached in a few minutes on foot.

name: Luxury-Condo in Munich’s most fanciest place
description:
Residying in the noble Kern Bogenhausens

- Exclusive residential area (politician, entrepreneur, football player)
- Bright apartment with luxurious interiors
- Oversized window in the living room with armored safety glazing
- Bedroom with a double bed and a large built-in wardrobe
- Bathroom with tub, large mirror and designer light equipment
- fully equipped kitchen (fridge, dishwasher and washing machine, etc.)
- modern 65-inch TV with home cinema system
- Sufficient parking spaces, even for visiting
neighborhood_overview: 5 minutes away you can find the Isar River but also the famous englisch garden

name: Apartment in the Living Hotel at the Olympiapark
description: Quiet and smart living in our renovated one-room apartments at the Olympiapark. Whether short- or longstay, business or leisure, everything is taken care of here: Home meets office style including kitchenette, dining, working and living area, marble bathroom. A laundry is available in-house, as well as free high-speed wifi, green electricity and a smart hygiene concept. And: we are centrally located in Neuhausen, where Munich is colorful and you can easily get everywhere on foot.
neighborhood_overview: We are right in the middle of one of the most popular residential areas of the city: in Nymphenburg, Neuhausen and Gern free living space is hotly sought after, because here it is incredibly beautiful and very green: from the hotel you are in a few minutes walk directly in the Olympic area with its many sports, leisure and sightseeing opportunities such as Sea World, BMW Museum, the TV tower, the ice rink and the large weekend flea market. Just as quickly, you can walk to the Dante Stadium, which also has its winter outdoor swimming pool open during the cold season, or to the Taxispark and the associated Taxis beer garden: a real highlight, especially in the summer. For coffee and cake connoisseurs, we recommend the insider tip Café Tribeca at the end of the street. An extra plus point is the proximity to Nymphenburg Palace with its parks, the two driveways and the canal, the best place in town for curling or ice skating in winter.

name: Apartment & balcony in Living Hotel am Olympiapark
description: The one-room apartments right next to the Olympic Park are quiet and surrounded by greenery. Whether short- or longstay, business or leisure, everything is taken care of here: kitchenette, dining, working and living areamand even a sunny balcony with a nice view. A laundry is available in-house, as well as free high-speed wifi, green electricity and a smart hygiene concept. And: we are centrally located in Neuhausen, where Munich is colorful and lively and you can get everywhere on foot.
neighborhood_overview: The golden residential triangle of Nymphenburg, Neuhausen and Gern is one of the absolute top residential locations in town. Here, free living space is more than rare, because here it is simply really beautiful and, above all, very green: From the hotel, you are in a few minutes walk directly in the Olympic area with its many sports, leisure and sightseeing opportunities such as the TV tower, the ice rink, Sea World, BMW Museum and the large weekend flea market. Just as quickly you can walk to the Dantestadium, which also has the winter outdoor swimming pool open in the cold season, or to the Taxispark and the associated Taxis beer garden: a real highlight, especially in the summer. For coffee and cake connoisseurs, we recommend the insider tip Café Tribeca at the end of the street. The proximity to Nymphenburg Palace with its parks, the two avenues leading up to it, and the palace canal is clearly an extra plus point all year round.

You have great connections in all directions and the station is right at your doorstep.
Bike rental possible via request.

Free wireless + TV (basic cable) in the bedroom.
Single bed 200*100cm, 6ft 6inch * 3ft 3inch
desk size 220*80cm, 7ft 2inch * 31inch

No smoking/vaping. No pets.
neighborhood_overview: Fasangarten is a very residential neighborhood at the southern city limits of Munich. Farmland and forest just 100 feet away - great for jogging. Bakery 4 minutes walking distance. Italian and Greek restaurant (the latter one with beergarden) also just 4 minutes walking distance. Grocery store (HIT) right next to the Fasangarten train stop. Infineon/Campeon/Intel within 15-20 minutes walking distance.

The apartment has just been newly renovated (August 2020) and has been equipped with high-quality designer furniture. It is a lovingly restored old apartment in which masterful carpentry and upholstery work has been revived and combined with a modern interior.
neighborhood_overview: The area is a trendy district in Munich. You will not be bored here. Whether sights, leisure activities or nightlife - Schwabing leaves nothing to be desired. Around the apartment there are many excellent restaurants and bars. Also cultural offers are unique in our district for Munich. You are in the middle of the university district. Alte, Neue Pinakothek, Pinakothek der Moderne and the Brandhorst Museum are just a few examples. My tip: On Sundays the entrance fee is only 1 Euro!

100% privacy

The modern apartment offers you everything you need for a comfortable and unforgettable stay.
Let yourself be enchanted by the inviting atmosphere and location and experience Munich to the fullest.

The flat is on the first floor of an old beautiful building, close to the city center, perfect located for a good night sleep and relaxing stay.
The apartment is fully furnished with luxury designer furniture and has recently been completely renovated.

name: Exklusive, ruhige Wohnung inkl. KFZ-Stellplatz.
description:
Arrive and feel comfortable on almost 40 square meters in a very good location:
The well-cut apartment for 1-2 people offers everything you need (fully equipped kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, quiet balcony to the countryside, CAR PARKING, and much more). The Westpark and a bus stop are right at your doorstep. Subway stations as well as the Theresienwiese can be reached in about 10 minutes on foot. Numerous restaurants, bars and shops of daily life in the immediate vicinity complete the overall picture.

name: (Langzeit) Großartige Gartenwohnung im Zentrum
description: Enjoy the simple life at this quiet and centrally located home.

name: Apartment im Living Hotel am Deutschen Museum
description: Greetings God at the Living Hotel at the Deutsches Museum!  Relaxed, cozy and equipped with everything the living heart desires for a longer stay or temporary living: Our fully equipped apartments with kitchenette, dining and work corner and plenty of storage space are top central and exactly where Munich pulsates
neighborhood_overview: Here, in the Haidhausen district, many Munich people prefer to live, because here you get the best of two worlds: Munich pulsates here. It's colorful, creative and  cosmopolitan, but also green and completely relaxed. From the hotel, you can take public transport, which starts right outside the door, within minutes to the most beautiful and exciting corners of the city: Maximilianstraße, Marienplatz, Viktualienmarkt, Wiener Platz or the Museum Triangle in Schwabing. But here you are already in the middle of city life and can easily walk to the neighborhood from the Gasteig cultural center to the Isar, the Müllersche Volksbad, the Deutsche Museum, the Stadtcafe Film Museum, the shopping street Motorama and also the oldest cinema in the city "Die Museum Lichtspiele" on foot.

name: Zimmer mit eigenem Bad in einer tollen Lage
description: Unwind in this special and quiet home after sightseeing in the beautiful city of Munich. Great location with easy access to public transport. Very near landmarks such as the Olympiapark and Nymphenburg Castle. Only 30 min from the center (Marienplatz).
neighborhood_overview: quiet residential area with many nearby green areas.

name: MUNICH FINEST APARTMENTS 1 (95 Quadratmeter)
description:
This unique accommodation is located right in the HEART of Munich on the famous Schillerstraße. Place of stay for families, groups and friends.
All important stations of the city center are within walking distance.
Marienplatz, Karlsplatz-Stachus, Hauptbahnhof, Sendlinger Tor, Oktoberfest, all within a few minutes' walk.
neighborhood_overview:
MUNICH FINEST APARTMENTS provides accommodation with city views and free WiFi ideally located in the center of Munich, within a short distance of Sendlinger Tor, Karlsplatz (Stachus) and Asamkirche.

Each unit features a kitchen with a dishwasher and a microwave, a safe, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, ironing facilities, a wardrobe and a seating area. The private bathroom comes with a bidet, a hairdryer and free toiletries.

Popular points of interest near the apartment include Frauenkirche, Theresienwiese and Marienplatz. The nearest airport is Munich Airport, 29 km from MUNICH FINEST APARTMENTS.

According to independent guest reviews, this is the most popular part of Munich.

name: NEU: Luxuswohnung in super Lage!
description:
Newly renovated apartment in a great location. Very central yet extremely quiet area with luxury amenities:

Very high-quality fitted kitchen, luxury bathroom with huge spa shower, underfloor heating, high-end carpentry fixtures, 3-meter high ceilings, great lighting, independent entrance, high-quality double bed (extra long 210 cm).
neighborhood_overview:
The location is great, almost directly on the U-Bahn (U3 and U6; the two best lines for tourists, as they connect all highlights) and only two stops to the old town. Close to restaurants, cafes, bakeries, shops, theaters. Really something special!
Walking distance to Oktoberfest, Munich Volkstheater, "Alte Utting" bar and beer garden, Isar, etc.

name: Your best impression about Munich
description: It is a small apartment, with everything you need. This apartment is otherwise used by me and only listed when I am not around. Therefore, there are also personal belongings on site, but you also get the reasonable price.

name: HERA – 2-bedroom apartment in Munich city center
description:
Our cozy apartment is in the center of Munich, just minutes on foot to Marienplatz, the Old Town and the boutiques on Maximilianstraße! Have a drink at one of the neighborhood bars, go for a run along the Isar river just a block away, or recharge your batteries in the comfy apartment with Internet, a Nespresso coffee machine (fair trade, recyclable pods), appliances and great mattresses!

On-site parking: €25 per night. Ask about availability.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood Lehel is located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sit in the sun on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße is a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. It can get lively in the evenings in summer when the windows are open!

You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern bar/restaurant called Frex and the bar/restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is an institution in Munich's bar scene.

name: Light flooded loft near the centre of Munich
description:
This light flooded loft in North Schwabing, with your own street entrance, is a perfect city apartment for your stay in Munich. Just three tram stops from the bustling hub of Münchner Freiheit, you are only minutes away from the city centre.

You will have the whole loft including the upper spacious mezzanine floor for yourself. With a double bed in the cosy upstairs nook and a 4 seater couch downstairs, you can comfortably sleep 3 people.

Any questions don’t hesitate to drop us a line.
neighborhood_overview:
Our apartment is located on a quiet residential cul-de-sac with street parking. At the end of our street is a wonderful bistro where you can enjoy a coffee, lunch or dinner with outside seating provided.

Within a 5-10 minutes walk you have access to a small park called Petuelpark with playgrounds and walking routes. This park leads you to another beautiful large park called Luitpold park with acres of tree lined walks and plenty activities like basketball, table tennis and so on as well as a recently upgraded playground for smaller people :)

5-10 minute walk in the other direction from the apartment, leads you to our newest borough or neighbourhood in Munich, Schwabinger Tor. Here you will find brand new businesses like beauty salons, cafes, high end restaurants and much more. On Thursdays there is a farmers market here where you can get plenty fresh produce and enjoy the atmosphere.

Another 10 minute walk from Schwabinger Tor will bring you directly

name: Cosy 2 room apartment with great view
description:
No WiFi! Newly renovated, centrally located, bright 2-room apartment with balcony and great view over the Olympiapark.
6th floor, elevator. Couch and dining area for 2 persons, double bed (1.40m), kitchen.
The Olympic Park starts in front of the door, perfect for walking, concerts & events. Restaurants within 2 minutes reach. Olympia shopping center with 100+ stores in the immediate vicinity.
Subway reachable in 8 minutes, bus right outside the front door, highway access.
neighborhood_overview:
Direct proximity to the Olympic Park, Olympic Hall and Olympic Stadium, perfect for visiting concerts and events.

Olympic shopping center with 100+ shops and restaurants as well as public transport in the immediate vicinity.

name: Zentrale Wohnung
description:
One room equipped with a sofa bed for two people. The bathroom is separate. Please note that there is no dedicated storage space, and my personal belongings will be present.

The kitchen is equipped for your meals, a Dolce Gusto coffee machine (without capsules provided).

Supermarkets and shops within walking distance.
Several restaurants in the area to discover local specialties.

This space is perfect for short stays.

name: Penthouse im schönen München-Haidhausen
description: Perfectly located, quiet penthouse, located in the beautiful Haidhausen district, temporarily for rent. Large modern living-dining area, open kitchen, bedroom with large bed (2.00 x 2.20 m, two mattresses), bathroom. Fully furnished. Elevator. Close by: supermarkets, bakeries, restaurants and bars etc. as well as the Ostbahnhof with subway, S-Bahn and regular buses.
neighborhood_overview:
Haidhausen is the "French Quarter" of Munich with many impressive old buildings.
Nearby restaurants within a few minutes: Greek, Italian, Mexican, Vietnamese, Bavarian and more...
Numerous shopping facilities of all kinds near Ostbahnhof (5 minutes walking).

name: Budgetappartement ideal für Alleinreisende
description: The property is located in the beautiful district of Obermenzing-Pasing and is perfectly connected to the public transport network as well as the A8 highway and highways. Located directly at the Nymphenburg Palace Park, it also allows guests to spend relaxing leisure hours on foot. For shopping, the Pasing Arcades and the city center can be reached quickly by bus, tram or S-Bahn. Even at the Oktoberfest or in the Allianz Arena you are public or by car very fast.
neighborhood_overview: Nearby is a Lidl supermarket, an organic supermarket and a gas station. Bus stop in front of the door, S-Bahn and tram stops reachable in a few minutes' walk.

name: 1-Zimmer-Apartment mit Loggia/WLAN in Schwabing
neighborhood_overview: The area is very quiet and low-traffic. The beautifully landscaped Luitpoldpark is a 3-minute walk away. Many cafes and restaurants are nearby.

name: Beautiful brigde apart. in the heart of Schwabing
description:
Bright and beautiful apartment in the heart of Schwabing. Spacious living room with dining area and small office space. Equipped with comfortable couch and furnitures. TV and high speed internet. A monitor can be used.
Bedroom with a queensize boxspring bed and enough space in the wardrobe.
Light bathroom with a bathtube which can also be used as a shower.
Fully equipped kitchen with coffee machine, stove, washing machine etc.
Apartment is in the 4th floor without an elevator!
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is in the middle of Schwabing with a lot of restaurants in walking distance. Supermarkts / backeries / drug stores are 5 minutes away.
The English garden can be reached in about 12 minutes by foot.

name: A private room in a shared apartment
description:
Please note that you are booking a private room. The kitchen, living room and bathroom is shared with the owner of the flat.

This is a friendly, newly fully furnished apartment in a quiet neighborhood having a large balcony where you can relax & watch the sunset.

There is a park and lake just around the apartment where you can go for a walk/run.

The apartment is also close to the Famous Isar river and English Garden.

You can PARK your vehicles for FREE on the street.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is at the heart of Munich in between the central station and the airport.  Also close by to the Oktober Fest venue with the subway, bus or Metro. There are several means of transportation and behind the apartment, there is a lake and park.

name: Big Central Apartment near Rotkreuzplatz with 3 BR
description:
Enjoy freedom and flexibility. Homaris apartments offer you a home in a foreign city. Be independent, because we have already prepared everything for you.
Whether it's a city trip with friends or a business trip, alone or with your team - we offer accommodations in different sizes in different cities.
Our apartments impress with modern design, a central location and amenities that leave nothing to be desired. Each apartment at Homaris tells its own story - is individual. Just like you!
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is located in a quiet nice area right next to Schäringplatz (a small park) and near to Hirschgarten. Around the apartment are several restaurants  too.

name: Stylish historic building apartment @Marienplatz
description: For Tourists, Business Travelers, Guest Lecturers, who want to live and work in a high-quality, stylish, cultivated 3 1/2 room old building apartment with balcony and green courtyard, directly in the historic city center. Printer / copier / WLAN available. The apartment is located in a residential street, 5 minutes walk from Marienplatz and captivates with its dreamlike "historic-baroque" central location in the heart of Munich.
neighborhood_overview: Marienplatz, Opera, Theater, Cathedral, City Hall, The Viktualienmarkt, Hofbräuhaus, the luxury mile Maximilianstraße, the shopping paradise Fünf Höfe are within a radius of 3-10 minutes walk.Surrounded by famous shopping streets, department stores, supermarkets, pharmacies, butcher shops, bakeries, cafes, bars, Bavarian and international restaurants, pizzerias, fitness centers, etc. You live right in the middle of it all, in this fantastically central location.

name: Home away from Home in Munich
description: Our property located at one of Munich's top locations - just right in the city center. Our stylish apartments with a fresh design and contemporary furnishings, fittings and appliances are the ideal place to stay for a group of friends, families and couples.
neighborhood_overview: The property is located in the center of Munich, just minutes away from the train station and the city's main attractions.
