name: Studio apartment near Isar in Harlaching, Munich
description:
You are looking for a quite place in an nice neighborhood away from the city hustle bustle? Congrats, you have stumbled upon right place. You'll have this studio apartment all to yourself.
In the vicinity of the apartment, you are a walk away from Grünwald, Harlaching Hospital, Isar River, and, Zoo. The location is 25 minutes away from Munich city center yet it feels very quite and relaxing.

name: gemütliche 2-Zimmer Wohnung mit großer Wohnküche
description: Fully equipped cozy apartment close to the Forstenrieder forest. The apartment is very lighted, as in every room incl. Bathroom are windows. The apartment is located on the second floor of a small 4-party house. Sunny balcony there is

name: Apartment in the Living Hotel Prinzessin Elisabeth
description: Well being in the Living Hotel Prinzessin Elisabeth: our cozy one-room apartments with kitchenette and their own living, dining, sleeping and home office corner including free high-speed wifi offer plenty of space and are located in Glockenbach on the Isar: ideal for jogging or strolling, perfect for working and living, perfect for enjoying. And beautifully smart for all those who want to stay longer and also have a home feeling somewhere else.
neighborhood_overview:
Here you can experience Munich as its best! The Bavarian capital is the city with the highest quality of life in Germany. And apartments on the Isar and in the Glockenbachviertel are among the most sought-after hot living spots within Munich. Because here you can not only jog and walk for miles. Here it is colorful, lively, vibrant and just really nice to work, live, jog, stroll or even walk your four-legged friend. Dogs are of course welcome here.
In the direct vicinity of the Apartment Hotel are the iconic Nockherberg, the Prater and the Weideninsel, the Westermühlbach and the so beautiful Rosengarten. Within walking distance and with direct access to any number of individual stores, stores, supermarkets, trendy pubs and bars, on our doorstep is the Röcklplatz, which offers a real culinary culture, the Evergreen Cafe Szuzi, the in restaurant Fugazi in Bauhaus style with Mediterranean cuisine and of course the Wittelsbach and Reichenbach Bridge with its legendary 24-hour Reichenb

name: Soulful home in central Munich (2min Octoberfest)
description:
Dear guests,

Welcome to our beautiful home in the middle of Munich!

We are a young couple and have turned this apartment into a cozy and spiritual home. We love to travel and offer our home to visitors who want to explore Munich.

Our apartment offers everything you need for everyday life:

- King size bed (180x200)
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Modern bathroom
- A large, sunny balcony
- High Speed Internet
- Sofa bed (140x200)

We look forward to hosting you ✨
neighborhood_overview: The subway station (U3 & U6) is right infront of the door. In addition, there are numerous bakers, cafes, restaurants, supermarkets and organic markets in the immediate vicinity.

name: 2-Zimmer Apartment "Maximilian"  by Matteo Thun
description:
We offer you apartments for 1-5 people and in addition pure coziness. Whether as an individual, as a couple, family or as a holidaymaker – in 1-room apartments not only a sense of home awaits you. Custom-made furniture by renowned designer Matteo Thun is waiting for you to fill our apartments with life.
We will gladly provide you with a cot, high chair or baby bath free of charge.
We will be happy if you fill our apartments with life.

name: Balcony apartment in Schwabing
description: Welcome to our centrally located 3-room apartment with comfy box spring bed in the lively Schwabing/Maxvorstadt. Ideal for business travelers or couples, this charming studio is a hidden gem. Enjoy the leafy balcony, which offers a peaceful oasis after a day of sightseeing or work. With easy access to public transportation, local attractions, the Pinakotheken, cafes and restaurants, our apartment is the ideal base for your Munich adventure. (Max 2 people!!)

name: ISARTOR Deluxe Apartment I
description: New stylish apartments near Isator in the heart of the historic center of Munich: 2 minutes to Isartor,  10 minutes to Marienplatz and 5 minutes to the ISAR river and "Deutsches museum".

name: Wohnung mit eigener Dachterrasse
description:
Update August/September 2025: The roof terrace is only usable to a limited extent because the windows have been replaced and the terrace still needs to be finally re-paved. The apartment is still fully usable.

Fully equipped luxury apartment with a very large roof terrace and fantastic alpine views in the Westend.

The center can be reached in 15 minutes by subway.

The famous Theresienwiese is 5 minutes walking distance.

An underground parking space is available.

name: Locke Studio at Schwan Locke
description:
Welcome to your new mid-century-inspired base in the Bavarian capital, minutes from the site of Oktoberfest.

The vibe is one of calm creativity. The community is open and inclusive. And the apartments are both spacious and sophisticated. Settle in and see a side to Munich most tourists miss.
neighborhood_overview:
In Munich for Oktoberfest, Frühlingsfest or the Tollwood Winterfestival? You couldn’t stay in a better-located hotel or apartment. Just minutes from Theresienwiese, Schwan Locke offers an inspiring tranquil retreat in the midst of the action.

Our local borough, Isarvorstadt, includes the pretty neighbourhood of Glockenbackviertel, with its coffee shops, gay bars, global foodie spots and independent shops. And if your itinerary includes sightseeing time, we’re just a few tram stops from the city’s main attractions too. Including Marienplatz, the Viktualienmarkt, Beergarden Augustiner Keller and the museum quarter. Munich, done properly.

name: Urban Dream Munich
description: The apartment is close to the beautiful Olympic Park and Luitpold Park. The nearest U-Bahn [subway] stop Hohenzollernsplatz is a 5-minute walk. In 5 minutes you can be at the main train station by U-Bahn.
neighborhood_overview:
Royal squares, magnificent buildings and park: Schwabing-West in Munich
The district of squares – perhaps this is the best way to describe Schwabing-West. Because with Kurfürstenplatz, Hohenzollernplatz or Elisabethplatz, some of Munich's most famous squares are in this district. And with the Luitpoldpark, the district also has a relaxed green area with a view. We'll tell you what makes the Schwabing-West district special.

Shopping: Hohenzollernstraße and Elisabethmarkt

Typical Schwabing life is in full swing on Hohenzollernstraße. Between Kurfürstenplatz and Leopoldstraße, those Munich residents who find the pedestrian zone too crowded or mainstream go shopping. Here, one small fashion boutique lines up next to the other, international labels, decorative shops and antiques in backyards next to small street cafés and pubs - and in the small side streets you can discover beautiful Art Nouveau buildings. neighborhood_overview: The district of Schwabing is the epitome of Munich lifestyle. Both among young people and old-established Munich residents - and those who want to become one - Schwabing is a household name as a residential area and center of life. This is due on the one hand to the proximity to the universities and technical colleges and on the other hand to the opportunities to enjoy the flair of this artists' quarter and the nightlife extensively. The residential area has an inner-city character and convinces with its central, very good transport connections, both by public transport and by car. The subway stops "Bonner Platz" and "Scheidplatz" (lines U2/U3) as well as the streetcar and bus stop in Belgradstraße are in the immediate vicinity. By car, the Belgradstraße and the Mittlerer Ring provide perfect connections to all parts of the city as well as to the most important freeway connections. Shopping facilities for daily needs are located in the immediate vicinity as well as for the pure shoppin

name: Central Bright Studio, 2 stops from Marienplatz
description:
A cosy, light-filled studio, located in one of Munich's most vibrant neighbourhoods, the French Quarter.

Conveniently located right at Rosenheimer Platz, just a 15 min walk from Marienplatz, and 10min from Munich East train station.

Direct trains from/to the airport and Munich Central Station.

Head for a run by the Isar river, enjoy a cup of coffee/meal at a nearby café or restaurant, watch the sunset at the Maximilianeum, or catch up with friends over a beer at the Muffathalle beer garden.
neighborhood_overview:
Munich's Haidhausen has a certain je-ne-sais-quoi to it. The so-called French Quarter is a vibrant and lively neighbourhood, especially in the summer and during the winter holidays.

It's a very charming area with plenty of shops, cafés and restaurants, and several plazas with fountains. Mainstream and bio supermarkets, pharmacies, dry cleaner, a laundromat and a post office within walking distance. Edeka and DM at the Munich East Station are open until 11 PM all year round.

It can get busy and somewhat louder than usual in the summer because of the restaurants nearby. You'll be able to hear the bustle on the street, the chatter of restaurants' patrons, and the street buskers if you keep the windows open.

The Isar river and the southern part of the English Garden, Muffathalle and Deutsches Museum are within a 10 min walk from the studio.

name: Hotel "Der Tannenbaum" - Family Room
description: The hotel "Der Tannenbaum" is located in the city center of Munich, in the old town directly near the famous Sendlinger Tor (subway). Everything you want to explore is right outside the door of this accommodation.

name: One Bedroom Open Plan Suite at Schwan Locke
description:
Welcome to your new mid-century-inspired base in the Bavarian capital, minutes from the site of Oktoberfest.

The vibe is one of calm creativity. The community is open and inclusive. And the apartments are both spacious and sophisticated. Settle in and see a side to Munich most tourists miss.
neighborhood_overview:
In Munich for Oktoberfest, Frühlingsfest or the Tollwood Winterfestival? You couldn’t stay in a better-located hotel or apartment. Just minutes from Theresienwiese, Schwan Locke offers an inspiring tranquil retreat in the midst of the action.

Our local borough, Isarvorstadt, includes the pretty neighbourhood of Glockenbackviertel, with its coffee shops, gay bars, global foodie spots and independent shops. And if your itinerary includes sightseeing time, we’re just a few tram stops from the city’s main attractions too. Including Marienplatz, the Viktualienmarkt, Beergarden Augustiner Keller and the museum quarter. Munich, done properly.

name: Dachgeschosswohnung in ruhiger Lage
description: The apartment is on the top floor and a 10-minute walk to Oktoberfest.  The room is located in the backyard and is very quiet for sleeping.

name: Hotel du Train - Economy Class
description: Stylish in the heart of Munich and something special for anyone looking for an exceptional boutique hotel.

name: Hotel du Train - Business Class "Gentleman"
description: Our classic, comfortable and pleasantly designed app. 11 sqm non-smoking rooms are perfect for a short-term stay or your business trip. These rooms are equipped with individually designed, wooden furniture with decorational elements in the style of the Orient Express including a 40“flatscreen SAT-TV with international channels, free WIFI, a valet stand, a wardrobe, an ensuite bathroom with shower, cosmetic mirror, WC, hairdryer, free bathroom cosmetics by “Aqua” and fluffy towels and slippers.

name: Schöne Wohnung in München. Zentrale Lage am Stadtrand mit viel Grün drum herum und sehr guter Anbindung an den öffentlichen Nahverkehr und Fernverkehr. Viele Restaurants im Viertel und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten
description: Have fun with the whole family at this stylish place.

name: Hochwertige Altstadt-Wohnung // Apartment old town
description:
Hi everyone,

here I'm offering my first-class apartment.

The apartment is in the heart of the historic old town - Viktualienmarkt, bars, theaters and the Isar are all right outside the door. Perfect for everyone who needs a lot of space and comfort, but still wants to experience the pulse of the city. The apartment is also ideal for a couple!

See you soon
Manuel

name: Liebevolles Zuhause im Grünen mit Garten
description:
Dear prospective customers, dear accommodation seekers, 
it is nice that you have come across our apartment advertisement.

Since we, a family of four with two little kids, travel a lot outside, we offer our lovingly furnished apartment for your stay in Munich for rent. 

Relax with the whole family at this peaceful place to stay in the beautiful north of Munich.

name: Gemütliches Appartement, sehr gut angebunden
description:
We currently only use the 36 sqm apartment as a holiday apartment.
There is a large kitchen with open living room and sofa bed, as well as a separate bedroom with double bed.
The apartment is on the top (3rd) floor, right on the tram station, is super bright with a large balcony and was completely modernized two years ago.
The tram takes 11 minutes to downtown. In the mountains via car 35 min.

name: Separates Zimmer mit eigener Küche und Bad
description: Clean spacious room for one person with separated entry and private kitchen and newly renovated bathroom in calm location - only 20 minutes (door-to-door) to city center via public transport.

name: Schönes Zimmer mit Balkon - 15 Min zum Oktoberfest
description:
Nice big room with balcony in Munich Laim.
Bathroom with rain shower and free parking in front of the door.

The room is in the Laim district. It has a 5-minute walk to the tram or a 10-minute walk to the subway (U5), a good connection to the city center and to Pasing.

U5 to Theresienwiese in 6 minutes or central station in 8 minutes.

The castle garden to the Nymphenburg Castle can be reached on foot in about 20 minutes.
Taxis or city scooters nearby.

name: cosy design loft in beautiful Nymphenburg
description:
Beautiful, spacious loft in the quiet district of Munich-Nymphenburg. The 80 square feet space features an open steel-fronted and fully equipped kitchen, a fireplace, work place and a cosy living space. The sleeping area can be reached via a small wood staircase.

The tram station is only a 5 minutes walk from the flat - you can reach the city center in 15 minutes. Also close by: Olympiapark (10 min) and the Nymphenburger Schloss (15 min), as well as countless great restaurants and cafés.
neighborhood_overview:
The loft is on the ground floor and located in a quiet residential area. Restaurants, bards, barber shop, organic foods market, discounter, supermarket all within 5 min walking distance.

10 walking min to Olympia Park.
10 walking min to Rotkreuzplatz.
15 min with public transport to the city center/ main train station.

name: Schöne Wohnung, Balkon und kostenloser Stellplatz
description:
Quiet location in Munich Perlach with direct bus and S-Bahn connection to the center (10-15min). Direct motorway connection for excursions into the countryside (Tegernsee approx. 30min). Shops within walking distance.

In the apartment you will find a dishwasher and washing machine and a fully equipped kitchen. The couch becomes a sofa bed if wanted. On the balcony you can use the grill.

name: Gemütliches Zimmer in Trudering
description:
This cozy, brightly furnished, approx. 17 m² room with separate kitchen-bathroom is located in the basement of a semi-detached house in Munich-Trudering.

Please do not smoke in the entire house.

name: Charming room in shared flat
description:
Welcome to Munich!
Nice cosy rooms in a quite area. You can chill out in your rooms or in the kitchen area. The neighbourhood is amazing to take a walk, go get some groceries, subway, etc, all in walking distance! With the subway it is 20 min from Munich city center!
I will be glad to help you how to find sightseeings or transport or whatever you may need.
I wish you a very nice stay!
neighborhood_overview: Quite neighbourhood, mostly families

name: lovely apartment in the center of  Munich (100 m2)
description:
This apartment is perfect for a stay in Munich. It's located right in the center of Munich, in old town Lehel.
On foot you can reach th English Garden, the Hofbräuhaus, Odeons- und Marienplatz within a few minutes. The quarter has a lot to offer: there are good restaurants, cosy cafes and bars, and yet it is quiet and with little traffic.
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is located in the Old Town district of Lehel. There are many restaurants, cafes and bars just around the corner. There is also a small supermarket next door. The neighborhood is still very quiet, there is little traffic.

The apartment is located in the old town/ Lehel. There are many restaurants, cafés and bars just around the corner. There is also a small supermarket right next door. The neighbourhood is nevertheless very quiet, there is little traffic.

name: Brand new, modern 2 room apartment
description:
The two-family house is located in a quiet residential area in Mü-Großhadern.

Apartment is on the 1st floor. Subway U6 10 minutes walk away, Marienplatz (city center) is only 15 minutes away, numerous shops are nearby.

The 50 square meter, newly built, bright 2-room apartment including a passenger elevator is furnished to a high quality: 1.80 m wide double bed and additional pull-out couch, washing machine, dishwasher, large new refrigerator, 42 inch TV and WiFi. The kitchen is fully equipped.

name: Quiet room in shared flat
description:
Welcome to Munich!
Nice & quite room in a shared flat. You can chill out in your rooms or in the kitchen area. The neighbourhood is amazing to take a walk, go get some groceries, subway, etc, all in walking distance! With the subway it is 20 min from Munich city center!
I will be glad to help you how to find sightseeings or transport or whatever you may need.
I wish you a very nice stay!
Stergios
neighborhood_overview: Quite neighbourhood, mostly families

name: Sonnige Wohnung in München-Schwabing
description: The apartment is located in the middle of Schwabing in a quiet bicycle street. It has two large rooms and a cozy kitchen-living room with a west balcony facing the courtyard. The U-Bahn and tram are 5 minutes away. Shopping (e.g. Elisabethmarkt) is very close (5-10 minutes walk). The university (both LMU and TUM) can be easily reached by bike in 10 minutes. The English Garden can be reached in 10 minutes, the Pinakotheken in 13 minutes by bike.

name: Gemütliche Wohnung in Haidhausen
description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home.
neighborhood_overview:
Around the apartment there are some places where you can get good lunch or dinner. There are numerous restaurants and cafes further downtown on the way.
Shopping is also available all around: Rewe, Aldi or V-Markt can be reached in 5 minutes.

name: Wonderful large place for families or groups
description: A beautiful 5 room flat in the heart of the city, perfectly located to get everywhere. 5 min walk to direct connection to main station and Messe München.

name: Schöne 2,5 Z-Wohnung mit Balkon in Schwabing-West
description:
Hello :) I rent my cozy apartment in a quiet location in Schwabing-West. The subway, tram and bus can be reached on foot in five minutes, and in just 15 minutes you can be in the city center by public transport.
There are bars, restaurants, parks and shops of all kinds nearby.
During your stay, my sweet cat will also be there. It is usually outside and only needs to be fed once or twice a day. If you want, my neighbor will be happy to take over.

name: Stylische Altbauwohnung in quirligem Viertel
description: The apartment is located in the lively Schwanthalerhöhe in the middle of bars, restaurants and small boutiques and is quiet and relaxing despite the buzzy environment. It was lovingly renovated in September 2021, equipped with many stylish furnishing details and the kitchen is mostly brand new. You can expect a young apartment to work, go out and enjoy Munich from its best sides.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood in Schwanthalerhöhe is full of bars, restaurants and small store. Shopping is within walking distance in a few minutes.

Striking places are the brick building of Munich's oldest brewery, the Augustiner-Bräu, the former main customs office with its imposing glass dome, the Hackerbrücke with its unique view over the tracks of the main station, and the monumental, arched glass facade of the commercial building on the northern Theresienhöhe.

The Bavariapark, Westpark and Hansapark, the playgrounds and sports fields, as well as a whole series of smaller squares provide plenty of greenery in the neighborhood.

name: Lovely Apartment in Glockenbach  central and quiet
description:
Fully equipped bright one-room apartment (31sqm), with bed (120cmx200cm), sofa and table with 2 chairs, small kitchen. Please be aware that this bed is smaller than queen size and may be considered too small for two people.

The apartment is in a popular location in Glockenbachviertel, but still absolutely quiet as it is in the rear building.
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is in a popular location in Glockenbachviertel, right in the middle of bars, restaurants and cafes as well as boutiques, and still absolutely quiet as it is in the rear building.

An organic grocery store is in front of the building, a drugstore opposite, and the Isar river 5 minutes away.

name: Apartment Copacabana | RIOCA MUNICH POSTO 3
description: The approx. 25 m² apartment Copacabana with kitchenette offers everything you need, no matter how long you intend to stay. As soon as the door is opened, the Brazilian flair invites you to feel good. Whether you want to relax in the big, comfortable bed while watching your favorite series or work at your own desk - you will feel right at home here. A modern bathroom including a rain shower round off your apartment perfectly.

name: Apartment Flamengo | Rioca Munich Posto 3
description: The approx. 27 m² apartment Flamengo with kitchenette offers you everything you need, no matter how long you intend to stay. As soon as the door is opened, the Brazilian flair invites you to feel good. Whether to relax in the cozy bed while watching your favorite series or to work at your own desk - you will feel right at home here. A modern bathroom including a rain shower round off your apartment perfectly.

name: Luxury Munich Penthouse: 2 floors & stunning view
description: Welcome to our extraordinary Munich penthouse, a 140sqm urban oasis. This unique apartment spans two floors and features a light-flooded living and dining area, handcrafted furniture & lamps, two bedrooms each with a double bed, as well as the comfort of a fireplace and a projector. I will greet you personally and provide insights into Munich and the local neighborhood to ensure you have an unforgettable stay.
neighborhood_overview: The neighbors are all very nice.

name: Apartment „Kampenwand“ 505
description: Enjoy your stay in beautiful Munich. Whether a walk through the old town, a visit to the mulled wine or a trip to the mountains,  the central location opens up all the possibilities for exploring.

name: Minimalistic Appartement
description: This wonderful 43 m ² apartment with rain shower and open kitchen is located in the beautiful Neuhausen district only 10 minutes by tram or bus from the main train station. In the apartment there is a fully equipped kitchen with washing machine and dishwasher. In the bathroom, you can get ready for the day in the large shower under the rain shower. It is only about a 5-minute walk to the tram. In the vicinity you will find all the shops of daily use as well as some restaurants.
neighborhood_overview: Neuhausen is only about 10 minutes away by tram or bus from the central station. The stops can be reached in about a 5-minute walk. You can also find the shops of daily use as well as some nice cafes and restaurants within a radius. It is also a 10-minute walk to the Olympiapark. The public connections to the property run 24 hours a day.

name: ※ Flatista Homes - Old Town ※ 6 Guests ※ 160 Sqm ※
description:
Dear guests,

welcome to Munich - Old Town!

Our vacation rental with more than 160 square metres is located in the heart of Munich Old Town.

Besides a large living room, there are 3 bedrooms, 1 dining area, 1 foosball room, 1.5 bathrooms and a fully equipped kitchen.

We offer the following amenities:

- High quality hygiene products from Rituals®.
- Professional cleaning and delivery of our bedding by hotel laundry service
- Families are welcome (free baby crib and high chair on request)

name: Cozy room with chicken in the garden
description:
Attention – transit room between 9 and 22 o'clock.

Make yourself comfortable in the relaxed atmosphere of our shared artist apartment in the heart of Munich. You will have your own artistically designed, private room with a double bed and share the natural garden with us and our chicken. The bathroom is shared only with the two of us – we keep it very clean of course.

We also rent another private room with own bathroom :)

See you soon, Genoveva & Julian

name: Zimmer mit Aussicht am Stadtpark für Frauen
description:
Enjoy a bright room with private luxurious bathroom and garden use at Pasinger Stadtpark. Bus connection to the main S-Bahn line into the city. A bicycle can be provided. By arrangement, shared use of the kitchen or bookable vegetarian breakfast. A small café in the bakery is around the corner. Washing machine use is possible for a fee.
I offer individual coaching in stress management and mindfulness practice on request.
neighborhood_overview: Quiet settlement by the city park on the outskirts of Munich

name: Homely Stay Studio1 - Your place to relax
description:
Welcome to Urban Escapes, your home away from home in a beautiful listed building near the city center.

The studio faces the courtyard and is therefore very quiet. It's the perfect place for a good rest after a long trip, an exciting day of sightseeing or a hard day at work.

Check-in is flexible, easy and keyless. Public parking is available around the house for a fee.
neighborhood_overview: The studio is located in the lively district of Obergiesing surrounded by bars, restaurants and shopping. In the immediate vicinity is a subway station, a streetcar station and a bus station.

Cozy Sofa Stay for Oktoberfest 🎉🍺
Stay in my living room sofa with easy access to Munich center and Oktoberfest! Just 25 min by metro (U3, U 1) or 15 min by car to the festival grounds. The apartment is within walking distance of 3 metro stations, making travel simple. A large shopping mall and 4 supermarkets are right outside the door. Munich Airport is 30 min by car or about 1 hr by bus/metro. Perfect budget stay for festival-goers!

name: 2,5 Zimmer Wohnung + Balkon, 8 min zum Oktoberfest
description: Welcome to our cozy and centrally located 2.5 room old building apartment in the heart of Sendling.

description: New, large, light-flooded roof terrace apartment in the green district of Neuhausen. Currently only bookable for one week, beginning of May Sat-Sat. Open kitchen with dining area and living room with pull-out feel-good couch (1.4 m),  armchair corner, art and plants create a real feel-good atmosphere. Large covered balcony with large dining area and a balcony with small sitting area. Large bedroom and work room. The large bathroom has a bath tub, toilet and window
neighborhood_overview: In the beautiful Neuhausen district, friendly,nice people live in a colorful mixed age group. There is many long-established guests and lots of happy sheets. In five minutes we walk to the Nymphenburg Canal, which leads to the Nymphenburg Castle with a huge park. In ten minutes, you can walk to the Olympic Park. Our corner is quiet. There is a well-known local call fini who cook freshly every day and is known for bread and cakes.

name: Helle 2-Zimmerwohnung nahe Schlosspark Nymphenburg
description: Modern 2-room apartment 70 m2 for rent in quiet location. The apartment has a bathroom with bathtub, a bedroom and a kitchen-living room. The building is very modern and has an elevator. Free parking in front of the house. Laim S-Bahn station is a 5-minute walk away, bus stop in 2 minutes. The Nymphenburg castle park in the immediate vicinity invites you to walk and jog.
neighborhood_overview: Very quiet location in the middle of nature, within walking distance of Nymphenburg Palace Park and public transport S Bahn, Bus Laim or Hertha-Straße

name: Stylish 2-room apartment in the best Neuhausen
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally located property.

The apartment is located on the 4th floor and can be reached barrier-free by elevator. All rooms, including bathroom and kitchen, have windows. The balcony faces west.

Quiet house with 10 parties in a traffic-calmed zone on the corner of Fundsbergstaße / Ysenburgstrasse. The property was built in 1990 and is in a very well maintained condition.
neighborhood_overview: Frundsbergstrasse is one of the most attractive streets in Neuhausen/Nymphenburg. In the immediate vicinity you will find street cafes, galleries and crafts.

name: Large apartment close to Oktoberfest!
description:
Relax at this peaceful place to stay.
Just 15 min from Oktoberfest by public transport.
Walk just 3 blocks to the tram stop and you will be at Oktoberfest ground in less than 15 min!

Apartment include bathtub, 64” TV, washing machine, complete kitchen, double bed, large sofa bed for 2, and an extra mattress.

NO PARTIES ALLOWED.

Silent time from 22h-08am

name: Micro Studio at WunderLocke
description:
Solo city break? Our compact Micro Studios have everything you need for a short stay in Munich.

In 16m², you’ll have a comfy 150cm x 200cm EU double bed. Though there’s no sofa, you’ll have all essentials – a fully-equipped kitchen with dining table, microwave, dishwasher, washer/dryer, and designer cooking gear. Plus, perks like air conditioning, a power shower with Kinsey Apothecary toiletries, blackout curtains, superfast Wi-Fi, a Smart HDTV with Chromecast, and a Locke essentials kit.
neighborhood_overview:
Munich. City of history, tradition, innovation, art and music. And – unknown to many – a city of glorious open spaces and greenery, too. Stay at WunderLocke and you’ll be in prime position to explore it all.
Close to the city centre, the main sights are just 15 minutes away by tube or bus. But you’ll also have areas of natural beauty nearby – including the River Isar, the ecological pool Maria Einsiedel and the Bavarian Alps, easily reached via the BOB train. You can even hire a bike to explore the city or surrounding countryside, with WunderLocke as your base.

name: Elevated Loft Family Apartment at WunderLocke
description:
These 32m² studios have a raised level with two 150cm x 200cm EU double beds (upstairs/downstairs). Fits 2 adults and 2 kids, with space to relax and extra storage.

The low-ceiling loft is perfect for kids. It features a fully-equipped kitchen, dining table, sofa, microwave, dishwasher, washer/dryer, and designer cooking gear. Plus, enjoy air conditioning, power shower with Kinsey Apothecary toiletries, blackout curtains, fast Wi-Fi, Smart HDTV with Chromecast, and a Locke essentials kit.
neighborhood_overview: Close to the city centre. Natural beauty nearby – River Isar, the ecological pool Maria Einsiedel and the Bavarian Alps.

name: 2 room Studio, newly renovated, Altperlach
description:
This beautifully renovated 2 room flat has loads of character. The location on Pfanzeltplatz, next to the bubbling stream and maypole has a small town feel, but is not far from the center of Munich, with easy access to downtown, the trade fair, airport and mountains.
- Bus 55 to Train station east (Ostbahnhof) stops 2 minutes from house
- S7 connection is 10 minute walk away
- A8 highway to Austria

name: Moderne 3 Zimmer Wohnung mit Dachgarten
description:
Quiet and extremely cozy 85 square meter oasis in the south of Munich including everything you could ever need. This new apartment has 2 bedrooms and a living room, kitchen, balcony and access to a roof garden.
Also: two home office workplaces, a washing machine, bathtub, dishwasher, an espresso machine, Netflix access...
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is located in a residential area with many beautiful shopping opportunities, such as REWE, DM....A burger restaurant and two Asian restaurants are also a 5-minute walk away. There is a lot of nature in the area (Südpark, Forstenrieder Park) and yet you can reach Marienplatz in 15 minutes by subway (U3 Machtlfingerstraße).

name: Sunny & stylish flat near Engl. Garten & U6, 66 qm

My apartment is furnished with a lot of love and carefully. Comfortably warm due to underfloor heating. Great location between engl. Garden, Münchner Freiheit and pub district (both 7 min walk) and 100m from a subway U6,: 10 min. to the center and 15 min
to the main train station or out of town directly to the Allianzarena (30 min) or TUM.

Large balcony, bright and sunny, spacious hallway, living room, bathroom with window, bathtub, toilet, 2 sinks, kitchen,bedroom and guest toilet

Elevator.

neighborhood_overview: Away from the hustle and bustle of the city, you'll be located in Au-Haidhausen- a friendly residential area. Au-Haidhausen offers something different from the rest of Munich; authenticity and a strong sense of community of which you'll become a part. While there are plenty of cultural activities, cosy cafes, and international restaurants, you also have a vibrant and dynamic nightlife. Kultfabric and Optimolwerke are the most famous places around here, with Kultfabrik being one of the largest party zones in Europe (25 diverse nightclubs in this area). There are hundreds of things to do here and if you fancy branching out, the English Garden, Allianz Arena, and the Hofbräuhaus are only a few minutes away by tram! With plenty of transportation options, you can get anywhere anytime.

The cozy designer apartment is located within walking distance of Olympiapark/BMW Welt and not far from the center.
You will sleep in a comfortable designer bed and can prepare an exquisite espresso in the well-equipped kitchen in the morning.
Hope you will feel at home!
Important: You will share the apartment with my two longhair cats, which will be taken care of by you. They are very sweet, cuddly and uncomplicated, proper velvet paws.
neighborhood_overview: Very close is the famous Olympiapark and the museum "BMW Welt". The center is not too far away. The apartment is located in "Schwabing West", a popular district in Munich.

name: Idyllisches Haus in Nymphenburg
description:
Welcome in our charming house in the heart of Neuhausen-Nymphenburg! This quiet yet centrally located property offers the perfect retreat for up to 5 people. Ideal location for the Adele concert in August or Oktoberfest in September/October.
Listing highlights:
- Sleeps up to 5 people
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Cozy living and dining room
- Basement with washing machine and dryer
- 2 bathrooms
- Flipper
- Comfortable garden with grill
- Balcony

name: Moderne 2-Zimmer-Wohnung mit großer Küche
description: Relax in our two-room apartment. In all rooms is oak parquet flooring. Kitchen is 4 years old and our bathroom was renovated to a high standard in 2020. Also the rest of the apartment was completely renovated a few years ago. We have a 20 sqm terrace in the courtyard. The apartment is also very quiet, you don't hear anything from the city. In the afternoon, a lot of sun comes in.
neighborhood_overview: The location is very central due to the direct connection to the subway (U3/U6), you are in 5 minutes' drive to Marienplatz. A further advantage are the many supermarkets right on the doorstep: Penny, Edeka, a Turkish shop and Asia market. But the organic baker Neulinger is also around the corner.

name: Lovely and cosy apartment in the heart of Munich
description:
Newly rennovated apartment near Isator in the heart of the historic center of Munich: 2 minutes to Isartor, 10 minutes to Marienplatz and 5 minutes to the ISAR river and "Deutsches museum". You can't get more central :).

You have a perfect access to public transportation: Local trains depart 2mins away from the apartment (it will take less than 15min to go to Oktoberfest) and all subway lines are within reach (max. 8mins).

name: Helles, modernes 56qm-Apartment in zentraler Lage
description:
<< No Smokers >>

I also live in the apartment myself, but I travel often for work. So it may also be that you have the apartment all to yourself. When I get there, I sleep on the couch in the living room. So the room is completely yours >>

Supermarket outside the door, Nymphenburg Castle around the corner, only 15 minutes to Marienplatz. In addition, a peaceful environment with a lot of nature. This home offers all the need for a perfect Munich experience.

name: Lovely, bright Room in a top spot
description: Situated right next to Englischer Garten, and a Sports Club, enjoy this tranquil private room (shared living spaces) and discover Munich from the best area!

name: Serviced Business-Apartment downtown Munich
description: Our BUSINESS apartment as your space to feel good! The myMINGA currently has a total of 60 rooms and 40 apartments ranging in size from 12 to 30 square meters. Stylishly furnished, without kitsch and without a lot of frills, but with original Munich esprit, a touch of Mediterranean flair and a consistently high quality standard. - Apartment with kitchenette - approx. 25-30 sqm - bed size 180x200 cm, NEW We-wash lounge in the house!

name: Wohnung in München Schwabing
description: From this centrally located accommodation, you are in all important places in no time at all.

name: Lovely room in heart of Munich
description:
Apartment is located between Nympenburg Palace and Hirschgarten (beer garden) with super transportation you can experience Munich with ease.
My family enjoy welcoming tourists and looking forward to having you as our guest.

name: Helle zentrale Wohnung mit großem Balkon
description: Many beautiful restaurants, bars are within walking distance and also in the city center you are very fast. The Central Train Station is just 3 metro stations away. The apartment has a spacious kitchen, a bedroom with large bed, a study with fold-out couch for 2 people, a modern renovated bathroom and separate toilet and a large living/dining room. Also on the south balcony you can both eat and lie in the sun. The house has an elevator.

name: Moderne CityWohnung nahe Theresienwiese & Westpark
description: Very nicely furnished apartment with a special location between the Westpark and the Theresienwiese with direct connection to bus, U-Bahn, S-Bahn to the Theresienwiese, to the city or the mountains.  Several restaurants and beer gardens are within walking distance.
neighborhood_overview: You can walk to Westpark, Theresienwiese and the city center. If you are a fan of public transport, in addition to the bus, S-Bahn and U-Bahn, the BOB departs from the front door to the mountains.

name: Lovely 1 bedroom apartment next to Oktoberfest
description:
Two subways station to the main part of town Marienplatz (10min )

2 min walking to Oktoberfest (100 m away)

Very central and located in an amazing neighbourhood
neighborhood_overview: Near bakeries and supermarkets and very safe

name: Lichtdurchflutete Wohnung mit sonnigem Balkon
description:
My beautiful apartment is quietly located in the countryside, a few minutes walk from the Isarauen. On the 4th floor (with elevator).
It is stylishly furnished and has a semi-circular sunny balcony with a table, two chairs and a lounger.
neighborhood_overview: There is a very beautiful and large climbing hall with exterior walls 3 min walk from here. Also a natural swimming pool. Various restaurants, cafes...

name: Sonniges Balkonzimmer mit Blick ins Grüne
description:
Offered is a quiet room on the 2nd floor of a house with a garden in the elegant district of Solln.

The tastefully furnished room has a 160 x 200 cm sofa bed with a continuous mattress, a wardrobe, a small workstation, sideboard and a balcony.

The room is located together with the other guest room on a separate floor. The modern bathroom with shower is available for both guest rooms.
neighborhood_overview: Solln is a quiet and yet conveniently located area with lots of greenery and near the Isar. From here you can go on bike rides, walks and hikes, take the train or car to the mountains, discover the Munich beer gardens or comfortably get to the city center by bus and train.

name: Schönes helles Zimmer in München
description:
16 sqm bright room in a two-room apartment It's perfect for a city trip to Munich, and it's centrally located, you have a central direct connection to Tram, subway, shopping right around the corner. Many restaurant parks near 10 minutes from the English garden.

The place is a good start to discover in Munich and look into the sky in the kitchen in the kitchen from the window.

name: Top View over the City, modern 1-Room Studio
description:
With this unique home, all the important points of contact are close by, making it easy to plan your stay.
With a breathtaking view from the 12th floor as well as the evening sunset, it will always be a memory to remember.

Riverside to Munich Freedom, the Olympic Park or the BMW Welt are also located in a top location in Munich.
neighborhood_overview: House with many parties and everything within walking distance

name: Schöne Wohlfühloase in Milbertshofen
description: I rent my modern furnished 2-room apartment with good access to the city (U2 about 7 minutes walk). The apartment has a spacious and comfortable bedroom, living room with sofa bed, large kitchen to conjure up a delicious meal as well as the bathroom and a balcony with evening sun and a beautiful view!! 😊A real highlight.

name: Stylish Studio Apartment in Central Munich
description: This stylish Studio Apartment is situated in Munich's city center, very close to Marienplatz, Viktualienmarkt, Maximilianstrasse & the Oktoberfest is only 15 min away. Surrounded by many restaurants and bars in walking distance. The studio was designed and renovated with a loving hand and a love for the fine things in life, so you get plenty of amenities and high standards. The place is perfect for two people (and one child). Easy to reach from the airport in just 35min.
neighborhood_overview: Very young and stylish area in central Munich with lots of restaurants, wine bars, shops. The Deutsche Museum is just around the corner.

name: Comfy studio between airport and city. Easy access
description:
Relax with partner or with the whole family (up to 4) at this peaceful place. Additional sofa bed available.
400m to the train station with quick access to the city and airport.

Have fun with the whole family at this stylish place.

The flat is perfect for families or a group of people, who want to discover & enjoy Munich

You can reach the flat easiely from the main station and the airport.

You can spend time there together, cook and relax!
neighborhood_overview:
Right next door are several shopping facilities (supermarkets) for everyday needs.
Right next door there are several shops (supermarkets) for daily needs.

Pack your suitcase, move in, and feel good! Enjoy a unique flair in the modern design house.
-Top fully equipped kitchen with branded appliances
-2 bathrooms with rain showers
-3 bedrooms
-4 beds + sofa bed in living area
Metro just around the corner, art area (Pinakotheken) nearby, downtown reachable in 10 min. The apartment location offers an ideal mix of hip bars, shops, galleries, restaurants

name: 5 minutes from the city center, a cozy big room
description:
Cozy, well-kept room in a warm and friendly flat right in the heart of Munich!
Located on a main road with everything you need just steps away — metro, shops, cafés, and more. Perfect for exploring the city or relaxing after a busy day. Feel at home, enjoy the comfy vibes, and make the most of your stay in Munich!

name: Gemütliches Haus mit Garten in München-Harlaching
description: The semi-detached house is very quietly located in a side street of Munich-Harlaching very close to the Perlacher Forst. We have three children ourselves (0 + 4 + 6 years old) so the house is very child-friendly and equipped with a high chair, children's rooms and toys but also adult guests can feel comfortable here. The house has a 300m2 garden with terrace and seating.
neighborhood_overview: The house is very quietly located directly on the Perlacher Forst and yet within walking distance of the tram, bus and shopping facilities such as a bakery and supermarket. The garden is all around and gives you so much privacy.

name: Stunning Designer Flat / Apartment with Terrace
description:
This centrally located flat is a great choice for your weekend getaway in Munich. Just 2 minutes from the U-Bahn, and within walking distance of numerous cafes & bars, it's the perfect homebase.

Enjoy the large communal spaces (living room, lounge room, terrace) with their stunning interior design, perfect for dinners or sundowners.

name: Urban Pine Flat | home & business (VAT)
description:
Hello, everyone!

We, Verena, Caro & Max, offer you a fantastic apartment in the heart of Munich with a wonderful view of the green courtyard. The apartment is south/west facing, with a dreamy little balcony under the canopy of an old chestnut tree.
neighborhood_overview: The area is a trendy district in Munich. You will not be bored here. Whether sights, leisure activities or nightlife - Schwabing leaves nothing to be desired. Around the apartment there are many excellent restaurants and bars. Also cultural offers are unique in our district for Munich. You are in the middle of the university district. Alte, Neue Pinakothek, Pinakothek der Moderne and the Brandhorst Museum are just a few examples. My tip: On Sundays the entrance fee is only 1 Euro!

name: Central Luxury Loft 160qm
description:
In an absolutely central location between Viktualienmarkt and Gärtnerplatz, quietly located in a rear courtyard with private terrace, the spacious and luxuriously equipped first floor loft offers a hideaway in the city center.
A special place for something very special.
Creative work!
• 3.20 m ceiling height,
• 3 rooms with beds 200 x 200 cm, 160 x 200, 140 x 200 and large open living room
• 2 bathrooms
• Open living and creative space, Poggenpohl kitchen
The 3rd room is in the basement/wellness area.

name: Helle moderne Maisonette Wohnung, 45qm Dachterasse
description: This special place offers guests the perfect place to work and/ or relax. The 85 sqm apartment stretches over the first and second floor and with its 45 sqm roof terrace is perfect for  summer connoisseurs. Private underground parking is included.
neighborhood_overview: The neighbors are quiet and nice.

name: Double Studio in a Co-Living Building
description:
This cozy double studio apartment is located within a modern building, with gorgeous architectural details. Bright, open, and modern, the complex boasts an inviting vibe without forgetting comfort. This is the ideal base for experiencing Munich - a great starting point to explore the rest of the city and its many hidden spots: in 18 min you can be at München Central Station (Hauptbahnhof).
The building includes a 24h concierge, gym – with a view as well as underground car parking.

name: Wohnung in München mit guter Lage und Balkon
description: The apartment is on the 2nd floor and is isolated from the noise of the street despite its central location. Large windows and the balcony bring a lot of light into the apartment. In the living room there is a large dining table and the kitchen is equipped with an oven, stovetop, dishwasher and some more. In the bathroom there is also a washing machine. The apartment is a 3-4 minute walk from the metro.
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is located in the lively Neuhausen district not far from the city centre. There are some beautiful restaurants and cafés right on the street. Several shopping facilities are within a 5-10 minute walk. To Marienplatz it is with the public 10-15 minutes/walk about 30.
The Olympic Park, Nymphenburg Castle and the Theresienwiese are all within walking distance or easily accessible by public transport. With the subway it is 8 minutes to the Oktoberfest.

name: Loft am Olympiapark I ca. 100 qm Industrial Style
description:
Quiet industrial style design apartment with plenty of space directly on the Olympic Park.
Highlights: lounge-living room, open kitchen, cool bathroom with bathtub & shower, fitness area,
Chill terrace etc.
Tram stop Heideckstraße, a few minutes from the town centre.
I usually live on the apartment. You have the apartment for you, of course. If I'm not around, I rent out.

An underground parking space is available and can be booked for 7€ day/optionally.

name: Apartment with beautiful terrace near city center
description:
Generous apartment with beautiful terrace near to Munich city center, underground station Josephsplatz and bus Görresstrasse (3 metro stations to the central station and 4 to Sendlinger Tor, direct bus to Odeonsplaz, on foot 10-15 minutes to Olympia Park, 20 minutes to Königsplatz and to the most important art galleries, 40 minutes to Marienplatz).
Supermarkets, drugstores and another shops close to the flat, several playgrounds and nices restaurants.

name: Stilvolles Apartment im Münchner Süden
description:
Beautiful condo in the south of Munich. Quiet and stylish - perfect for couples.
Close to the Isar and many great natural attractions.
25 min to the Theresienwiese/ Oktoberfest
neighborhood_overview: Quiet location - close to the Isar - supermarket in 5 minutes walking distance

name: Lovely apartment in Munich
description:
Lovely apartament in Munich.
10 min away from the city center, 2 minutes walk to the subway station.
In the near there are farmacys and lots of supermarkets. There is as well a lot of options to eat outside and the Isar river is 8 min by foot.
If you have any questions, please don’t doubt to write me! Looking forward to be your host.

name: Schönes ruhiges Zimmer mit Gartenblick
description: In a very exclusive residential area you can relax. Within walking distance you can reach the Perlacher Forst, as well as the Isar, where you can stroll. Public transport such as bus or tram is only 7 minutes away. Some eateries can also be reached on foot for going out.

name: cozy room in Munich
description:
Cozy and quiet room in a 3-bedroom apartment near Südpark. 3 minutes away from the front door is the Forstenrieder Allee subway stop, which takes you to Marienplatz in 15 minutes. The apartment has washing machine, Wi-Fi and parking.

The apartment is located on the 4th floor. An elevator is available. Everything you need to live is available in the apartment. There is a fully equipped kitchen as well as supermarkets right outside.

name: great townhouse / near city/ oktoberfest

Spacious house (120m2) with 3 bedrooms, additional living and dining room, kitchen, bathroom and guest toilet //
Have a good time with your family or friends in our beautiful, quiet house with a great garden! By subway you are in 15 minutes directly at the Oktoberfest and in the city center with its very broad offer! The beautiful Starnberger See is only 15 minutes away by car. In the garden you can have a barbecue and relax - e.g. on our hammock!
important: no parties!
neighborhood_overview: Munich City, Oktoberfest, Starnberger See, U-Bahn

name: Zen + coolest location (Viktualienmarkt)
description: Very beautiful living space, quiet in the absolute center of Munich overlooking the Viktualienmarkt.  Spacious apart. on the second floor with 2 bathrooms, a balcony, no TV,  a basic but very homy kitchen space & a zen bedroom only holding one double bed facing the quiet back of the building + one extra kind of empty yoga room  with a new murphy double bed & absolute everything you might need right accross the street .... Strong & reliable wifi ! enjOy

name: luxury apartment munich City
description: Keep it simple at this peaceful and centrally-located place.

name: Heimelige Wohnung in Münchens hippen Westend!
description: Enjoy the German Vita at this quiet and centrally located accommodation just a 5-minute walk from the Theresienwiese. The Westend  is now considered to be one of Munich's most popular and trendiest districts. With its colorful houses, with the little boazn (Munich pubs), and the malt smell that passes over from the Augustinian brewery, the relaxed Bavarian gem is mixed with a lively student scene, which is reflected in a unique gastronomic scene.

name: Schöne Wohnung im Münchner Süden
description: From this centrally located home, you'll be in all the important places in no time.

name: Munich Olschewskibogen | Single Suite
description: At limehome, we believe that everyone deserves a better place while traveling. A place to look forward to return to. A place designed to stay®. Whether you are looking for a home away from home or a quiet place to work - our apartments feature high-quality fittings including a premium hotel bed for restful nights & suite dreams. Our digital-enabled guest journey without a physical reception and staff on-site makes your stay more convenient.
neighborhood_overview: Our limehome Munich Olschewskibogen is located north of Munich's city center and is only a leap away from the Olympic Park. There you can not only go for a walk, but also do some excellent sports. If you prefer to take it easy, you can make yourself comfortable in one of the cozy cafés in the city center. You can get there within 20 minutes by public transport. The main train station and the airport are also within easy reach.

name: Wunderschönes Zimmer zentral mit eigenem Bad
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally located property only 2 minutes away from Central Station. Private bathroom with shower and fully equipped kitchen is at your disposal.
The apartment is located on the 4th floor without an elevator.

name: Wohnung an der Theresienwiese
description:
Welcome to my cozy and bright 2 room apartment directly at the Munich Octoberfest. In the middle of Munich's smallest neighborhood, the Westend, you will find many nice restaurants, cute bars and small stores. Shopping facilities are even directly across the street. The tram, city train and metro are also right around the corner.

In my apartment you will find a fully equipped kitchen, a living room with desk and a couch corner with beamer (TV) and a nice spacious bedroom plus a balcony.
neighborhood_overview: Not sure if you have been in Munich before but from my place you can reach a lot of things by feet. Main train station is about 10mins by feet away, city center is about 20mins by feet away. Isar river is also about 15-20mins by feet. Westpark (best for autumn walks) is about 20mins by feet as well. There is also a big shopping center right on the other side of the street which has supermarkets, clothing stores, cafes and bistros and more. In the same street walking to the west, there are quite some restaurants and cafes. I can really recommend Bean Batter (for cafe and breakfast) togather (cafe and breakfast), Das Kulinariat (for dinner), Schwarzer Dackel (for drinks), Punto Gelato (for icecream) and Zur Schwalbe (for lunch and dinner).

name: Business Appartement in Top Lage
description:
The perfect living solution
for everyone who needs a temporary home. The building, with its
unusual architecture and dynamic design language, includes 231
fully furnished apartments with a loggia, which have
an integrated kitchenette. There is a coffee shop on the
ground floor.

name: 3 Privatzimmer in Schwabing-West
description:
Hello and welcome to my cozy and central 4-room apartment. I ask for up to 7 sleeping places in 3 rooms.
The Hohenzollernplatz U-Bahn [subway] station is a 3-4 minute walk away! The bus and tram Nordbad stop are 2 minutes away. The main train station is only 5 minutes from Hohenzollernplatz by U-Bahn [subway].

Many cafes, restaurants and bars and everything you need for your everyday life are in the immediate vicinity.

Common areas are shared only with me and no other guests.
neighborhood_overview:
West Schwabing / Maxvorstadt

Quiet and central neighborhood near U-Bahn [subway], bus and tram, as well as all shops for everyday life, cafes, restaurants and bars.

name: Lovely Studio Apartment Close To City Center
description: The apartment is located in calm area with walking distance (10 min) to East Station (Ost Bahnhof), where you can find a nice area with a lot of restaurants, cafes, bars and shops. From East Station (Ost Bahnhof), you can get everywhere very easily by S-Bahn or U-Bahn as it is one of main and big stations in Munich. From East Station (Ost Bahnhof), by S-Bahn or U-Bahn you are in 4-5 min (3 stations only) in Marienplatz, which is official center of the town.

name: Familiyfriendly condo 10min from city centre
description: This 95 m² 2 bedroom condo is located 10 mins from Munich central station. You can either reach it easily via bus, S-Bahn or subway or park your car for free along the street. Supermarkets and other stores as well as parks, playgrounds, beergardens and restaurants are everywhere within walking distance.
neighborhood_overview: We have been living in the apartment for a long time and know most of the neighbors in the house. If any problems arise, someone can always help.

name: Luxuriöses Loft mit großer Sonnenterrasse & Sauna
description:
This exclusive luxury loft is located right in the heart of Schwabing. All attractions are in the immediate vicinity.
English Garden, Oktoberfest, Marienplatz, airport, restaurants and trendy pubs, such as the cult pub Pils-Doktor, which is located in the same house.

Fully equipped kitchen, bedroom, separate toilet,
Living room, 70 m² terrace.

A staircase leads to the basement, with another bedroom. Here you will find the spacious wellness bathroom with sauna
neighborhood_overview: Schwabing is an artists' quarter. A special place. Going out, restaurants, shopping, English Garden, you can't do any better. Everything is within walking distance from here.

name: Gemütlich, stylish, voll ausgestattet mit Balkon
description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish and cozy space with a balcony and everything you need. It is even cleaned once a week for you, if you wish. Located directly on the subway, you are in 20 minutes at Marienplatz or on Theresienwiese for Oktoberfest. The nearest supermarket is only 1 minute away. It is 45 minutes by car to Garmisch in the mountains. You have forest and meadows right in front of the house for cycling or walking.

name: Wunderschöne 1 Zimmerewohnung

name: Atelier & Garden House > peaceful & artsy Glamping
description: This peaceful Garden House and artsy Atelier is a special space to relax, read, meditate, make yoga, make art or work. It is a simple place surrounded by green gardens. It is an individual place, that stays in your remembrance. It is quiet, except the bird sounds surrounding you. The perfect retreat from daily life or the busy city life. Additional your hosts are there for you,  just on the other side of the garden. Here you also find the common areas including shared kitchen&bathroom. Pure Joy!

name: 1-Zimmer Apartment in Ruhige Lage
description: Relax in this special and quiet place to stay. From Aidenbachstraße U-Bahn U3 only 7 min walk and to bus 3 minutes

name: Lovely 1-bed flat in the ❤️ of Munich

Welcome to your Munich getaway — with direct Oktoberfest connection!

This stylish studio in Au is ideal for business trips. It is located in Au, one of the city’s most vibrant districts. Cafés, restaurants, and the Isar River with its parks are just 5-min walk away — perfect for runs, sunbathing, or a morning stroll.

Heading to Oktoberfest? A direct tram takes you there in minutes. Ideal for 1–2 guests, the studio offers a cozy bed, smart layout, and all the essentials for a comfortable stay.

name: Schöne gemütliche und helle Wohnung.
description: Make yourself comfortable in this bright and spacious attic apartment not far from the center. Bus stops right in front of the house. Fitted kitchen, bright bathroom with bathtub, washing machine, two Norwegian forest cats.

name: Schönes Privatzimmer / Nice Private Room

My centrally located guest room can accommodate 2 people (with air mattress 3 people possible) and is perfect for visiting the Oktoberfest (approx. 12 min taxi, 25 min bus direct connection).

The remaining areas of the apartment (bathroom, living room, kitchen & balcony) are shared if I should also be at home.

Location (by walk):
Leonrodplatz stop: 2 minutes
Olympiapark: 15 min
Rossmann and Edeka Express: 2 minutes

I look forward to likeable guests! :-)

name: Cosy Bedroom in Munich Sendling Apartment
description:
1 private bedroom with 1 NEW bed with innerspring matress and 1 sofa. Ideally located in München Sendling.

The bedroom is private to the guest who rents it. Another 1 Person can sleep in the room for an extra cost indicated on the platform.
Quiet neighbourhood & bedroom.
Shared bathroom with the owner accessibile 24/7.
Part-time access to the kitchen (8 AM-11PM).

Towels, bedsheets, amenities, coffee and tea are provided.

Experienced host, love to greet people from all over the world.
neighborhood_overview:
Typical Munich neighbourhood of the south east of the city.
The aera was created at the end of the 19th century and is one of the rare spots in Munich that has not been destroyed.

name: 2,5 Zimmer Wohnung 5 Pers. München Zentrum Langz.
description:
Newly renovated and remodeled.
The apartment is located in Isarvorstadt/Lundwigsvorstadt - Isarvorstadt - Munich's most multicultural district. The apartment is on the 6th floor in the back building of the apartment building.
It is fully equipped for up to 5 people. Towels and bed linens are provided.
There are about 49 square meters of space available here. The apartment is newly renovated and furnished. 1 bedroom for 4 people. 1 living room with sofa bed. Space for 2 people. Separate kitchen.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is a 7-minute walk from Munich central train station. From there you have access to the S-Bahn, U-Bahn, tram, bus and all long-distance trains. You can walk to the LMU, Munich's lalrgest clinic, and the university district in 5 minutes. You will stay in Munich's most multicultural district. All nationalities move about on the streets and here in the house, too. If you have a problem with different cultures, think carefully about making a booking in our apartment building and do not rate us negatively for it in the review afterwards. It is the train station district, and among locals it is also called the Arab Quarter.

The wealthy Glockenbachviertel is considered the center of Munich's gay scene. In the trendy bars and nightclubs, there is a lot of activity until the early hours. Local attractions include the Gender Temple with same-sex pedestrian couples and the State Theatre at Gärtnerplatz. In addition, there are boutiques, galleries and an art museum. The church of St. Maximilian offers views on the Isar.

In our area of the side street, there are mainly two-story single-family and multi-family houses with large gardens and approx. 50 meters away is the first park with a playground. The next two parks with playgrounds are about a 6-8 minute walk.

In Munich, in addition to many museums, there is also an old Art Nouveau swimming pool and an Art Nouveau sauna in it. This is the Müllersche Volksbad.

For smaller children, a department in the basement of the Deutsches Museum is particularly suitable and for schoolchildren the museum "Man and Nature" in the right wing of the castle "Nymphenburg." To the left of the castle with its castle park is the botanical garden. You can also drive there by car because there are many parking options.

Around Marienplatz are the legal library in the town hall (in Art Nouveau style; only open for viewing from 3:50 pm to 4:00 pm), the "Münchner Hofbräuhaus," the "Münchner Biermuseum," the Viktualienmarkt, the climbable church t

description:
Our cozy apartment for up to 4 guests (2 on a bed, 2 on a sofa bed) is in the center of Munich, just a few minutes on foot to the Old Town, Marienplatz and loads of shopping and cultural points of interest.
The apartment is in the beautiful neighborhood of Lehel on a quiet side street offering great comfort in a refurbished apartment with a new bathroom, a fully equipped kitchenette, all bed linens, towels, household appliances, Internet, new mattresses & a Smart-TV.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood Lehel is located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sit in the sun on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße, a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. It can get lively in the evenings in summer when the windows are open!

You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern bar/restaurant called Frex and the bar/restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is an institution in Munich's bar scene.

name: Loft-Dachterrassen-Wohnung
description:
The furnished exclusive loft roof terrace apartment in the Gärtnerplatz district is offered. It is completely quiet and hidden in the second backyard as a small townhouse. Here you will stay in the heart of Munich within walking distance of 2 minutes to the Isar and 5 minutes to the Viktualienmarkt.
This pearl is a living dream for couples due to its loft character.
The spacious roof terrace with 38m2 is a highlight of the apartment.
neighborhood_overview:
The Gärtnerplatz district is the best place to be in Munich. No wonder that Freddie Mercury also liked to come here to celebrate: colorful, creative, stylish and historic at the same time. The Gärtnerplatz is a 2-minute walk from the apartment and invites you to enjoy a breakfast capucino or an after-work beer. Iconic and quaint pubs are part of the tradition here. The Viktualienmarkt is a 6-minute walk away and Marienplatz is an 8-minute walk from the apartment.
If you like to go jogging early in the morning or enjoy a beer in the evening in nature by the water: The Isar flows directly parallel to Baaderstr.19 :-)

name: Sporty Fit: Maisonette with training mirror
description: Above the roofs of Munich in the district of Gern: our maisonettes with fully equipped kitchen and own living, dining and home office area including free high-speed wifi are located in the green and directly at the Olympic Park. In the living area there is also a modern training mirror, which offers fitness enthusiasts over 300 workouts from different areas.
neighborhood_overview: We are right in the middle of one of the most popular residential areas of the city: in Nymphenburg, Neuhausen and Gern free living space is hotly sought after, because here it is incredibly beautiful and very green: from the hotel you are in a few minutes walk directly in the Olympic area with its many sports, leisure and sightseeing opportunities such as Sea World, BMW Museum, the TV tower, the ice rink and the large weekend flea market. Just as quickly, you can walk to the Dante Stadium, which also has its winter outdoor swimming pool open during the cold season, or to the Taxispark and the associated Taxis beer garden: a real highlight, especially in the summer. For coffee and cake connoisseurs, we recommend the insider tip Café Tribeca at the end of the street. An extra plus point is the proximity to Nymphenburg Palace with its parks, the two driveways and the canal, the best place in town for curling or ice skating in winter.

name: Stylische Wohnung in Top Lage
description:
We rent our modern, spacious apartment right in the heart of Schwabing/Maxvorstadt.
The in the rear building on the ground floor, fully furnished apartment is despite the ingenious central location super quiet.
neighborhood_overview: The English Garden is only a 10-minute walk away. The surfers at the Eisbachwelle can be found on the way there.  In the neighborhood is everything you need: great cafes, restaurants, shops and boutiques (which make the shopping heart beat faster ;-) The art area with the Pinakotheken and Museum Brandhorst are within a 5-minute walk. You can walk to Odeonsplatz in 5 minutes... Both the TU and LMU are extremely close on foot.

name: Lovely Room - close to center/ Glockenbach
description:
Hi, welcome to my apartment.
I live in a quiet area but close to the center (around 12min walk) and scenic "Glockenbach" area with lots of stylish bars, restaurants and shops.
In front of my house is a very beautyful old historic cementary used like a park.
In September and Oktober you can visit the Oktoberfest also by feet around 15min walk.
Car parking is possible (depends on the time) in the street for a parking fee ( around 15€/day - 2023)
neighborhood_overview:
We live opposite of an old cemetery that is lovely to visit and talk a walk.

By a walk of 10 minutes you are already in the heart of Munich central City.
Also lots of Bars, restaurants and cafes close by.

name: 6 bedroom Townhouse (1910) garden, 2 terraces
description:
The old family home of our great grandparents offers plenty of space for groups of up to 11 guests who want to spend time together in one house.

Six bedrooms, two living rooms, kitchen and dining room, 2 terraces and the large garden spread out over 3 stories.

Located right next to the subway stop, you reach Marienplatz in 6 minutes, the Allianz Arena in 12 and the Oktoberfest in 15 minutes

By foot it's just a couple of minutes walk to the Englischer Garten.

name: Idyllische 2-Zimmer Wohnung
description: The apartment is very quietly located in the east of Munich and yet all the important shops are within a 5-minute walk.  The apartment is also close to the Riem trade fair. You can relax here with the whole family. You have a terrace and access to the garden. There is a trampoline and space to play soccer.
neighborhood_overview: Edeka supermarket (350 m), Kreitmaier pastry shop (550 m), Bavarian restaurant Truderinger Waldwirtschaft (290 m), Italian restaurant Il Cortile (230 m), Greek restaurant Thalassa (850 m), Indian restaurant Guru (1 km).

name: 2 min Fußweg zum Oktoberfest
description:
5 minutes' walk to Oktoberfest!

Our cozy apartment is only 3 subway stations away from Marienplatz (5min) and you are within 8 minutes at Maxvorstadt.

The apartment has a bedroom with a large double bed and a large and open living and dining area. One mattress and the couch in the living room offer another 3 more beds.

In a 5-minute walk, you will be in Aldi, Edeka and Rewe and the subway "Poccistraße", you will see directly from the window.

name: 1.-Zi.-App mit TOP Infrastruktur
description: Kick back and relax in this quiet, stylish space. The apartment with far-reaching views over the city offers a very cozy accommodation and is equipped with everything you need for everyday needs. The flat is extremely well located. The Olympia Shopping Center is directly accessible. Here you can enjoy the shopping. The infrastructure is particularly good. The U-Bahn is only a 3-minute walk away. Looking forward to seeing you.

neighborhood_overview: Isartor, Deutsches Museum, Gärtnerplatz

7 min U6/U3 Goetheplatz

The apartment is very well equipped and has the best brands such as Miele, Who's Perfect, Jonathan Adler, Cocoon, Böhmler, Cassina. There is a large bedroom with a bed and TV with Netflix and a living room with a couch and TV. So, it can accommodate up to 2 people.
A great location with bakery and restaurant opposite and tram 3 min walk which only takes 5 min to Stachus.

It contains everything you need because my daughter and I usually live  here. On holidays we travel a lot , so we hope you’ll enjoy your stay.

description:
Peaceful and centrally-located flat in Munich, with a separate kitchen and a clean well renovated bathroom. A warm comfortable place with a nice view over the modern neighborhood. The place is equipped with everything you need to have a comfortable stay.

Located inside Munich, the flat is 7 minutes away from the nearest U-Bahn and Sbahn station, from where you can reach the city center in 15 mins.
Just next to the residence, are supermarkets, and cafés in the immediate vicinity.
neighborhood_overview: Clean and spacious neighborhood, containing many shops and facilities. A supermarket and drug store are immediately next to the building, as well as cafes in the immediate vicinity.

neighborhood_overview: Our apartment is in the immediate vicinity of the historic Olympic Park and the beautiful Luitpoldpark in the heart of Schwabing. From here you have the opportunity to explore nice cafes, Bavarian and international restaurants. If you are in the mood for a small sightseeing tour, you can explore everything by bike or train starting with the Olympic Tower, the BMW world to Marienplatz.

All connections can be found within a 6-minute walk at Ostbahnhof (U-Bahn [subway], S-Bahn [suburban train], tram and bus connections).
The city center is only 2 km away.
In 25 minutes, you can be at the airport by S-Bahn [suburban train]/car.
You are perfectly located to see the best of Munich.

Shopping is within walking distance, such as Lidl
neighborhood_overview: Nearby are Feldmochinger See and Lerchenauer See

NO CHILDREN (aged 1 to 10 years)!
Beautiful, centrally located, quiet, absolutely cozy, modern and practical 3 room apartment with shower room (incl. WC) on the ground floor.
The apartment is lovingly furnished and fully equipped, very centrally located (only 20 yards to the nearest streetcar stop and 1/4h to the main train station) and is located in the heart of Bogenhausen - the most noble district of Munich - very close to the Isar, between Chinese Tower and Friedensengel.

Stay the Night where you feel Home instead of boring Hotel rooms.
Perfect for work travelers or short vacation... The right place for your "Me Time", Couple stay and Families are also welcome (extra fees).
Beautifull and very calm location at the lerchenauer see surrounded by green Parks with an amazing italian Restaurant right next door.
5-15min walk to Supermarket, Shopping Center, 24/7 Gaz Station & liquor store...
15-25min to the City Center. 40 min to oktoberfest. Free Parking.
neighborhood_overview: Calm & Beautifull neighbourhood. Green fields and Parks. By the Lerchenauer see. Near to Supermarket, Bank, Cafe, Bakery, Restaurant, Bar...

You will rent out a separate bedroom (lockable) with a spacious & luxurious 180x200 bed and share the kitchen and bathroom with me. The bedroom fits 2 people comfortably and you will have 1 wardrobe for yourself. You can use all the available things in the kitchen, so please feel at home.

The overall flat is rather small, however, I’ll give you as much privacy as possible.

Please give me some background info on your stay/trip. Thank you.

I’m case of questions just text me.

The subway station Milbertshofen (U2) is within 5 minutes walking distance.

The generously cut, light-flooded attic apartment offers a cozy living atmosphere. Two separate sleeping rooms. Open kitchen with dishwasher and access to the living room forms the center. The separate sleeping room can be used as office with screen and printer.
The bedroom is furnished with a large double bed and offers a cozy stars-atmosphere. Behind the house you will find a car parking space and two very old bicycles for you. 20 minutes from central station by bus and metro.

description:
The nice and bright apartment is located in one of Munichs most attractive neighborhoods. It has everything you need for a perfect stay, kitchen and balcony. It is only 2 minutes away from the underground station Bonner Platz. Most sites in the city can be reached within 15mins. It is also possible to reach most attractions by bike.
The next supermarket is only 2 min away.
A lot of restaurants, bars and shops are reachable with a little walk, within 5-10mins.

name: Stilvolle Wohnung mit schönem Innenhof
description:
Sit back and enjoy your stay in the stylish apartment.

Messe München is a few minutes by car from the apartment.

The bus stop (about 5 minutes) and the S-Bahn stop (about 10 minutes) are in walking distance.

In about 15 minutes you are in the city center by S-Bahn.

In the immediate vicinity is a lake that invites you to swim in the summer.

description:
The room is about 18 sqm, bright and has a window with a view of the Isar. There is a 1m wide bed, in addition we can put a double mattress on the floor.
The apartment is very spacious, there is a large kitchen with dining table, a living room with projector and a bathroom with bathtub. My partner and I live together in another room, the third room we rent from time to time, so that other guests could also be in the accommodation.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is centrally located in the three-mill district. There are numerous restaurants and bars right outside the front door, as well as swimming facilities on the Isar. The bus stop for bus 162 is also directly in front of the building, the subway station Goetheplatz is about a 10-minute walk away.

name: Ruhige Stadt-Wohnung mit Garten

The cozy and stylish apartment is located in the rear building, with views of the countryside. You are cordially invited, when we are not there ourselves, to use the living room with direct access to the south terrace and garden, the kitchen and the bathroom. In the living room, the cozy sofa bed (approx. 160 x 200) is at your disposal.
The quiet retreat is very centrally located close to the Petuelring and Milbertshofen subway stations, the Olympic Park and BMW.

name: Friendly Open Room in Munich.
description:
Hi, you are currently booking the open living room with sofa bed and I stay in another room. we will be sharing kitchen and toilet. your room is open living room with dining space included

During Winter weekdays- One hour drive to German alps (Garmish/Brauneck, etc) or 2 hours in bus trip to Austrian Alps and back on 6pm.
My personal ski set is rented with a caution deposit.
So that's it, u can reach to my place and start your ski journey.
Maps and other guidance would be shared with you.
