description:
This 120 m² loft is located in the lively district of Schwabing in the center of Munich and is easily accessible (subways, etc.) with lots of things to do in the bustling neighborhood. The maisonette include 2 bedrooms (office), a kitchen, a bathroom, a guest toilet and a spacious living and dining room with a cozy fireplace.
The 25 sqm roof terrace offers all-day sun, a perfect place for barbecues and a view of the Olympic Tower.

name: Cozy 2-Room Apartment (50qm)
description:
Welcome to our 2BR flat, only 3 mins from the subway with a direct line to Goetheplatz for Oktoberfest. Our living room is spacious with an open kitchen, balcony, and dining table. Elevator access makes life easier, and a low-clearance duplex garage spot is available. In-unit washing machine, oven, microwave, and coffee machine cover all your needs. For shopping, a mall is just a 5-minute walk away. Come make this your home away from home!

It’s my personal space, so handle with care.

name: Zu Hause in der Maxvorstadt
description:
For rent is our Munich apartment with courtyard location, which promises you peace and quiet that is best enjoyed on the loggia, but still totally central.
The residential complex is directly connected to a tram and U-Bahn [subway] station. The main train station is within walking distance.
Apartment Schmankerla are:
fully equipped kitchen + dishwasher, washing machine/dryer, iron/ironing board, a comfortable couch and a folding bed for a 3rd guest
A parking space can be booked (request)
neighborhood_overview: Very central but very quiet. The Maxvorstadt is architecturally and culturally one of Munich's most interesting districts. The ensemble of Königsplatz, Pinakotheken and Siegestor is one of the architectural highlights of the city. In addition, there are several museums, the two large universities, the Ludwig Maximilian and the Technical University. There are great little cafes and restaurants that invite you to linger. For more tips, please do not hesitate to contact us

name: 2.5 Zi Wohnung im Glockenbach

In the middle of it and yet very quiet!

Since I really live here, the apartment is well equipped and requires respectful residents.

neighborhood_overview: The apartment is located on the edge of the lively Glockenbachviertel, with many restaurants, bars, cafes and fashion shops. The great thing is that it is incredibly quiet on the outskirts and you don't notice the hustle and bustle. However, if you walk 5 minutes, you are in the middle of the most scenic district of Munich.

You’ll love the stylish decor of this charming place to stay.
The room is located in a semi-detached house basement with window, bathroom with shower. Toilet for your own use is on the first floor. There is a coffee maker, fridge, free parking in front of the house.
U-Bahn [subway] towards the city and to Messe München [Munich trade fair and events center] in about 5 minutes' walk, tram approx. 7 minutes. Travel time with U2 direction city center 10 minutes to Fraunhoferstr./Gärtnerplatz district. Travel time to Munich Fair is 5 minutes.

Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home.

2 bedroom apartment

Fully equipped kitchen

Double bed (1,60 wide)

In 300 m in the middle of the Glockenbachviertel. Between Sendlinger Tor and Goetheplatz. Walking distance to the Theresienwiese and downtown.

name: Wohnung München Ost, 4 Zimmer
description:
Forget your worries – for this spacious and quiet place to stay.
With this 4 room apartment you have the ideal starting point to explore Munich or work/study here.

Everything important is within walking distance, such as supermarket (2min), bakery (2min), Ital. Delivery service (2min), bus connection to Messestadt Riem (2min) and S-Bahn main line to the city or the airport (S8, 5min).

In a few minutes walk you are in nature, admiring horses or refreshing yourself in the creek.
neighborhood_overview: Olympia Galopprennbahn, nature reserve with stream, supermarket, bakery, S-Bahn, bus connections, kiosk, house doctors, dentist

name: Groß & zentral: Altstadt-Wohnung
description:
I offer my super centrally located 2-room apartment with over 100 square meters of living space to travelers and guests in Munich. The apartment is fully equipped and has one bedroom (queen) and a living room with large sofa bed (queen) to make your stay the best.
As a doctor, I have professional training equipment in my apartment and warmly invite you to take care of your health with a yoga session or on the spinning bike.

name: 1- Zimmer - Whg in Schwabing / Münchner Freiheit
description: I rent my beautiful, very bright and cozily furnished 1-room apartment in Schwabing with large balcony & small separate kitchen. In addition, there is a large built-in wardrobe in the hallway, which I am happy to provide you with. The apartment is located directly on the English Garden & is only a few minutes walk away from the subway station Münchner Freiheit (U3/U6), which takes you to Goetheplatz in 8 minutes. From there it is a 5 min walk to Oktoberfest.

Downtown is only 10 minutes away by public transport, yet it is super quiet. The apartment is fully equipped and the furnishings are of the best quality.
neighborhood_overview: Schwabing and the adjacent Maxvorstadt are architecturally very nice and quiet. All parks just around the corner.

name: Wohnung nähe Zentrum
description:
Welcome to my cozy and quiet 1.5 room apartment . The sunny balcony invites you to relax.

From the apartment there is a good connection to Marienplatz in 15 minutes. (S-Bahn) and in about 15 minutes to Theresienwiese (Oktoberfest) by tram 19.

Parking is free in front of the door.

Within walking distance is a shopping mall, Westpark, for a walk,
Bakeries, supermarkets, drugstores and small restaurants.

description: centrally located apartment in Munich (Neuperlach), quietly located. In the immediate vicinity is the Friedrich-Engels-Bogen bus stop with the bus line 197, the bus goes to Neuperlach center, from there you can take the subway directly to the city center. Elevator available

description:
Room
The room is fully furnished with plenty of closets and wardrobe space. The flat is fully furnished with washmachine, kitchen and dining room. It is located on top floor with lift.
The bathroom has windows.

Location
The flat is minutes away on foot to Olympia Einkaufen Zentrum, Olympia park, BMW welt, BMW museum and O2 tower. It is 5 min to U1/U3(OEZ). Easy commute to airport (45 min, to central station (10 min) and to city center (15 min).

name: Penthouse-Wohnung über München
description: Take it easy at this unique and tranquil getaway. You can have a Sunbath at the rooftop-terrace or chill in the whirlpool 🙌🏽 the center (Marienplatz) is reachable with underground in 15 - 20 minutes.

name: Wunderschöne, helle Altbauwohnung am Herz Münchens
description:
Beautiful, bright old apartment in the heart of the city.

The 1893 style building combines historic charm with modern living comfort. High ceilings, white walls and elegant floorboards and parquet floors create a bright, friendly atmosphere.

A fireplace and a sunny balcony make the apartment a place of well-being all year round.

The spacious floor plan offers space for relaxation, work or even a shoot. The central location convinces with ideal connections.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is centrally located on Goetheplatz, right in the heart of Munich on the edge of the popular Glockenbachviertel. Just a stone's throw from Theresienwiese, the neighborhood offers everything your heart desires: Many great bars, restaurants and small boutiques invite you to stroll and linger. We are happy to give you current tips for cafes, restaurants and events around your stay date!

name: Zentrumsnah und doch im Grünen | S8
description: Cozy room in a quiet location near the S8.

name: Schöne Wohnung in Thalkirchen
description:
Relax and relax – in this quiet apartment. You have your own kitchen, a bathroom with a bathtub and a south-facing balcony where you can sit comfortably. The Isar is very close. You can sit by the river and also swim in it, because the Isar has been renatured and is very clean.
The metro is only 3 minutes away. All shopping facilities are also within walking distance.
neighborhood_overview: The neighborhood is quiet and safe. Very close is the river Isar as well as parks, various shopping facilities and a climbing hall.

name: Modernes und zentrales Appartement an Hackerbrücke
description:
Exclusive 1-room apartment with panoramic views over the Alps. The apartment is in the popular Arnulfpark on the Hackerbrücke.

Hackerbrücke S-Bahn station is a few min by walk. From there you are within 3 minutes in the center (Karlsplatz/Stachus).

Shopping, Edeka, Lidl, kiosk, bakery, hairdresser, restaurants, doctors, dentists are within walking distance

name: Room at Oktoberfest
description:
Room at Oktoberfest

啤酒节旁小房间带网络,离火车站5分钟车程, S1/S8机场直达，步行8分钟至啤酒节｡周围设施齐全:德国传统饭店,洗衣房,超市等。快速到达所有景点,展馆和机场｡Very nice small room with Wifi in downtown, 8 minutes on foot to Oktoberfest, 5 minutes by tram 18 or 19 to the main railway station. Very good connection with S1/S8/U2 to airport, fair and all sightseeings. Supermarket, German traditional restaurant and so on are next to the apartment. Wash salon is also near the apartment.

name: ruhiges, sonniges 3 Zi. App.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is a lively destination in Schwabing-West between Olympiapark and Luitpoldpark, near the BMW Museum. Right at your doorstep is a subway station of the U3 and U8 lines. Within walking distance there are restaurants, bakeries, supermarkets and doctors. The directly adjacent Olympic Park and also the Luitpoldpark have an incomparable leisure value through the events taking place here, the large swimming pool, the Olympic Sea with the possibility to go rowing or swimming, as well as a tennis court and a Socca Five Arena.

name: Schöne, zentral gelegene Wohnung 53qm

The beautifully furnished apartment in the best urban residential area, with just under 53 square meters, is oriented to the southwest. The large windows in the living room and kitchen give you a beautiful view of the quiet courtyard.

Bedroom with double bed 180 x 200 cm, bathroom with bathtub, dressing room.

Furniture:
new, very good, modern style

Kitchen:
Fully equipped

Very popular residential area Isarvorstadt/ Ludwigvorstadt, best infrastructure, only 3
Min to subway/bus.

Weekly clean up by charlady at no additional charge. Central location, subway station in walking distance (250 meter), bus station  in front of apartment. 15 min to central station, 20 min to Messe and LMU university. Underground parking space upon request (additional fee).
neighborhood_overview: Obergiesing - where Munich is most beautiful! Magical park and large sunbathing lawn outside the front door. Lovely cafes, two supermarkets (Rewe, Netto) and one weekly market (always Tuesdays) within two minutes walking distance.

The apartment is located in a vibrant neighborhood with plenty of restaurants, cafes, shops, and attractions within walking distance. You can explore the city on foot or take advantage of the public transportation options nearby. I'm happy to provide recommendations.

description: Your family will be close to everything when you stay at this centrally-located place.
neighborhood_overview:
Our neighbourhood is quiet, very safe and green.
The neighbours are very friendly & everyone on the street will say hi to you.
We do have some parks around to go for a walk, run or picnic, also some sport fiels (football & basketball) for adventure people.
For the guest who would book for a long term, we have a gym near by 300m walking distance,opened 24/7.
Some beatiful spots near us which you should’nt miss, are Ostpark & Riemersee.
When the weather is good, the locals organise many activities for every age & for free.

name: Numa | Medium Studio w/ Kitchenette & Single Bed
description: These 21 sqm studios are ideal for a solo trip, as they hold space for 1 guest. They are all furnished with a modern kitchenette with sink and stove, a single bed (90x200) and a bathroom with shower.
neighborhood_overview:
Viktoria is located at Hanauer Strasse, just a few steps from Lehrkolonie Moosach (teaching colony) which built in 1919—today these buildings are cultural monuments under the Bavarian monument protection law.
The area to the north of Pelkovenstrassee is one of Bavaria's major retail centres. East of the city, the Mona and the Olympia-Einkaufszentrum (Olympia shopping center) border Hanauer Strasse. Across the street are more shopping centres where you can catch up on some downtime! Equipped with the latest technology, it is the perfect hotel for travellers looking for a modern experience in Munich.

Just an 8 Minutes Walk away from central station and 3 Minutes from Theresienwiese (Oktoberfest main entrance)!

We offer our comfortable guest-room (non-smoking!), ground level with an own, silent terrace and own bathroom to quiet, reliable guests.

You'll have a comfy bed (140x200) and a small sofa, a desk and a lovely, calm place to sit and eat on the terrace.

Kitchen and TV are optional (shared with us).

High-Speed-Wifi is available.
neighborhood_overview: Theresienwiese, main train station, subway, tram station

name: Charmant Wohnen, ruhig, citynah
description: A small part of our family home. Built in 1928, completely renovated. Garden share for shared use. Fully equipped. Part of the house of the oldest child, who is currently not in the house, is rented. The house is situated in a green residential area, at the same time very close to the metro and all the shops you need and yet it is very quiet.

name: Sleep in the heart of Munich N3!
description: Sleep in the heart of Munich! Quietly located in the back building, does not bother you about the nighttime beauty sleep. Our controversy lies at the doorstep, with numerous cafes, restaurants and shops. Just an 8-minute walk from the main train station and Stachus, you are really in the heart of Munich. The nearest subway is only a 6-minute walk away. Sendlinger Tor with U1, U6, U2, U3 and U7. The Theresienwiese / Oktoberfest is just a stone's throw away.

name: Modernes Zimmer mit eigenem Eingang U-Bahn Nähe
description:
Room t is located in the Forsterieder district

goes directly to Marienplatz


13.5 square meters room
Double bed with continuous mattress
High-speed Wi-Fi

neighborhood_overview:
If you're in the mood for exercise, you can go to the gym, which is located in the house.
Nearby Forstenrieder Park is perfect for a bike tour or jogging.
If you want to go to the swimming pool, no problem. The Stäblibad is a few minutes away.

Restaurants, ice cream shop and shops are within walking distance.

With the U3 you are also in the city center within a short time and only four UNDERGROUND stops away is our Munich Zoo Hellabrunn waiting for you. The zoo is right on the Isar and you can hang your legs in the water after the visit. In summer just jump in - it's fantastic. Feel free to bring beach towels from me.

name: Cozy flat 7 min to Oktoberfest and 25min to Messe
description: Cozy flat for up to 4 people in walking distance to Oktoberfest. Live like in your own Appartement with bars, supermarkets, restaurants just around the corner. Complete privacy and a full equipped kitchen included. Distance to Oktoberfest: 10min walking!! 5th Person possible for a small extra charge. As we migrated the account because my flatmate moved out I attached our former reviews as pictures. Welcome beer 🍺 included!

name: For groups, no sharing, whole flat for one group
description: It is a unique place, very spacey, very well equipped. Close by you find all shops and restaurants you need. It take a few minutes to be in a city in half an hour to the Messe.

name: Single Deluxe with Gym&Concierge
description:
This cozy studio apartment is located within a modern building, with gorgeous architectural details. Bright, open, and modern, the complex boasts an inviting vibe without forgetting comfort. This is the ideal base for experiencing Munich - a great starting point to explore the rest of the city and its many hidden spots: in 18 min you can be at München Central Station (Hauptbahnhof).
The building includes a concierge, gym – with a view as well as underground car parking.

name: Munich City View - Aublick
description:
Welcome to our beautiful vacation flat in Munich! Located in the heart of the city, our flat is the perfect base for exploring all that this vibrant city has to offer.

Our flat is spacious and comfortable, with one bedroom, a fully equipped kitchen, a modern bathroom, and a cozy living room with a comfortable studio couch/sofa bed. It is tastefully decorated with a mix of modern and traditional Bavarian style, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

name: Very bright place with Terrace!
description:
In a rare modern residence, you will have your own Room in a big apartment that you will shared with others persons.
- Light & Sun
- Premium & Modern Place (renovated + new furniture in 2023)
- Easy Check-in & central location
- Wonderful Patio with a view

Besides:
-> 35qm room with the double-bed and a fancy table
-> 500m away from Center (Marienplatz)
=> 📍1 Station + 5mn walk away from Main train Station

name: Sunny roof terrace flat, modern, quiet, fireplace
description: Our 82m² modern, light-flooded attic flat is located between Karl Preis Platz underground station and Innsbrucker Ring, adjacent to Haidhausen, centrally located with excellent connections and yet very quiet with a view of the greenery and old Ramersdorf. U5 and U2 are within 5 minutes walking distance. From the roof terrace with south-west orientation you can enjoy the sun all day until sunset. In the morning, you can experience the sunrise with a cappuccino at the kitchen counter.
neighborhood_overview: On the ground floor there is an Indian restaurant and a bakery/café with the best bread in Munich. Both with outdoor terrace. I recommend the croissants, the baguette and spelt wholemeal. And many greetings to Sinem, the nicest baker in Munich. If you want to enjoy the nightlife, you can discover bars, restaurants and clubs in the Kunstpark Ost, which is within walking distance. Or go to neighboring Haidhausen. For a classic Bavarian beer garden, we recommend the Alter Wirt, or something more youthfully modern, the Zar Bar, both within 5 minutes walking distance. A cleaning lady can be organized.

name: Gemütliche Wohnung in Neuhausen
description:
Enjoy the simple life in this quiet and centrally located home. The apartment is in the back building and coziness is very important here;)

The apartment has everything you need: kitchen, bathtub, a large bed (160x200cm), couch and high-speed WiFi (100Mbit/s).

The kitchen is a kitchen-living room with a small table.

Location near Rotkreuzplatz, 10 minutes by bike to Theresienwiese (Oktoberfest), 20 minutes by S-Bahn (Donnersbergerbrücke stop) from door to door.

name: Maisonette-Zimmer
description: Our spacious and bright duplex rooms consist of a separate room with its own bathroom, desk and TV. In addition, they are equipped with a microwave, sink, Nespresso coffee machine, minibar, safe and hairdryer. For guests who still have to work after a long day, free Wi-Fi is available in all rooms.

name: Stylish 2 room apartment in the center
description:
Charming old building. The open floor plan gives the living area a generous feeling of space.

The open kitchen is modern & fully equipped.
The bedroom faces the inner courtyard.
Bathroom with shower & washing machine.

The location is unbeatable. It is close to the city center. The surrounding streets are lined with restaurants, bars, cafes and stores that invite you to stroll around. Public transportation and supermarkets are in the immediate vicinity.
neighborhood_overview: The location of the flat is unbeatable. It is located in the heart of Munich, just a few minutes' walk from the world-famous Oktoberfest. The surrounding streets are lined with charming cafés, restaurants and shops that invite you to stroll and linger. Public transport is also close by, so you can easily reach Munich's many sights and attractions.

name: Privatzimmer in ruhiger Gegend
description: Beautiful area of Munich, quiet and relaxed, 30 minutes (max) to downtown

name: apartment for two people
description:
Quiet, cozy furnished accommodation for a longer period. Minimum rental period three months.
Available from 07/18/2025

name: 1 Zimmer in einem Haus
description:
In a very well-kept and all-day sunny corner house, 1 room is available for 2 people. In addition, a fully equipped kitchen, a bathroom, a toilet, a TV room.
An approximately 300 square meter garden with a grill and terrace is available.
Nearby (about 5 minutes by car) is a very good infrastructure with all kinds of shopping, a bus stop and a S-Bahn station. It's about 20 minutes to downtown by S-Bahn.
The highway is about 10 minutes away.

name: Standard Double Room at Hotel Isartor
description: Comfortable room with double bed, private bath and/or shower, facing a quiet side street, soundproof windows, cable-TV, telephone and internet connection

name: Beeindruckende Familien Villa m. Pool & Sauna
description:
Luxury villa with pool and sauna near the Nymphenburg castle park with pool sauna and outdoor area.
Only 12 minutes by S-Bahn to downtown.

name: Zimmer mit Doppelbett in Oase Schwabing
description: Room has a double bed and is opposite the bathroom.
neighborhood_overview: Across the street from the apartment are two restaurants, a bakery and a coffee. It is a traffic-calmed area with lots of nature around. 5 minutes from here is the Olympiapark, which can be reached via a pedestrian bridge.

name: Nahe Pasinger Bahnhof - 1 Zi. App. mit Süd Balkon
description: Chic and stylishly furnished 1-bedroom apartment with sunny south-facing balcony in a well-kept complex near the Pasing train station (S-Bahn, ICE connection, bus, train). The newly renovated apartment in the popular district of Pasing is characterized by excellent transport links. Tram, bus and S-Bahn are within walking distance. Westbad is located in about 5 min walking distance. All shopping facilities for daily needs as well as a 24-hour gas station are in the immediate vicinity. Book now!

name: Sunny apt in the heart of Munich
description: Our spacious and bright apartment is located in a recently built residential building in Haidhausen, 15 minutes from the city center. The interior is a mixture of  modern design and flea market objects in a cozy atmosphere. The view is green with plenty of old trees in a park with a large meadow and a huge playground. The subway station is ten minutes by foot and there are several bus stations reachable within one minute.
neighborhood_overview:
Haidhausen is a 19th century city extension on the right river banks of the Isar. In the last 20 years it has become a fashionable urban district known for its charming streets lined with colorful buildings, little cafes, a wide range of restaurants, shops selling hand-crafted design and fashion, while still being very family-friendly.

One of the most popular spots in Haidhausen is the Wiener Platz, a bustling square surrounded by cafes, shops, and a local market. It's a great place to grab a coffee and people-watch, or pick up some fresh produce and local specialties.

name: Adina Hotel Munich - Studio
description: The Adina Hotel Munich is a real eye-catcher. Centrally located in the new and urban factory district center in the immediate vicinity of the Ostbahnhof, the new flagship of the Adina hotels is located between the ninth and 24th floors of one of the most spectacular high-rises in the city. This makes the Adina the highest hotel in Munich! Enjoy the stunning views over the Bavarian capital and the surrounding alpine panorama over a cocktail at our 15th floor terrace.

name: Adina Munich - 1 Bedroom Apt
description: The Adina Hotel Munich is a real eye-catcher. Centrally located in the new and urban factory district center in the immediate vicinity of the Ostbahnhof, the new flagship of the Adina hotels is located between the ninth and 24th floors of one of the most spectacular high-rises in the city. This makes the Adina the highest hotel in Munich!

name: beautiful rooftop room
description:
Quiet attic room, within walking distance of the "Alte Heide" U-Bahn [subway] station (<5 min.). The room (separate area with private entrance) is equipped with a double bed as well as a single bed, a desk, TV and Wi-Fi. The bathroom is shared with the host. The English Garden, restaurants and shops serving daily needs are around the corner.
Note: The apartment is on the third floor - attic, no elevator, sloping walls on the window side. Linens and towels are provided.

name: Wohnen & Arbeiten in Schwabing
description: A wonderful retreat in the middle of Munich, Schwabing, for living & working. Best infrastructure and a neighborhood to feel good. Cafes and restaurants in the immediate vicinity, so you don't really have to go anywhere, but all of Munich is still easily accessible.

name: Bright & Spacious im Westend
description:
Modern, top-floor apartment (no elevator) situated in residential and quirky Schwanthalerhöhe. Located less than a 10-minute walk to bus, tram, and train services, this apartment gives you the chance to enjoy a quiet neighbourhood only a short distance from city centre, Westpark, Hirschgarten, and the mountains and lakes of Bavaria.

Make yourself at home with all the day-to-day amenities included, and explore what the Westend has to offer in local bars, restaurants, and cafes.

name: Private room
description: Relax in this peaceful and centrally-located place.

name: Zentrale Wohnung mit Isarblick
description: In walking distance to Oktoberfest. The apartment is located in the lively Dreimühlenviertel directly on the Isar. It is very spacious with two bathrooms and large living/dining area which can be fully used by guests. The view of the Isar through the floor-to-ceiling windows calms down and makes you feel like in nature despite the big city. In the immediate vicinity there is a supermarket, bakery, restaurants, gas station, parking and various bus lines. The U2 and U3 are at a distance of 12 km.

name: Stylish Guestroom in Glockenbachviertel
description:
Our guest room is located on the 2nd floor of a beautiful, historic building directly at Gärtnerplatz/Glockenbachviertel (about 3 minutes to subway station Fraunhoferstraße).
The guest room has over 3m high ceilings, parquet flooring and beautiful double windows and doors. It is about 22 sqm and has its own balcony with table and chairs. It also has a desk, an open wardrobe, a comfortable bed (140x200cm), a nice reading corner and many other details, which you can see on our photos.

Our private room with a queen bed allows you to experience Munich's by gone era of beautiful architecture with high ceilings and antique details for a charming feel. Enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. The underground station, supermarkets & restaurants are within 5 mins walking distance.
neighborhood_overview: Centrally located neighbourhood with the park and the Isar river just across. Supermarkets, public transport, restaurants and shops all within 5 mins walking distance. Main shopping area of the city centre is 10 mins walk away. This is a quiet residential area at night but very conveniently located to the main attractions of the city.

name: Exklusiv: Historisches Apartment mit Deckengewölbe
description: The old brewery and wine cellar has been completely redesigned and has its own atrium that can be used exclusively. The room height as well as the more than 200-year-old cellar vault are very special. Nevertheless, the accommodation has the latest building technology. It is very centrally located. The English Garden, the university, restaurants and many shopping facilities are within walking distance. It is located in Schwabing and is thus in the central hub of Munich city life.
neighborhood_overview: It is within walking distance of the Victory Gate and English Garden. There are many restaurants and shopping nearby.

description:
(1) REPLY WITHIN FEW HOURS.

The cozy, bright and modern apartment is located in the center of Giesing, one of quiet, residential neighbourhood from which all of the city is easily accessible.

10 Min Train Ride from Main Station and easily reachable to Oktoberfest.

This is the real Airbnb as I rent out my lovely apartment when I am away. You will get a fully-equipped apartment that is properly taken care of.

I am happy to welcome you and looking forward to booking requests.
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is located in a residential neighbourhood yet 5-10 min to the city center by subway. The closests subway station is Giesing Bf. which has U-Bahn line U2 and S-Bahn lines.


SUPERMARKETS/GROCERY SHOPPING:

The closest big supermarket is Penny (Perlacher Str. 122A) and HIT (Giesinger Bahnhofpl. 1A). The other big one is ALDI (Schwanseestraße 61), which is a little bit further than other two.

BAKERIES:

If you are a fan of cinnamon rolls, there is a great bakery that bakes them and is only 5 min away - Zimtschneckenfabrik.
Another decent bakery is SB Giesing Backshop

QUICK FOOD/DÖNER/KEBAP/

If you are hungry for a Turkish Kebap, go to DJANGO'S, this is one of the best places in the city.

name: Cozy flat in central Munich top location
description:
Cozy, sunny and comfortable flat in Munich. Come and feel at home.
The flat is located very central . 2 min walk to the S- Banh Station Rosenheimerplatz ( 35 min to the airport direct line ) close and walking distance to many shops, restaurants, bars and to the river and park. Ideal for jogging in the mornings. The flat is sunny and has a balcony as well. Fully furnished and in a friendly house.

name: Standard Double Apartment - Servus Apartments
description: Welcome to Servus Apartments by Homaris, our modern serviced apartment building in the heart of Munich. Enjoy the convenience of digital check-in and experience the perfect blend of comfort and technology. Our apartments offer a seamless stay with all the amenities you need for a stress-free visit to this vibrant city. Explore Munich on your own terms, knowing you have a comfortable retreat waiting for you.

Of course, this also brings with it a certain amount of hustle and bustle and lively city life. Many different cultures, nationalities and people from different backgrounds live together here. It is a mix of high-class restaurants, 4-5 star hotels, bars, the German Theater and, on the other hand, shisha cafés, casinos, table dance bars and Far Eastern stores. However, it should not be forgotten that Munich itself and this area in particular is one of the safest places in Europe.

The Isarvorstadt includes Museum Island with the "Deutsches Museum", many bridges spanning the river Isar and the three trendy neighborhoods on the left bank of the Isar: Gärtnerplatz, Glockenbach and Schlachthofviertel offering plenty of restaurants, bars and nightlife.

The Volkstheater and the Theresienwiese are within 5 minutes walking distance, with the subway from Goetheplatz or Poccistraße you are in the middle of Marienplatz in 5 minutes, with the subway from Goetheplatz or Poccistraße. Welcome to the first ZOEPPRITZ1828. The traditional house ZOEPPRITZ1828 opens its private places.
neighborhood_overview:
House is in a quiet side street not far from Poccistraße subway station.
Bakeries and supermarkets are within walking distance.
You can walk to the Theresienwiese and the Volkstheater in about 5 minutes.

name: Klein und Fein Mittenrein
description:
Enjoy your stay without stress and worries. I am at your disposal at any time for your well-being. My "small" apartment hopefully gives you the feeling of well-being that I get from it!

Welcome to the "Little in the middle" of Munich :)
neighborhood_overview:
My neighborhood is very quiet. And as long as you are not intrusively disturbing, you have no problems to expect.

You can get to the subway, tram or bus line very quickly.

name: Zentrales City Apartment
description:
My wife and I rent out this central and modern apartment.
It doesn't get any more central: you sleep in the museum district, within walking distance of the university, downtown and the English Garden!

Located directly in the Maxvorstadt, the city's vibrant university district, it is surrounded by the best student cafes, bars, restaurants and shops. Munich's most famous museums are also right next door.
At the same time, it is a 5-minute walk directly to Odeonsplatz and the city center of Munich.
neighborhood_overview: The English Garden is only a 10-minute walk away. The surfers at the Eisbachwelle can be found on the way there.  In the neighborhood is everything you need: great cafes, restaurants, shops and boutiques (which make the shopping heart beat faster ;-) The art area with the Pinakotheken and Museum Brandhorst are within a 5-minute walk. You can walk to Odeonsplatz in 5 minutes... Both the TU and LMU are extremely close on foot.

name: 2 Zimmer Wohnung(Vitualienmarkt)
description: This unique home has a style of its own.

name: Schöne 2 Zi Whg direkt am Wald
description: The fully equipped 56m2 apartment is perfectly suitable for 1-2 people.  There is everything you need for your everyday needs. The apartment is located in a residential complex directly on the forest with a view of the countryside. A supermarket and bus station are just 1 minute away. The metro Freimann is about a 10-minute walk away.  A bike is available if needed.

name: Luxurious flat in prime location/ two rooms
description:
This renovated apartment in an old building is in the best location in Munich. The apartment is located in the Lehel district across from the Isar and is only 5 minutes away from the English Garden/Chinese Tower. The Oktoberfest is 18 minutes away.

Our apartment, renovated in 2023, welcomes you with <3.

You will live in a huge and bright bedroom, which is connected to a modern and large office room. You therefore enjoy plenty of peace and privacy.
neighborhood_overview:
Chinese tower 3min;
beer garden Seehaus at Großhesseloher See 5 min;
Bar-Viertel Schwabing 10 mins walk;
Downtown 15 min;
Monopterus 15 min walk;
Zugspitze by train 2h;
Neuschwanstein Castle by car 2h;
And Many More...

name: Großes Zimmer an der U-Bahn Laimer Platz
description: We, Felix and Julia, live in a semi-detached house in Laim, from which we provide you with a room. The room is 24 sqm, is equipped with a large double bed, a large desk and a large window front. By subway you can reach the main train in 15 minutes, the Allianz Arena in 50 minutes and the Adele concerts in 40 minutes. You have a modern fitted kitchen, living room, bathroom and toilet at your disposal, all these areas are shared.
neighborhood_overview: The neighborhood is quiet. The subway is 8 minutes away and goes directly to Oktoberfest. There are small supermarkets in the area and some restaurants.

name: 1 Privatzimmer in West-Schwabing
description:
Hello and welcome to my cozy and central apartment. I ask here a cozy room with a double bed (1,60 x 2,00) in a very great family apartment.
The Hohenzollernplatz subway is within 3-4 minutes walking distance! Bus and tram Nordbad stop in 2 min. Central Station is only 5 minutes away from Hohenzollernplatz by subway.
Common areas will only be shared with my children (11 and 8 years old) and will not be shared with me and no other guests.

name: Zimmer mit Bad nahe Messe
description: The house is located in the east of Munich in the district of Trudering with (still) a lot of greenery and smaller houses. Very close is Riem with the fair.
neighborhood_overview: McDonald's and some shops and restaurants are within walking distance. The Riem Arkaden shopping center at the fair is also close by.

name: Wunderschönes WG Zimmer
description: Enjoy beautiful days in this centrally located accommodation with bathroom, guest toilet and kitchen

name: Casa Paradiso - max. privacy + Oktoberfest-bus!
description: If you choose "max. privacy", there won't be other people in the house. My bedroom and office will be locked, all the remaining house will be yours: 2 double bedrooms with each second bed (one with optional third bed instead of desk) + cellar room with double bed, 2 single beds + 1 futon bed  (10 pers. max., more comfort with 8 pers.)
neighborhood_overview:
very green + idyllic, S-Bahn and neighboring dogs can be heard
Anliegerstraße with free parking available right in front of the house + carport

name: Luxury Apt in München – Eleganz Pur
description:
Welcome to our stylish studio apartment in Haidhausen-AU, just a stone's throw from the Isarpark!

This cozy apartment is located on the 1st floor of a well-maintained building and offers an open living/sleeping area, a fully equipped kitchen, a hallway and a modern bathroom.

Perfect for couples or solo travelers looking to experience life in Munich!
neighborhood_overview:
-central & very nice neighbourhood
- next to Isar (river) park & rear
- quite street
- lots of restaurants, bars, supermarkets around

name: 2-Zimmer Wohnung im 4. Stock an der Isar
description: This is not a vacation rental or a hotel room that is cleaned daily. When I am not on vacation I will be staying in this apartment.

name: Private room Munich center
description:
Welcome to our cozy private room in the heart of Munich! Nestled in the vibrant city center, our Airbnb offers the perfect balance of comfort and convenience. The room is tastefully furnished with modern amenities, ensuring a relaxing stay for solo travelers or couples.
The apartment is located in the middle of the vibrant main station district with multicultural influence. Vegetables store, kebab stores and supermarkets, drugstores and pharmacies are in the immediate vicinity.

name: Gemütliches Zimmer in München
description:
Cozy-modern private room in 3-room apartment with many extras, e.g.:
- Netflix guest account
- Large roof terrace with grill, dining table/lounge & sun lounger
- Private fridge
- Washing machine + dryer

The room is pleasantly flooded with light, but also has curtains to darken it. In the room you will find a comfortable bed, wardrobe (with hangers), sideboard, desk, clothes rack as well as fresh shower and towels.

U-Bahn [subway] (Mangfallplatz) 2 minutes away.

I look forward to seeing you!
neighborhood_overview: The neighborhood is predominantly single-family homes so it is quiet, clean and safe, even at night. Very close by is a supermarket, post office, bakery, ice cream shop, Italian restaurant and other small shops. About 5 minutes walk away is a small park and the Perlacher Forest (forest) which is ideal for jogging or walking.

name: Peaceful, private Garden, quick to the city center
description:
Peaceful and comfortable flat with nice bedroom.
Enjoy the cool garden, the terrasse and the children playground.
15 minutes from Marienplatz !

name: Zimmer in die Nähe von Messe München
description:
Renting a very nice and comfortable bedroom for FEMALE guests in my home. The bedroom has a comfortable bed, a big Garderobe and access to the balcony with garden view.
My cozy apartment is situated in a very calm and good zone of the city, safe and family friendly. From my apartment you can easy reach the Riem Messe: 15 min by car, 18 min. By bike and 30 min. By public transportation. The nearest bus station is found 10 min away by walking.

name: Quarto bem situado
description: Embrace simplicity in this quiet and well-located place.

name: Ruhiges Zimmer mit guter Anbindung zur nahen Messe
description:
Arrive and feel good – in this cozy and quiet accommodation with private bathroom.
Good public transport connections are provided (2-minute walk to the bus, 10-minute walk to the Quiddestraße U-Bahn [subway] station). Bus directly to the fair.

name: Single Studio + Gym & Concierge
description:
This cozy studio apartment is located within a modern building, with gorgeous architectural details. Bright, open, and modern, the complex boasts an inviting vibe without forgetting comfort. This is the ideal base for experiencing Munich - a great starting point to explore the rest of the city and its many hidden spots: in 18 min you can be at München Central Station (Hauptbahnhof).
The building includes a concierge, gym – with a view as well as underground car parking

name: Single Studio + Gym & Concierge !
description:
This cozy studio apartment is located within a modern building, with gorgeous architectural details. Bright, open, and modern, the complex boasts an inviting vibe without forgetting comfort. This is the ideal base for experiencing Munich - a great starting point to explore the rest of the city and its many hidden spots: in 18 min you can be at München Central Station (Hauptbahnhof).

name: 2,5 Dachgeschoss Wohnung
description: Relax with the whole family at this peaceful place.

description: ✨ Welcome to Munich-Pasing! Our charming, cozy room is set in a quiet green area – the perfect mix of relaxation and city access. Just a 7-min walk to the S-Bahn, taking you to Marienplatz in only 15 minutes. Ideal for sightseeing, Oktoberfest 🍻 or business trips – with a peaceful retreat to come home to after exploring the city.

name: Loft appartement green oasis - cozy + comfy 80qm
description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space.
neighborhood_overview: We are in the center of Giesing, a lively but quiet neighbourhood. Many nice cafés, restaurants, a green park and the Isar river are in walking distance.

name: Wohnung München Sendling
description:
Sit back and relax in this quiet, stylish space.

What makes the accommodation so special: the stylish and at the same time cozy furnishings.
The apartment is completely newly renovated everything in the apartment is new and decorated with love. A place to turn it off and feel good...

It is really very quiet here and the apartment is centrally located. It is about 5 minutes to the subway line U3 and to the bus station.
There are lots of shops nearby.
neighborhood_overview: There are many supermarkets, pharmacies, doctors, drugstore market and restaurants nearby!

name: Cosy Bavarian Style Family Home
description:
Cosy Bavarian Style Family House with sunroom, big terrace and garden. 4 Bedrooms, sleeps up to 7. Free parking on site.

Located in Untermenzing, the green westside of Munich, 25 minutes to the City Center. The entire ground floor, garden and terrace are at your free disposal: Living room with smart-TV and fireplace, dining area, sunroom, kitchen, bathroom with shower and bathtub, separate toilet.

Hospitality is our passion – we look forward to meeting you!
neighborhood_overview: Very quiet and wealthy neighbourhood, with predominantly family houses, about 20 min from downtown Munich. For daily needs there is a small supermarket, butchery, bakery and gas station within walking distance.

name: Room 18 min to City (with cat) only female guests
description:
Cozy, quiet & bright room in Fürstenried West (just 10 minutes away with the U-Bahn to Goetheplatz - Oktoberfest Station).

Please note that the room is equipped with a queen size bed for 2 persons. There is a spacious closet and desk in the room.

Note: Rental exclusively to women.

This room is only rented to female guests, as it is a shared apartment with shared rooms (bathroom, kitchen, etc.) and I live here myself.
neighborhood_overview:
In the immediate vicinity, there are two supermarkets and an organic market and also a bakery.

Quietly located just a 10-minute walk to the Forstenried Forest.

18 minutes by U-Bahn to Marienplatz

20 minutes by car to Lake Starnberg.

name: *5 min to Oktoberfest + option for a reservation*
description:
Enjoy your stay in my cozy and bright apartment - only a 5min walk away from Oktoberfest✨🍻

I am happy to give you tips for Munich or the Oktoberfest and provide advice and assistance if needed💙 (e.g. table reservation in obe of the big tents)

name: Cozy apartment, walking distance to Octoberfest
description:
We are renting out our cute and beautiful apartment in walking distance to the Octoberfest! The neighbourhood is charming, the apartment quiet and the walk to the festival grounds takes 10 to 15 minutes! We usually live in this apartment ourselves and love it, so it's really homey-feeling too (we hope;))

We have two beautiful bedrooms, a balcony, a little kitchen and a bathroom with a bathtub and washing machine. There also is a little dining table in the hallway. We look forward to having you!

name: Green Munich
description: You'll love the stylish amenities at this charming place. The listed price is for Oktoberfest per person.

name: Wunderbare 1 Zimmer Dachwohnung
description: Forget your worries in this spacious and quiet space.

name: Unique: Maximalist Apartment Downtown
description: This special place is located in one of the best streets in Munich, and is close to everything you need (including Oktoberfest), making it easy to plan your visit. This compact flat is decorated with unique, one-of-a-kind items, from a vintage typewriter to a giant lego piece. Whether it’s your first time in Munich or not, the flat and the neighborhood will definitely provide you with the best possible experience!
neighborhood_overview: The neighborhood is definitely one of the most central and lively places in Munich, if not the most! You can find the best pizza, ice cream, bars, cafes within 5min of walk distance ✨

name: Oktoberfest Appartment, 5 persons
description:
Attic apartment, 4th floor, balcony, morning sun, view to Frauenkirche. Some sportiness is required, it is an olde building without elevator.

There are 42m² ideal cut. Entrance with dining area, 2 separate rooms, bathroom with window and spacious kitchen with balcony.

For Okoberfest everything is optimized for a group up to 5 people.
5 single beds with good slatted frame. Enough hangers and space for hanging.

The Oktoberfest is within easy walking distance, the way home easily doable
neighborhood_overview: Oktoberfest directly and easily accessible in walking distance, 5 minutes.

name: Traumhafte 4-Zimmeraltbauwohnung
description:
A fantastic 4-room old building apartment (about 120) with 3.20 m high ceilings in the heart of Munich for rent!

Up to 5 people can feel comfortable here!

The rooms are as follows:
- Bedroom with a king size bed
- Extra room with two mattresses
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Living room with sofa bed
- Dining room with table for 8 people
- Bath with shower, bath and toilet
- Extra guest toilet

location:
- REWE directly opposite
- Viktualienmarkt/ U- and S-Bahn /Tram / Bus in 3-5 minutes walk

name: Aurora – 2-bedroom apartment in Munich city center
description:
Our apartment was completely renovated in January 2024 and is in the center of Munich, just minutes on foot to Marienplatz, the Old Town and the boutiques on Maximilianstraße! Have a drink at one of the neighborhood bars, go for a run along the Isar river, or just chill out in the apartment with the TV, comfy couch and a Nespresso machine (fair trade, recyclable pods)!

The sofa pulls out into a comfortable bed with a mattress topper.

On-site parking: €25 per night. Ask for availability.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood Lehel is located comfortably between the old town and the Isar river, where locals love to go for a stroll or sit in the sun on the river's gravel banks on hot summer days. The apartment is in Mariannenstraße, a little side street with three restaurants, which gives the street a slight Italian touch. It can get lively in the evenings in summer when the windows are open!

You have the choice between an international/Bavarian restaurant named Mariannenhof, a new and modern bar/restaurant called Frex and the bar/restaurant Nage & Sauge, which specializes in huge salads and is an institution in Munich's bar scene.

name: Charmante Wohnung zentral
description: From this centrally located home, you'll be in all the important places in no time. It is just a stone's throw from U/S-Bahn and buses. The Theresienwiese is also easily and quickly accessible. Especially beautiful is the small, cozy balcony to relax after your city trip in the evening.

name: Standard Triple Apartment - Servus Apartments
description: Welcome to Servus Apartments by Homaris, our modern serviced apartment building in the heart of Munich. Enjoy the convenience of digital check-in and experience the perfect blend of comfort and technology. Our apartments offer a seamless stay with all the amenities you need for a stress-free visit to this vibrant city. Explore Munich on your own terms, knowing you have a comfortable retreat waiting for you.
neighborhood_overview:
Sankt-Martin Straße is an enchanting street in the heart of Munich. The street is well known for its picturesque architecture, quaint shops, and cozy cafes.
All in all, Sankt-Martin-Straße is a must for anyone traveling to Munich. It offers a glimpse into the city's vibrant cultural scene and is the perfect place to soak up the atmosphere of this beautiful and historic city.

Would you like to be in the most beautiful urban jungle?

Due to the central location directly on the Isartor, you are within walking distance of the Isar and in the city center. Numerous cafes, great restaurants, bars and boutiques invite you to linger.

name: Apartment  mit grosser Terrasse Nähe Messe

Take a break and relax in this peaceful oasis near Ostbahnhof:-)


Stylish apartment near the Ostbahnhof with a large terrace
Apartment: Modern and fully equipped 1 room apartment;
Kitchen with dining area, box spring bed, TV + large wardrobe; relax lounger, Wi-Fi, washing and dryer, 45 square meters,
Sitting area on the large terrace

name: Modern and light room
description: This peaceful and centrally-located place is perfect for a stay in munich city.

Enjoy the time directly at the Olympiapark and the BMW Welt with good subway connection.
Two cozy sofa beds, balcony, a new kitchen, wifi, TV will make your stay in Munich pleasant. Since January 2025, the bathroom and kitchen have finally been newly renovated.
neighborhood_overview: Right in the former Olympic village, next to the Olympic Park and the BMW Welt. The U-Bahn and bus are right at your doorstep.

name: Cosy flat near Oktoberfest
description:
Welcome to our charming apartment in the heart of Munich!
This spacious apartment can accommodate up to 6 persons, sleeps up to 6 persons. The Oktoberfest can be reached in 10 minutes by foot in 10 and by subway in 5 minutes.
From the bedroom with sofa bed you have access to the north balcony. The fully equipped kitchen allows you to prepare your favorite dishes. The dining area can accommodate shared meals. The second room can be used as a study or additional sleeping space.
neighborhood_overview:
- The subway and bus can be reached in 1 minute on foot.
- Shopping facilities are also within walking distance (Edeka 3 minutes, Aldi 3 minutes, Penni 1 minute, gas station 2 minutes, dm 7 minutes)
- There are many restaurants, cafes and ice cream parlors near the property near the property (recommendations can be given if interested)

name: Zentrale Wohnung Nähe U3
description:
Apartment right on the Flaucher in the countryside.
It has three rooms (living room with TV, bedroom with king size bed, small office), a fully equipped kitchen and a small bathroom with bathtub and a balcony.
Extra bed and high chair available on request.

Connection to public transport with bus in front of the door and subway station Thalkirchen (3 stations to Oktoberfest) within walking distance.
neighborhood_overview:
Very good connection by bus and subway.

Three stops to Oktoberfest. 15 minutes to Marienplatz

Quiet recreation area right on the Isar with some of the most beautiful beer gardens and Isar beaches very close by.

name: Apartment im Brauereiviertel
description: This apartment is centrally located in Munich's brewery district of Schwanthalerhöhe. It consists of an open space with separable living/sleeping area, dining area and kitchen as well as hallway and bathroom (about 50 sqm). A terrace with dining table gives access to the green courtyard. The apartment is very quiet. Shopping facilities and all public transport as well as rental bikes, roller, etc. are in the immediate vicinity. There are numerous options within walking distance.
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is located in the Schwanthalerhöhe brewery district. In a few minutes, you can walk to Theresienhöhe, which includes Oktoberfest, the Spring Festival and Winter Tollwood. The German Museum's worth seeing transportation museum right next door is located in the area of the Old Fair.

name: Premium Wohnung
description: You enter this beautiful, lightly bathed apartment and will feel comfortable right away. Here you will find a place of rest, the coordinated design furniture is a true joy for the eye. With attention to detail, this apartment has been furnished for you. The apartment is equipped with new furniture, all you need is a suitcase with clothes when moving in, you don't have to worry about the rest.

name: Tolle Wohnung im Gärtnerplatzviertel - 1,5 Zimmer
description: Welcome to our 1.5 room apartment (39 m²) in the middle of the Gärtnerplatz district: In 2 minutes you are at the Fraunhoferstraße U-Bahn [subway] station, in 5 minutes at Gärtnerplatz or the Isar. The apartment is lovingly furnished. A kitchen made by the carpenter and a large double bed ( 2x2 meters) are part of the apartment on the 3rd floor with elevator. The bed is separated by a 3/4 wall (so there is no bedroom door!), in front of it is a table. A chamber in the hallway is a walk-in closet.
neighborhood_overview: You are right in the middle of the trendy Gärtnerplatz district: U-Bahn [subway], supermarket, bars and restaurants are all within walking distance. Opposite the apartment is the elementary school, where children romp and laugh in the morning and noon - this has never bothered us. With the window closed, the apartment is still quiet, just as it can be quiet in a city :)

name: Wohnung mitten in Schwabing
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally located property.
The apartment is renovated, inculsive of a modern
Fitted kitchen and the complete renovation of the bathroom with light tiles. The equipment of the character of the apartment is underlined by the wooden parquet. The bright and friendly character of the whole house together with the overgrown courtyard form the perfect place to feel good.
The apartment is in the back building with views over the leafy
courtyard.

name: Wohnung (2 ZKB) am Olympiapark
description: Cozy, fully and high-quality equipped 2-room apartment, centrally located, ideal for exploring and experiencing Munich, whether for events in the Olympic Park, exhibitions or trade fairs or just to spend a few nice days (50 m to the Olympic Park, 500 m to the Luitpoldpark, nearby public transport and U-Bahn, shopping / restaurants within walking distance, BMW World around the corner), the apartment offers everything you need

name: Gesamtunterkunft für Oktoberfest

name: Zentrales Apartment für bis zu 6 Personen

Not recommended for infants.
neighborhood_overview: The atmosphere of the area is characterized by Arab/Kurdish/Afghan restaurants as well as Turkish supermarkets. One street further the picture changes and you are in the clinic district of LMU Munich.

name: Modulares Design-Appartement
description:
This apartment can be used multi-functionally. There are flexible sliding room modules, which is why the same area can be used several times.
Location can't be better. Between Olympiapark (5 min walk) and the nightlife/shopping mile (Schellingstr.) as well as the city center (Marienplatz about 15 min by bike), there can be no better location.
The creative center right outside the door and shopping around the corner, everything you need to live.
The apartment is fully furnished

name: Living Concept München
description:
This bright three room flat is located in the beautiful and quiet living area Parkstadt in Bogenhausen.
Designed and realized by an Interior Designer, it is now available for your perfect saty.

Two bedrooms, a spacious living kitchen with a large dinner table and a TV area, a modern bathroom and a sunny balcony with a park view.

The Ubahn and bus station Böhmerwaldplatz is 0nly a 7 minute walk away. It takes only 6 minutes to the Odeonsplatz, Munich's city center!

name: Zimmer München, zentral gelegen
description: Hey, I am Markus. I rent out my room when I am out for a longer period. My flatmate is a very nice and agreeable person. I am sure you will enjoy living in the flat :)

name: Wohnung 7 min von Bahnhof
description: If you stay at this centrally located property, your family will have all the main points of contact nearby.

name: Perfect Central getaway
description:
Discover the heartwarming charm of our cozy flat right in the heart of Maxvorstadt. Just a quick 2-minute walk from Universität U-bahn station.

Hungry? No worries! You've got a bunch of takeouts around, And if you're up for a night out, there's no shortage of bars and clubs to choose from.

Our place? It's a comfy flat with its own balcony. The bed? It's a convertible double bed. The Kitchen? there is an oven and microwave as well as a stove.

Got questions? Don't hesitate to reach out.

name: Große, moderne Altbauwohnung
description:
Large, modern apartment in one of the best residential areas of Munich. Just a few meters to the Isar, downtown, to the Wiesn, to the Viktualienmarkt.
Supermarkets, bakeries and restaurants right in the neighborhood. Several playgrounds around the corner.

name: Numa | Design Studio in Downtown Munich
description: This comfortable room offers 18 m² of space for up to 2 people. The double bed (160x200) and the modern bathroom with shower make this accommodation the perfect starting point to experience Munich. There is also a kitchenette with sustainable coffee, a kettle and a mini fridge. You'll have everything you need for maximum comfort and minimum stress.
neighborhood_overview: The area around the Numa Munich St Paul  is a vibrant and lively neighbourhood in the heart of the city, known for its lively atmosphere and diverse attractions. Near the accommodation, you will find numerous stores, cafes and restaurants that offer a wide range of culinary delights. The famous Theresienwiese, where the annual Oktoberfest takes place, is also close. The picturesque parks, such as Westpark, invite you to walk and relax. Thanks to good public transportation connections, Munich's landmarks, museums and cultural sites are within easy reach. With its vibrant city life, cultural events and practical amenities, this neighbourhood guarantees a unique experience in the heart of Munich.

Welcome to our accommodation located in the heart of Munich. Located in front of the Olympia Shopping Center, where you will find everything such as supermarkets, restaurants, etc., and it leads you to the subway station and many bus lines.

The Olympic Park, Olympiahalle, Olympiastadium and the BMW Museum are 10 minutes away on the U3 line.
The central train station is about 10 minutes away with the U1 line.
Marienplatz is about 13 minutes away with the U3.
The airport is 1 hour away, with the S1.

Even though it is close to the city center, it is in a very quiet street, so great for when you want to sleep in.

We are happy to rent to individuals and couples without pets, please no party communities.

neighborhood_overview: Untergiesing and especially our street is a very young district with many creative offices, a café and some restaurants. The apartment is ideal for solo travelers, friends or couples seeking an authentic Munich experience.

10min to Marienplatz & to Octoberfest with car or 15min & 25min with Public transportation.

Within walking distance are not only all the delicious restaurants and supermarkets, but also the beautiful Isar meadows and the Forstenried Forest. Just the right place for a perfect city trip.

neighborhood_overview:
Casa Soluna is located in a quiet residential area with plenty of greenery, as there is a park with a playground right next to the house. Nevertheless, Casa Soluna is well connected. The nearest U-Bahn and tram station (with night service) are each a 3-minute walk. There is also an MVG bike station for guests who want to explore the city by bike. Free street parking is available throughout the neighborhood.

The nearest bakery and the nearest café (including ice cream in summer) are each about 4 minutes walk. A gas station with mini-supermarket is a 3-minute walk. Some restaurants and a small deli supermarket are within a 7-10 minutes' walk. Also a hairdresser, a kiosk and a dry cleaner.

description:
Ideal Oktoberfest Location: Just 17 minutes by public transport to the Oktoberfest grounds. Enjoy the convenience of a quick trip home after festive days out.

Unwind on the balcony, perfect for starting or ending your day in comfort.

Rest well in a quiet setting, away from street noise, ensuring restful nights after your Oktoberfest fun.

Perfect for Oktoberfest Fans: A comfortable base to recharge before heading back to the festivities.

We look forward to welcoming you during Oktoberfest!
neighborhood_overview:
Our neighborhood is characterized by tranquility and a charming, old courtyard with majestic trees. Here are some highlights:

Relaxing silence: Our area is known for its tranquility. After a day full of activities at Oktoberfest, you can relax here in peace.

Historic courtyard: Our courtyard with old trees gives a feeling of history and tradition. It invites you to relax in a green oasis in the middle of the city.

Local gastronomy: Discover local restaurants and cafes where you can experience Munich's cuisine and culture. Enjoy Bavarian specialties and international dishes nearby.

The neighborhood offers a successful combination of tranquility and local atmosphere, making it an ideal place for your Oktoberfest stay.

n the immediate vicinity you will find the hippest bars, a variety of international cuisine, authentic inns and the beautiful Müllersche Volksbad. A jewel of art nouveau. Technology enthusiasts will be amazed by the German Museum.

name: PRIME: city apartment for 6 | new & modern
description:
Welcome to PRIME in Munich!

This newly furnished and modern accommodation is the ideal starting point to explore Munich. With its perfect location in the most popular district of Munich, it offers you the perfect combination of comfort and accessibility.
neighborhood_overview:
Munich, especially the Maxvorstadt district, is undoubtedly one of the most popular areas in the Isar metropolis. Despite its central location, the area boasts numerous green spaces and parks, including the English Garden, one of the world's largest urban parks, the Hirschgarten, and the picturesque Nymphenburg Palace Park. Additionally, just around the corner, you'll find recommended restaurants such as the Italian "Nuovo Mondo," the Vietnamese "Little Asia," or the Greek "Athene." Grocery shopping options (Lidl, Rewe, organic supermarket) are within a 5-minute walk. Other daily necessities like pharmacies, hair salons, and gas stations are also in close proximity to the apartment. Public transportation is easily accessible on foot, making it convenient to reach the city's major attractions.
This neighborhood is an excellent choice for travelers looking to experience the authentic Munich lifestyle.

About 10 minutes away is the green lung of Munich, the English Garden. With the subway you are within 10 minutes at Odeonsplatz, the heart of Munich.

Nord Schwabing is one of Munich's most popular districts and combines urban flair with green recreation. In the cozy cafés and individual boutiques that are quick to reach, you can feel the creative spirit of the district. At the same time, the nearby extensive green spaces such as the English Garden or the Luitpoldpark invite you to relax and walk.

Thanks to the excellent connection to the subway, bus and tram, you can reach Munich city center in a few minutes. Whether art, culture or culinary delights – in North Schwabing there is something for every taste: from traditional beer gardens to modern restaurants and bars.

This neighborhood is ideal for those who want to experience Munich's culture and quality of life up close, but still appreciate a quiet and authentic residential area. By car, you can also explore the beautiful Bavarian surroundings!

• A desk for comfortable work or creative projects

name: Nice flat in Munich Schwabing

name: Sleep in the old town of Munich
description:
This apartment has everything you need to feel comfortable. From a fully equipped kitchen to the cozy sofa (can also be used as a sleeping place for a third person).
Located directly in the old town, only about 150 meters from the beautiful Maximiliansstrasse, everything is possible on foot. But otherwise the tram, S-Bahn and U-Bahn are also within walking distance. All windows face the quiet courtyard and you immediately feel comfortable in this big city oasis.

name: TheGallery
description:
TheGallery offers your family, work colleagues or friends a high-quality stay in Prinzregentenstraße.

The English Garden can be reached in 5 minutes.
The trade fair centre can be reached in 10 minutes.

What makes the 130 sqm accommodation special is its central location, the old architectural building with stucco ceilings 4.20 metres high. This is combined with a luxurious interior.
neighborhood_overview: Many restaurants and attractions

name: Deluxe Apartment - Servus Apartments
description: Welcome to Servus Apartments by Homaris, our modern serviced apartment building in the heart of Munich. Enjoy the convenience of digital check-in and experience the perfect blend of comfort and technology. Our apartments offer a seamless stay with all the amenities you need for a stress-free visit to this vibrant city. Explore Munich on your own terms, knowing you have a comfortable retreat waiting for you.
neighborhood_overview:
Sankt-Martin Straße is an enchanting street in the heart of Munich. The street is well known for its picturesque architecture, quaint shops, and cozy cafes.
All in all, Sankt-Martin-Straße is a must for anyone traveling to Munich. It offers a glimpse into the city's vibrant cultural scene and is the perfect place to soak up the atmosphere of this beautiful and historic city.

name: Charming & Cozy City Apartment in Boho Style
description:
This charming, stylish and newly renovated apartment is in an excellent location in a stunning, central district of Munich-Pasing.
The apartment is located just a 2-minute walk from Pasing train station, where you can quickly reach any destination by public transport.
The apartment is located in the direction of a quiet green park and is located on the 2nd floor. The apartment is over 40 square meters with a living/sleeping area, separate kitchen, hallway, a new bathroom and balcony.

name: Gemütliches Nest mit eigenem Bad
description: Welcome to your cozy room with great amenities. In addition to 200 /Mbit Wi-Fi, your own shower room, a coffee and tea bar in your room, a small fridge, a Teufel music system and a great view of the meadows and fields on the outskirts of Munich await you. A short 10-minute walk to the S-Bahn S3 (Lochhausen stop) connects you super quickly to downtown Munich (15 minutes by train to the main train station).

name: Wunderschöne Wohnung in Pasing
description:
This beautiful and large apartment is in the Munich-Pasing district. It is very centrally located and you can reach Munich's indoor start by bus, tram and train in 20 minutes.

The apartment is very bright and has a top equipped kitchen, bathtub, shower, dining room and a large living room.

name: Tranquility apartment
description: Enjoy Munich with the comfort and tranquility of a self-catering apartment.te lugar único e tranquilo.

name: Myroom 67 in Riem Messestadt Muenchen
description:
New High-quality apartment, fully equipped, suitable for business trip, tourism, exhibition, convenient transportation.
High-quality real wood floors with underfloor heating
Electric blinds
Fully equipped kitchen with ceramic hob, microwave with grill, fridge with freezer compartment
Fully furnished: with wardrobe, wardrobe, bed, table and chairs, lamp and flat screen TV
Shower enclosure with floor shower and real glass cabin
Washing and drying room in the basement
neighborhood_overview:
100m to the Riem-Arcade shopping center with 128 shops and 25 gastronomic facilities.
Riemer Park and swimming lake within walking distance.
10 km to Münchner Innerstadt.
Exhibition halls of the International Messe München directly opposite.

name: Penthouse im New Yorker Stil
description: Discover this stunning home, whose high-quality furnishings leave nothing to be desired. The spacious living room offers a large-size TV and world-class sound system. The balcony is great for relaxing hours. In the extensively equipped kitchen, culinary delicacies are created, and the bedroom scores with an exquisite, comfortable bed. Step into your personal New York, in the middle of the city of Munich, close to Gärtnerplatz
neighborhood_overview:
Welcome to lively Baaderstraße, located in the vibrant heart of Munich, near the famous Gärtnerplatz district. This district is known for its eclectic offer of culture, gastronomy and shopping. Just a stroll away you will find Marienplatz, the center of Munich with historical architecture and the playing of the bells at the New Town Hall. The Viktualienmarkt invites you to enjoy themselves with regional delicacies and a unique atmosphere.

Art and culture enthusiasts will appreciate the proximity to the Deutsches Museum, which is considered one of the largest science-technical museums in the world. Along the Isar, which flows only a few minutes away, you can take idyllic walks or relax on the urban beaches in the summer.

The Gärtnerplatz district is also known for its lively scene with a variety of cafes, bars and restaurants ranging from cozy brunch locations to exquisite evening venues. The cultural offer is rounded off by a selection of theaters and galleries th

description: Super quiet and in the middle of the greenery, it lives in our new, stylish serviced apartments right at the Olympiapark. Whether short- or longstay, business or leisure, everything is taken care of here: kitchenette, dining, work and living area, bathroom. Enjoy the cozy, friendly atmosphere and relax after an eventful day in Munich.

Welcome to your cozy retreat in vibrant Schwabing-West! This stylish apt features a lovely balcony, perfect for enjoying the fresh air after a day of exploring. The apt is fully equipped for a comfortable stay, with a kitchen, comfortable bedding, and a bright living space. Enjoy local cafes, and shops just minutes away.

Very quite. No windows to street.

You will stay here in Munich's most multicultural district

The super nice and cozy apartment is in the heart of Munich, in the Au - Haidhausen district, opposite the Deutsches Museum.
Within walking distance is the subway - Frauenhoferstraße, and for the S-Bahn connection, the Isartor. The apartment is embedded in a very quiet environment despite its central location. In the immediate vicinity there are cafes, restaurants and of course the local recreational town of Isar. The spacious balcony offers space for relaxation in the outdoor areas.

All furnitures are new:)

neighborhood_overview: Our neighborhood is characterized by well-kept streets, green avenues and a friendly atmosphere. Book now for a memorable stay and maximum comfort.

description:

We are an older couple who are young at heart, experienced travelers, and sociable. Also worth mentioning is our cat, who lives here in the house. name: Cosy Flat in Munich Center
description: The centrally located apartment is on the raised ground floor of a renovated old building and has 2.5 rooms as well as a bathroom with a window. The apartment is centrally located and on the upper ground floor.
neighborhood_overview:
V-market and V-Baumarkt are right next door and opposite is a gas station as well as a bakery. 5 minutes to Penny at Regerplatz and Tengelmann Auerbachstraße. Around the Ostbahnhof station, Aldi, Lidl, Norma, Müller, Tengelmann, various banks, post office, the KVR, almost food restaurants and shopping facilities such as DM and Edeka, which are also open at night and on Sundays, can be found. Along the Rosenheimerstraße towards Gasteig, some doctors and Asia shops are on a regular basis.
Haidhausen is a truly enchanting district, cozy and rather familiar, with its many small shops, vegetable stalls, cafes, bars, restaurants and fountain as well as the magnificent Wiener Platz HB Biergarten and the Isar around the corner.
Also super central: Gasteig, Müllersches Volksbad, Muffathalle + Ampere, factory district with restaurants and fitness offers, German museum and cinemas are very close (within a maximum of one S-Bahn station).

neighborhood_overview:
Entdecken Sie den urbanen Charme und die moderne Lebensweise in einem lebendigen, aber dennoch entspannten Stadtviertel Münchens. Das Quartier in Laim, ein Stadtteil mit historischem Hintergrund und einer pulsierenden Gemeinschaft von rund 56.000 Einwohnern, ist ein perfektes Beispiel für die harmonische Verbindung von Tradition und Moderne. Genießen Sie die Nähe zu belebten Nachbarschaften wie der Schwanthalerhöhe und attraktiven Grünflächen wie dem Westpark und dem Nymphenburger Schlosspark.

Die Lage ist besonders attraktiv für Kurzzeitmieter: Direkt vor Ihrer Haustür befindet sich die U-Bahnstation Westendstraße, was Ihnen eine exzellente Verkehrsanbindung bietet. Egal, ob Sie in die Innenstadt, zur Theresienwiese oder zu den idyllischen Seen im Münchner Westen möchten – von hier aus erreichen Sie Ihr Ziel in kürzester Zeit.

Das Münchener Westend, eines der trendigsten Viertel der Stadt, ist nur einen Katzensprung entfernt. Hier erwartet Sie eine bunte Mischung

neighborhood_overview: Haidhausen, located just east of the city center, is one of the prettiest districts in Munich. It's often referred to as the “French Quarter.” Streets here in Haidhausen have French names and the layout is similar to cities in France.You can see rows of trees symmetrically framing the square, neatly mown grass, colourful flower beds bordering greens to the east and west and a fountain burbling in the middle – all against a backdrop of historic buildings painted in pink, yellow and dusty blue. Is this the Place des Vosges? No, it’s actually Bordeauxplatz in Haidhausen – not as glamorous as Paris nor as ornate as Bordeaux itself, but cosier, quieter, more unpretentious.

The bedrooms feature comfortable double beds. Additionally, the apartment offers fast Wi-Fi, modern smart TVs, and a fully equipped kitchen. The highlight is the rooftop terrace with a dining area.

Free parking is available.

name: Global Living: Kitchen | Patio | Munich
description:
The accommodation is located in the Schwabing district, in the northern part of Munich.

The apartment can accommodate up to 4 guests.

The sleeping and living area features a comfortable double bed and a sofa bed. Additionally, the apartment offers fast Wi-Fi, modern smart TVs, and a fully equipped kitchen. The highlight is the rooftop terrace with a dining area.

Free parking is available.

name: HomelyStay SerenityGreens Studio
description: Our stylish apartment in Munich-Pasing combines modern comfort with a cozy atmosphere and is suitable for both short and long-term stays in Munich. Furnished with great attention to detail, the 50 m² studio offers cozy sleeping arrangements for up to 4 people, a kitchen and a private bathroom. After an eventful day in the vibrant city or in the peaceful countryside, you can feel at home and relax here.
neighborhood_overview: The area surrounding the apartment in Landsberger Straße in Munich-Pasing is characterized by a lively mix of cultural sights and relaxing green spaces. The picturesque moated castle "Blutenburg" with its historic charm and Pasing's Marienplatz with its diverse range of stores, restaurants and cafés are in the immediate vicinity. For nature lovers, the nearby Westpark offers an idyllic setting for a walk or a picnic. Cultural highlights such as the Pasinger Fabrik, a center for art and culture, are also within easy reach.

name: Ruhig, hell und zentral
description:
The room is bright and very quiet as the apartment is located in the back building. At the same time, the subway station Brudermühlstraße (U3) is right outside the front door and you can reach Marienplatz in 10 minutes by subway. The exhibition center can be reached in 35 minutes by subway. The Isar is a stone's throw away and invites you to take a walk.
There are all shops and very good restaurants right outside the front door.
neighborhood_overview:
️ Central location: Subway at your doorstep
🏞️ Nature: 5 min walk to the Isar
🎶 Culture: Gasteig HP8 Isarphilarmonie
🛒 Shopping: Edeka, organic shops, pharmacy, post office
👩🏻‍🍳 Restaurants: Italian, Indian, Turkish, Asian

name: Ruhige, zentrale Wohnung in München
description: I rent out my cozy, bright 2-room apartment. It is quiet but still central. The apartment is fully furnished, there is a double bed and a sofa bed in the living room. Dishes, washing machine is all available and also plenty of storage space for your own things. Supermarkets, restaurants and the Isar river are all in the immediate vicinity. The U-Bahn [subway] is 200 meters away. In 8 minutes you are at Marienplatz.

name: The Eye over Munich
description: This attic as a gallery apartment is unique in Munich. With views over the Isar, Munich and then the view of the mountains. The magical, round window is an eye-catcher/ lookout both day and night!  The apartment is completely secluded, has a large roof terrace, as well as a dream kitchen . The bedrooms are quiet and there are two great bathrooms with also a fantastic view over Munich. The apartment does not have an elevator.

name: Gemütliche Rückzugsoase
description: Small but nice - You have your own area with private bathroom in a quiet house in the heart of Trudering. In just a three-minute walk you will find everything you need: a bakery, groceries, several restaurants and public transport to the city center or the exhibition grounds. You will find a parking space right outside the door.

name: Giesing - Near Oktoberfest and Isar - 2 BR
description:
Dear guests,

Welcome to my beautiful, newly renovated apartment directly at the Isar river, in the beautiful Giesing area.

The local recreation area along the Isar is only a 3-minute walk away.

The apartment consists of 2 bedrooms, a large eat-in kitchen and a spacious bathroom.

The subway station "Candidplatz" is only a 4-minute walk away and Munich Central Station can be reached within 6 minutes.

The Oktoberfest can be reached within 15 minutes by public transportation.

1 private 13m2 room in shared house for holidays, working trips or stop overs.
With 4 persons the room is quite packed but still functional.
- 2 bunk beds
- quiet area
- near highway A8
- 1 shared kitchen, 1,5 shared bathrooms, garden
- the house has 5 private rooms with partially long term and Airbnb guests.
- WiFi

- 30 Mins: Messestadt Ost

- restaurants & supermarket nearby

name: Herrliche Terrassenwohnung
