This great place is anything but usual.
We have both a great layout and I have the same space available as a magnificent roof terrace.
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is within walking distance of Pasinger Bahnhof, Nymphenburg Castle and Blutenburg.
There is also a bus directly in a few steps away from the apartment. Supermarket, pharmacy, etc. are a 3-minute walk away. The Pasinger Arcades can also be found at a short distance.

name: Triple Apartment - Servus Apartments
description: Welcome to Servus Apartments by Homaris, our modern serviced apartment building in the heart of Munich. Enjoy the convenience of digital check-in and experience the perfect blend of comfort and technology. Our apartments offer a seamless stay with all the amenities you need for a stress-free visit to this vibrant city. Explore Munich on your own terms, knowing you have a comfortable retreat waiting for you.
neighborhood_overview:
Sankt-Martin Straße is an enchanting street in the heart of Munich. The street is well known for its picturesque architecture, quaint shops, and cozy cafes.
All in all, Sankt-Martin-Straße is a must for anyone traveling to Munich. It offers a glimpse into the city's vibrant cultural scene and is the perfect place to soak up the atmosphere of this beautiful and historic city.

name: Quiet room in shared flat 5m Ubahn fromMainStation
description:
This is a shared place. Please read all description and consider before booking.

My boyfriend and I live in West-Schwabing, a historic area with good neighbors, 5 mins with the Ubahn away from Hauptbahnhof. The flat is 3-5 mins walk to the Ubahn Station Hohenzollernplatz.

Your room is private. It's on the 4-floor with a lift, facing the indoor yard so very quite at night. You have direct access to our balcony, for a morning coffee, for a smoke, or just relaxing.

name: Cozy Room near City Center
description: Enjoy the simple life at this quiet and centrally located home. At your disposal are a cozy room with sleeping facilities for up to 4 people, a fully equipped kitchen, as well as a bathroom with bathtub. Within a few minutes' walk, you are at Max-Weber-Platz. From there you are very flexible with public transport. The magnificent Maximilians facilities, famous for the Peace Angel, are also within walking distance.

name: 2 Zimmer Wohnung am Wettersteinplatz
description: 2 bedroom apartment at Wettersteinplatz directly on the tram. It has a kitchen alcove with oven and stove.

name: Hotel Kriemhild - Einzelzimmer
neighborhood_overview: Nymphenburg Palace and the Royal Hirschgarten - Europe's largest beer garden - are within walking distance of the hotel. In the immediate vicinity you will also find good shopping facilities as well as numerous national and international restaurants. In the middle of the vibrant center of the state capital and Munich Central Station, you can reach it in just 15 minutes by public transport. There is also a very good connection from the hotel to the exhibition grounds, the airport and the lake and recreational areas in the Munich area.

name: 95qm am schönen Isarhochufer
description:
Our fully equipped apartment is close to the Isar, a few minutes' walk to the Isarhochufer. There is a very good public connection during the day as well as at night (tram/night tram).
The green, quiet location, loving furnishings and public access make our accommodation the ideal place for couples and families who want to combine a city trip with a little relaxation.
Walks and/or bike rides on the Isar offer a nice balance to the Munich city.

name: Cozy, central apartment
description:
Enjoy the beautiful Munich life in this quiet and centrally located apartment.

Enjoy the beautiful Munich urban life in a central, quiet area next to the river, Isar.
The flat has 50 square metres, is beautifully bright the whole day and very quiet. The subway station „Kolumbusplatz“ is directly around the corner - so you will be super easy everywhere in the city. Furthermore the Isar is only 4 minutes walking distance- so you are ready to explore nature in Munich?

16 sqm private room with shared kitchen, bathroom, and balcony.

Queen-size bed.
Bed linen, towels, gel and shampoo are provided

To:

description:
Welcome to Innerkoflerstraße. Your spacious and just renovated room is in the attic and is super bright through the large skylight. Everything you need is available, from storage facilities, your own small library to the height-adjustable desk.
The room is part of a large house that also provides you with access to a kitchen, a large living room and a large garden with barbecue.

You will be staying in our detached house, which we rent out when we travel ourselves. In the attic there is a large (25 sqm) bedroom.

10 min highway
Restaurants, swimming lakes and Olympic grounds are nearby.

The apartment is in the center of Munich, in the Haidhausen bohemian district. There are many cafes, restaurants and bars nearby. S-Bahn (suburban train) are only 100 meters away.

I'm renting out my whole apartment.

description: The apartment is centrally located in a quiet street in one of the most scenic, most central areas of Munich. Facing the stunning architecture of the historical gallery of arts, the apartment is just a one minute walk away from the Ludwigstraße and the Peace Arc. Within walking distance are famous sights such as Marienplatz (10 min), Englischer Garten (5 min), or Hofgarten (5 min). Also, the area boasts a rich culinary scene and plenty of traditional pubs and stylish bars.

name: Charmantes Zimmer München West
description: Take a break and relax in this quiet room with antique charm in 80999 Munich West.

name: ※ Flatista Homes - Jungle House ※ 4 Guests ※ 2 BR
description:
! New opening April 2024 !

Dear guests,
welcome to Flatista Homes - Jungle House directly at the U- & S-Bahn station Munich-Trudering. The accommodation offers you 2 bedrooms and a unique living/dining area. In addition to a fully equipped kitchen and bathroom, there is an outdoor terrace with seating in the form of two swings. It is only 11 minutes to Marienplatz, 15 minutes to the main train station and 5 minutes to the Munich Trade Fair.

name: Cozy City Center Accomodation
description:
Between City Center and English Garden you have the perfect base to explore the heart of Munich.
A small modern room perfect for single travellers that want to be right in the center of Maxvorstadt with its museums, the university area with bars and restaurants as well as downtown Munich with Odeonsplatz, Marienplatz, Viktualienmarkt and more. The English Garden starts right behind te house and the Surfer Spot is just down the road. No transportation needed to see most of Munich's attractions.

name: ※ Flatista Homes - Penthouse※ 8 Gäste※ Rooftop Gym
description:
Dear guests,
welcome to Flatista Homes - Penthouse directly at the subway & S-Bahn station Munich-Trudering. The property offers 4 bedrooms and a large living/dining area. In addition to a fully equipped kitchen and two bathrooms, there is a large terrace with brick BBQ and an outdoor gym. You can drive to Marienplatz in just 11 minutes, to the main train station in 15 minutes or to Messe München in 5 minutes.

name: Top Wohnung Glockenbachviertel
description:
Enjoy the colorful life in the quiet and centrally located accommodation in the middle of the best district of Munich, the Glockenbachviertel.
5 min. to Marienplatz, 5 min. to the Isar, best connection by public transport.
Right out of the house you will find a diverse gastronomy culture, with unique restaurants, cafes, bars.
Premium double bed (water bed), large sofa bed, spacious living room with dining table, fully equipped kitchen, balcony to the quiet courtyard west side.

name: Studio

Our brand new studios can host up to 2
People and are both for a short stay

The area is adorned with historic buildings, boutiques, supermarkets, restaurants and trendy cafes all while being just steps away from the city's iconic landmarks.

- Königsplatz: Just a 10-minute walk away, Königsplatz is a stunning square inspired by classical Greek architecture. It’s home to three major museums—the Glyptothek, the Staatliche Antikensammlungen (State Collection of Antiquities), and the Lenbachhaus (known for its Blue Rider art collection). Great for art lovers and history buffs!
- Munich’s Art Quarter (Kunstareal): A little further on, Munich’s “Kunstareal” is home to museums like the Alte Pinakothek, Neue Pinakothek, and the Pinakothek der Moderne, which feature art from the Renaissance to modern times.

The room is located in a 5-family house on the top floor.
Free wi-fi

name: Gemütliche Wohnung in Giesing
description:
The apartment is very bright and has four beds, one kitchen and one bathroom. The balcony is south-facing and great for relaxing. The apartment is also suitable for families and children are welcome :)

The subway and tram (Wettersteinplatz) are about 200 m away. The main train station can be reached in about 10-15 minutes.

name: Bogenhausen: Dach-Atelier-Apt,  2DB, KDB, für 4 P
description: Beautiful rooftop studio on the 2nd floor of a well-kept residential building overlooking the gardens. Close to NH Hotel München Messe. Upscale in the bathroom and kitchen. All floors with parquet or tiles.  1 bedroom with work corner, 1 bedroom romantically under sloping roof with sliding doors.  Dimensions of beds each 140x200 cm. Great connection by public transport: 3 bus lines in 20 meters, S-Bahn and tram in 700 meters. Time to Marienplatz about 20 minutes to Theresienwiese about 25 minutes. Garage space possible if still available.

name: In nur 7 min. Zum Oktoberfest
description:
Bright 17 sqm room; cozy 160cm bed; desk
• Apartment: balcony; 2 bathrooms; kitchen; dining room
• Top location: 7 minutes to the Wiesn (U-Bahn); 10 minutes
to Central Station
• Subway, tram, bus in front of the door
• Supermarkets nearby; free parking
• Quiet location on the 1st floor
Enjoy Oktoberfest up close and come back to your cozy home. Central, yet quiet.
Looking forward to seeing you soon! 🌞

name: Zimmer mit Balkon im Grünen
description: Spacious room with balcony in historic villa colony; kitchen with dining room can be used; the Munich-Pasing S-Bahn station is just a 10-minute walk away; the surroundings of the train station offer many shopping opportunities.

name: 15 Minutes to Octoberfest Room in centr. apartment
description: Servus Zusammen 🥨 15 minutes to Octoberfest / 15 minutes downtown by public transportation/ nice area with restaurants and bars

name: Souterrain München Harlaching, 65qm
description: Basement apartment, about 65 sqm in the magnificent south of Munich, large bedroom with walk-in closet, large bathroom with shower, toilet and small dishwasher. Hallway (without windows) with kitchen island* microwave, espresso machine, small fridge and basic equipment. Wonderfully located in a large green square, a 4-minute walk to the tram. Parking in the area is free. Hospitals, cafes and shops for everyday needs within walking distance. Non-smoking apartment, No parties!
neighborhood_overview:
In front of the house is a small park with a meadow, trees and two table tennis tables.

Harlaching was considered Munich's garden suburb. Even Empress Sissi spent her summer vacation in the Menterschwaige.

Isar with the Flaucher Auen and the zoo are within walking distance. Most of the time you can swim wonderfully in the Isar. Some even do it in winter!!
Other direction: Perlacher Forst, also wonderful for walking.

Take the 25 tram to Bavaria Filmstadt and take a film tour.

name: Zentral & Modern im Glockenbach
description: The property is centrally located in the beautiful and popular Glockenbach district with many bars & restaurants. The Isar is only 3 minutes away for swimming, sunbathing or walking. The famous Viktualienmarkt is within walking distance as well as other sights in the old town (e.g. Marienplatz, Alter Peter, Odeonsplatz). You're definitely in the heart of the city. The U-Bahn [subway] is only 5 minutes away, and the main train station is 10 minutes away by public transport.

name: Einzimmerwohnung an der Isar
description:
Small one-room apartment (28 square meters) in the most beautiful location (Glockenbachviertel) with bright kitchen, bathroom, dining table, sofa and a large bed (160 x 200 m). Public transport is just around the corner.

The area is very lively and relatively centrally located, there are many bars, cafes and shops nearby. In addition, the Isar is only 3 minutes by foot. There you can relax in the sun or get something from the famous kiosk.

name: Traumwohnung in der Isarvorstadt
description:
The large apartment is very centrally located near the Isar directly south of the Glockenbach district in the so-called Dreimühlenviertel. Marienplatz is within walking distance. Many restaurants and bars characterize this district of old buildings. The apartment offers three rooms, a large kitchen and a spacious bathroom.
Enjoy the simple life at this quiet and centrally located home.

name: Central Spot near MunichFreiheit
description: Your family will be close to everything when you stay at this centrally-located place.  easy access to the city center and all its attractions. Enjoy the convenience of being just a short walk or metro ride away from top sights, shopping, dining, and entertainment. The apartment features a comfortable king-size bed, ensuring a restful night's sleep. Ideal for both short and long stays, our home provides all the comforts you need for a relaxing visit to Munich.

name: Lichtdurchflutete Wohnung
description: Welcome to a charming 2-room apartment. Enjoy bright rooms and a balcony with a green view. The fully equipped kitchen and cozy living room invite you to linger. The bedroom offers peace and comfort. Ideally located, cafes, restaurants and attractions are just a short walk away. Perfect for couples or business travelers looking for stylish and comfortable accommodation.

name: Confortable Est Munich
description:
Cozy Modern apparement. Central near public transport. 10 min walk to Ostbahnhof.
1 min walk to supermarket. 5 min walk to lively area (Restaurants Bars…)
full equipped and functional.

name: Quite & Light Balcony flat for groups
description:
Take it easy at this unique and tranquil getaway right in the middle of Schwabing. This cozy and modern renovated studio apartment offers a big outdoor space to eat, work and relax.

It is extremely quite, fully furnished and fully serviced with everything you need including Nespresso machine, fully equipped kitchen, sheets etc.

Laundry with washer and dryer in basement.

Subway stop (U2) is only 3 minutes walk away.

name: Central & Quiet Apartment with Balcony
description: The apartment is centrally located and very quiet. Nearby, you'll find numerous small bars and shopping options. Public transport, including the Maillingerstraße U-Bahn station, allows you to reach the city center in just 5 minutes. Maxvorstadt is a trendy residential area, making it easy to access all the major attractions.

name: Cozy stay in southern center of Munich
description:
*Oktoberfest can be reached in 30 minutes on foot or 15 minutes by public transport*


Enjoy this lovingly furnished apartment in Sendling with balcony, double bed, sofa bed, kitchen, bathtub and relaxing furnishings. U6, S7 and train connection to the south can be reached within 6 minutes on foot. The bus is about a 1-minute walk.
Despite the central location, it is super quiet and relaxing.

Shelves and cabinets will be at your disposal.

name: Small Central Studio
description: My cute little place can fit two people, has a big bed, a small kitchen in the same room and a bathroom with a bathtub. It is a little old but has everything you need. The best thing is the location. It lies very centrally, there are supermarkets and a metro station in less than 5min. walking distance and you can get to all the important places in less than 20 minutes by metro e.g. Englischer Garten or Marienplatz. The area is quiet and you have a great view onto the trees of a schoolyard.

name: Luxuriöse Dachgeschosswohnung
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home.
7 min from Karslplatz Stachus
10 min from Central Station
15 min from Theresienwiese/Oktoberfest
20 min from the Olympic Hall

name: Nice room in the Heart of Munich
description: Perfectly located in the center of munich

name: Privat Zimmer+Bad, Messestadt West (Messe/ICM)
description:
Small private, lockable room with private bathroom, 6-minute walk from Messestadt West U-Bahn [subway] station.
By bus in 2 minutes to the Messestadt West, in 4 minutes to the Messestadt Ost.
Shopping center, restaurants, trade fair, ICM, cultural center, park, lake - all close by.

Nice little room with key to lock and a small private bathroom.
Minutes away from Messestadt West and 4 minutes by bus to Messestadt Ost. walking distance to BAUMA (10 minutes),
Shopping mall, restaurants, park, lake

name: Private Room near Partnachplatz U6 close to center
description: The apartment is at the end of a small street in a very quiet area. The nearest metro is 2 minutes walking and only 6 stops from Marienplatz. Supermarkets, pharmacies and various restaurants are also nearby. The beautiful Westpark is also an 8-minute walk. Please note that me and my girlfriend will probably be there in the apartment during your stay but don't worry you have your peace :)

name: 1 Bedroom apartment in the city center
description:
Welcome to your contemporary urban retreat in Munich, perfectly located just a 7-minute walk from the city’s central station. Ideal for both short and extended stays, it comfortably sleeps four guests with a queen-sized bed and a sofa bed.

Experience the ease of having a grocery store right on the ground level of the building—perfect for quick snacks or ingredients to cook a meal in the well-equipped kitchen.

-Modern Bathroom with washing machine

-Smart Tv

-High Speed WiFi

name: Apartment with Balcony
description:
This bright apartment is 24m² and includes a kitchen, balcony, WC, and Wi-Fi. There is also a laundry room available for use, though it requires payment.

Located not far from the city, this cozy space offers a bright place to sleep, even on rainy days.

name: Kleines Doppelzimmer, La Mansion
description: The small double room at La Mansion Vi Vadi Hotel is equipped with a fantastic TRECA luxury bed. The oak floor and underfloor heating ensure a special feel-good atmosphere. There are also a desk and a closet with a safe. Reception is open 24 hours. Fast Wi-Fi is included. Breakfast is offered with extra charge. Parking is available in the hotel underground car park.

name: Schönes Zimmer an der U6
description:
Room in a quiet location with connections by U6 and bus.

The furnished room is currently free until a new roommate moves in and can be rented during this time. The green sun balcony is accessible from my room & can be used when I am not around.

Women's flat. The room is for women, couples, families and children. In addition, deaf people are welcome :)
Important: Kelly the cat lives in the apartment.

name: Schöne Wohnung in München Pasing
description: Lovely apartment with private entrance for one or two people. In Munich Pasing in a quiet residential area. Via the S-Bahn connection within a few minutes to the city center, Oktoberfest or the lakes in the south of Munich

name: Zimmer in Traumwohnung, zentral
description:
Room in fantastic apartment in a central location. Super scenic neighborhood. Subway 100m away. 2 stations to Marienplatz. Isarnhe. Theater, cinema, gastronomy all right around the corner. Nevertheless, quiet location to the huge courtyard with old trees. Rooftop shared use. The landlord is a well-known artist and when he is there, he might even go to one of the cool insider tips you can get.
Kitchen shared use for breakfast. Private bathroom + toilet.

name: Centric, quiet+cozy 2,5-room-apartment
description:
Enjoy the beautiful french quarters of Haidhausen with lots of small shops, restaurants and bars in a quiet, very central (4min to Ostbahnhof) and cozily stylish equipped apartment. The flat is fully furnished with everything you need. There is one bedroom with a big, comfortable bed and a big sleeping couch / sofa bed in the livingroom. No pets, parties or smoking allowed.
I am renting out my beautiful, quiet flat for Oktoberfest to responsible people who take good care of my space.

name: 2 Zimmer Wohnung Giesing
description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home.

name: Spacious room in Maxvorstadt
description: Peaceful, spacious and luminous room in a two-bedroom apartment. The room has a double bed and a sofa bed. The kitchen is fully equipped with a fridge, an oven, a toaster and a coffee machine. The toilet and the shower are in separated rooms, offering more flexibility.

name: Appartement 5min Oktoberfest
description: The apartment is located in the beautiful district of Schwanthaler Höhe/Westend directly on the Theresienwiese. From the main train station you can take 2 stations by U-Bahn [subway] or tram to the neighborhood. Oktoberfest is a 5-minute walk away and the beautiful Westpark is also always worth a walk. The Westend is well equipped with pubs, bars and restaurants and has a cozy and family atmosphere.

name: Cosy apartment close to city center, Maxvorstadt
description:
Welcome to my cozy and quiet city apartment in the heart of Munich!

Highlights:

- Central location: Within walking distance to sights, restaurants, cafés, and public transport
- Comfort: Comfortable bed in a quiet courtyard-facing room
- Bathroom with bathtub
- Kitchen
- Wi-Fi
- Sunny balcony to relax
- Washer and dryer on the ground floor (coin-operated)
- Basic toiletries and hairdryer included

Enjoy a comfortable and unforgettable stay in Munich!

name: Wohnung Olympiazentrum
description:
This cozy 2-room apartment is ideally situated.
You can reach:
- Edeka with butcher and bakery in 5 minutes by foot
- Olympic shopping center in 10 minutes on foot.
- Olympiazentrum metro station: 8 minute walk
- To Marienplatz (center) by metro: 20 minutes
- Tasty restaurant nearby: 2 min walk

Two beds are available to guests (2-4 people):
1) 140x200cm - bed in the bedroom
2) 160x200cm (couch after unfolding) - bed in the living room

Free parking on the street

name: Large apartment in the heart of Munich
description:
Welcome to our beautiful, centrally located apartment in Munich's popular Glockenbachviertel! 💖

Spanning a spacious 150 m², it offers everything your heart desires and is the perfect place for families or groups of friends. With six rooms, including five cozy bedrooms, it comfortably accommodates up to ten people. The large living and dining area with a fully equipped kitchen is the ideal place for shared meals.

name: Central Sunny Escape with Balcony
description: Welcome to our sunny, quiet flat in the heart of Maxvorstadt! Enjoy a bright space with a lovely balcony, perfect for relaxing. Located in the vibrant Museums Quarter, you'll be steps away from top restaurants, bars, and cultural sites. Excellent public transport links, just 7 minutes to the central station by subway. Your perfect urban retreat awaits!

name: Schöne Unterkunft nähe Oktoberfest
description: Cozy accommodation with garden and terrace. The accommodation consists of a total of 2 rooms, a bathroom and a kitchen. Very central yet in a quiet backyard.

name: Schöne Dachgeschosswohnung im Zentrum
description: The apartment is located in the vibrant Maxvorstadt-Schwabing district, known for its vibrant atmosphere and cultural diversity. Here you will find an abundance of charming cafes, trendy bars and fascinating galleries just waiting to be discovered by you. The proximity to the Theresienwiese makes the apartment particularly attractive for visitors to Oktoberfest . The English Garden is also a short walk away
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is located in the vibrant Maxvorstadt-Schwabing district, known for its vibrant atmosphere and cultural diversity. Here you will find an abundance of charming cafes, trendy bars and fascinating galleries just waiting to be discovered by you. The proximity to the Theresienwiese makes the apartment particularly attractive for Oktoberfest visitors - in just a few minutes you are in the middle of the action. The English Garden, one of the largest city parks in the world, is also a short walk away and invites you to relaxing moments in the countryside.

Experience Munich at its best in our charming attic apartment – your ideal place to relax and enjoy during Oktoberfest and beyond!

We are looking forward to your stay!

name: NEU! Traumwohnung am Prinzregentenplatz!
description: Enjoy the 65 sqm fully equipped 2.5-room apartment on Prinzregentenplatz. Stylishly furnished with new bathroom with tub, an extensive kitchen-living room and balcony. Ideal for business trips and also longer vacation stays in and around Munich. From this centrally located home, you'll be in all the important places in no time. The apartment is on the third floor. There is no elevator. Please note this when booking!

name: *SweetHome* Küche, Stellplatz, WLAN, Nähe S-Bahn
description:
Welcome to SWEETHOME in Munich/Solln!

Our apartment has everything you need for a nice stay:

→ 3 comfortable box spring beds (1.60 and 1.80 x 2.00 m)
→ NESPRESSO coffee
→ smart tv
→ full kitchen
→ Reserved parking space in front of the house

Everything is very new, modern and tastefully decorated.

name: Penthouse mit Dachterrasse am Friedensengel
description:
This unique home has a style of its own.
Modern meets classical.
A beautiful outdoor area next to the museum "Villa Stuck" with a bar and barbecue for a wonderful time for two. This together with art and flowers creates an atmosphere of space that conveys joy and well-being.
For me, it is heaven on earth and in the middle of Munich, with a view of the Angel of Peace.

name: Oase in München: stilvolle ruhige Wohnung
description:
Very quiet and cozy feel-good oasis with lots of space - ideal for the Adele concert or the Wiesn!
The apartment has a large sun balcony that invites you to have breakfast.

You can walk to a supermarket and bakery (directly opposite) as well as the two major subway lines U1 and U3, which take you everywhere within 15 minutes (main train station, Marienplatz, etc.)

name: 1 schönes Zimmer zum Übernachte
description: Relax in this special and quiet space.

name: Cozy room in design flat
description:
You‘ve found the perfect room for your Munich getaway!

Check out one of the cute cafés in the area, enjoy art museums or explore the heart of Schwabing by talking a walk through Englischer Garten - there‘s lots to see!
**
Be aware that you’ll have your separate bedroom and will be sharing the kitchen and bathroom with me. Also please note that the flat contains all of my belongings (eg clothes in the wardrobe etc.).
**
I’m looking forward to meeting and hosting you!

name: Zentrale zi Wohnung in Trudering
description:
we offer (family with 2 children) 1 room in our 3 room apartment for rent.
Apartment is centrally located near U/ S-Bahn stop (about 500m) as well as bus stop with numerous connections.
Apartment consists of an equipped kitchen, large living room with green area views, loggia , 2 bathrooms ( toilet) , as well as children's room and bedroom with courtyard views.
Guests get their own room (bed 1.6x2m, cupboard, dresser and work table.

we sleep in the children's room..

name: NEU: Stilvolle Wohnung am Englischen Garten & Isar
description: Everything for your baby/toddler if you need!

name: Stilvolles modernes Apartment
description:
Located in a quiet neighborhood, this charming apartment offers private parking right outside the door, as well as its own entrance.
The fully equipped apartment has a modern kitchen, a fully equipped bathroom, and a large living room and bedroom that offers you plenty of space and comfort.
Enjoy the tranquility and comfort of this perfectly appointed retreat.

name: 2 Zimmer Wohnung in München Villenkolonie
description:
Charming basement apartment in a prime location with direct access to the garden.
Well connected By subway, tram and bus.
Can accommodate 4 guests. Bedroom with large bed and desk. Living room/kitchen with fold-out double bed sofa. Parquet floors in all rooms except bathrooms. Bathroom with floor heating, shower, washing machine.
Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher and strainer espresso machine. Garden with garden furniture for common use. Welcome :D

name: Gemütliche Wohnung mit Terrasse
description:
🛍️ Edeka directly across the street – shop quickly!
🏡 Small garden with furniture – your green break!
🌼 Quiet courtyard to relax.
☕️ Coffee machine (espresso + capsule) for your favorite coffee.
🫖 Kettle & tea included.
🧖‍♀️☑️ Towels are provided!
🧺 Washer + dryer in apartment.
📺 Smart TV with Netflix, Disney+ & Co.
🧼🫧🧹 Dyson vacuum cleaner for clean floors.
🚗🅿️ Free parking in the side street.

name: Zimmer in München Übernachtung
description: Enjoy a pleasant stay in this quiet and centrally located accommodation.

name: Room with balcony
description:
Spacious 3-room apartment in central Munich.
Enjoy summer evenings on the glazed balcony. Conveniently located just 20 minutes from the city center.

Feel free to book your stay and experience the best of Munich living! 🌟

name: Downtown und Stylish
description:
In the middle of Munich's young center.

Going out to cool bars, shopping in hip stores, lingering in famous beer gardens or recharging in the largest park, the "English Garden." This and much more are all in the immediate vicinity, because my apartment is in a prime urban location.

My newly renovated and fully equipped apartment has many clever solutions that create a certain spaciousness in a small space.
neighborhood_overview:
You look directly at the back of the Ludwig Maximilian University.

The immediate neighborhood is student and artistic.

Many restaurants, cafes, a small theater, also boutiques and galleries...

name: Accommodation (bed)(hostel)near Scheidplatz subway
description: Please read the description below 👇

name: Studio in the center of Munich
description:
1-room apartment in the center of Munich with a nice balcony and separate bathroom. In the apartment there is a kitchenette, a spacious wardrobe, TV, dining table and a sofabed for 2 people. On the balcony there is a cozy place to have breakfast.

The apartment is 2 subway stations away from Marienplatz or 15 minutes walk to Isartor. There are numerous bars, cafes and restaurants in the area, as well as many shopping facilities.

name: Wohnung in Obergiesing
description: Our apartment is located just a few steps away on foot from the Untersbergstraße stop of the U2 line, very convenient to the center (10 min). It is located in the Obergiesing district, a quiet, non-touristy area where it is possible to discover hidden and lesser-known corners of the city. The apartment has a kitchen-living room, a bathroom and a bedroom. Great for a couple.

name: Kuscheliges Nest über München
description: In the middle of the city and yet so green. On the sixth floor, this pretty nest is right next to Wilrampark. The Karl-Preis-Platz subway stop is right around the corner. Kitchen and bathroom are very bright and spacious for a 1.5-room apartment. Through the gallery as a cozy sleeping area, the living room offers space for social coziness.

name: Zentral gelegen
description:
Enjoy this quiet and centrally located place in the center.
About 10 minute walk to Oktoberfest. 5 minute walk
several discount stores, 3 minutes to the subway, 5 minutes to the bus.

name: Menas Home
description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally located accommodation.  In the middle of Westpark with a lake and beer gardens, the perfect combination.  Nevertheless, you can reach the center of Marienplatz or the main train station in about 15 minutes by public transport.  The Oktoberfest is 1.5 km away, can be reached by bus in 5 min / 2 stops.

name: Wohnung, 10min vom Oktoberfest
description:
Entire apartment, 10 min to Oktoberfest with MVV. (right outside the front door)
Bedroom, living room, bathroom,kitchen, toilet
Car parking on request

name: Zimmer in Schwabing
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home. Private room in 3-room apartment in the middle of Schwabing at the tram station Elisabethplatz.

The double bed in the bedroom is 1.40 m wide and 2.00 m long.

name: Vollmöblierte Ein-Zimmerwohnung in Pasing
description:
Quiet, fully furnished apartment in Pasing near the green Pasing city park with excellent connections to downtown.
The accommodation offers accommodation for 3 people (2 in bed, on the couch)

name: Guest room of Lee
description: Relax in this centrally-located yet quiet home.

name: BeckHomes: 2BR: new, cozy apartment for 5 people
description:
The 65 sqm, completely newly furnished accommodation offers a beautiful bedroom, a spacious living and dining area and a fully equipped kitchen.
The new bathroom has a walk-in shower.
The cozy and quiet balcony also invites you to relax.

The completely newly furnished accommodation offers a beautiful bedroom, a spacious living and dining area, as well as a fully equipped kitchen.
The new bathroom offers a walk-in shower.
In addition, the cozy and quiet balcony invites you to relax.

name: Luxury Apt im Herzen von München
description:
Welcome to our stylish studio apartment overlooking the Isar Park!

This cozy accommodation offers you everything you need for a comfortable stay: an open plan living/sleeping area, fully equipped kitchen, welcoming hallway and modern bathroom.

Enjoy the central location and the proximity to the Isar, ideal for walks and outdoor relaxation.

Perfect for couples or single travelers who want to experience the vibrant life of Munich!

name: Ruhiges Zimmer m. Schlafsofa
description:
Forget your worries at this spacious and quiet place in a pleasant, upscale residential area

- Total 2 rooms for 2 people (pull-out beds) - to be booked separately - only one room can be booked here
- Bed linen and towels can be provided
- Breakfast can be added according to your own wishes with additional charge
are offered. There is also a cafe nearby.
- Free parking is available
- Direct public transport connection to the Wiesn (approx. 20 min and trade fair)

INFO: Household with 2 cats and 1 dog

name: Wohnung -Olympia
description: Luxuriously renovated apartment. The spacious living/sleeping area, the small kitchen with stove, coffee machine, dishwasher and large fridge, as well as the modern bathroom offer the utmost comfort. Highlight: The breathtaking sunset view. Direct access to the subway (U1, U3, U7) through the shopping center (50 meters). Olympic Park and Olympic Stadium with many recreational opportunities are just around the corner. Charging station for electric cars available.

name: luxuriöse - gemütliche Wohnung
description:
We are currently on vacation. You want to go on vacation too? Then that's a perfect fit!
Zoé (2 years), Sandra and I (Jochen) are currently traveling in Italy with our old VW Bully and therefore offer our 4 walls for rent.
The apartment is fantastic, stylishly furnished with everything you need, ideally located and spacious for up to 5 people.
Behind the house is a shared garden with some play equipment :-)

name: Schöne Einzimmerwohnung
description: The nice studio is located in the heart of Giesing directly on Silberhornstr (5 minutes to the subway). You are quickly downtown and the Theresienwiese is within walking distance (30 min walk, 10 min by bike). There is a small balcony and around are lots of nice bars and resteraunts

name: Spacious one bedroom suite in architecture house
description:
Nice and cosy maisonette one bedroom suite in a quiet and beautiful neighborhood close to Messe, Airport, Octoberfest, English Garden.
Free parking in front of the house, Tram is in walking distance and Metro U4 is easy to reach so you can get to all city attractions in 10 - 15 minutes. There is a beautiful park around the corner and the English Garden and the Isar river is near by. You can find a supermarket or even a typical Bavarian restaurant with a nice beer-garden in walking distance.

name: Gemütliche Wohnung in Top-Lage
description: This bright and cozy 2-room attic apartment in the popular Untersendling district is ideal for your next Munich trip! Central yet quiet location, you can reach the city center (Sendlinger Tor) in only 3 metro stations. It is only 2 stops to the Isar and Theresienwiese – perfect for walks, sports or Oktoberfest. Within walking distance cafes, restaurants and supermarkets within walking distance. Enjoy Munich's city life and nature alike!

name: zentrale, renovierte Wohnung direkt an der U-Bahn
description: Newly renovated, stylish 55 m² apartment completely furnished, with perfect connections for all the activities you want to do in Munich.

name: Zimmer im Haus nahe Ubahn
description:
Complete own floor with large room and en-suite bathroom. Subway (U6 Holzapfelkreuth) 3 minutes walking distance.

9 min to Goetheplatz (Oktoberfest)
12 min to Marienplatz
29 min to Allianz Arena

name: Home in the heart of Munich
description:
Central yet quiet location
Very well connected with all public transport.
Walking distance to all downtown and Isar

name: Spacious room
description:
Public transport to Octoberfest takes about 15min. You can take tram, Ubahn and Sbahn.

The room is spacious and fully furnished with a lot of light, and ample space for what a traveller might require.

I normally live in this room, hence I appreciate that, whilst I wish you a splendid time in Munich, you handle all things with care.

You are free to use the kitchen, bathroom and toilet. There are four rooms in total - the remaining three will be used by my flatmates (Marco, Nathi, Alina).

name: Charmante Wohnung im In-Viertel
description:
Charming, renovated old rooftop apartment, 2 1/2 rooms with kitchen-living room near Wienerplatz, which is known and adored for its shops, cafes, snack bars and the rustic beer garden.
It is a stone's throw to the Isar, continue on foot/ by bike to the English Garden and out of the city, or across the bridge in minutes to museums, theaters, opera and old town.
Enjoy Munich's ambiance as the "northernmost city of Italy".
Tram, subway and suburban trains are 3 to 5 minutes walk.

name: Helles Zimmer mit Arbeitsplatz in Giesing
description:
Welcome to my cozy guest room in Giesing!

You have your own workspace, ideal for working or relaxing. You share the kitchen and bathroom with me – I look forward to nice encounters. The apartment is close to the center and a short walk from the Isar. Perfect for walks, cafes or exploring Munich.

NOTE: I have a very sweet and cuddly cat as a roommate.

name: 2 bedroom flat in green house
description:
You will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place in the green east side of Munich. We are renting 2 bedrooms and one private bathroom on the second floor in our house (family with 3 kids) during the October feast. We prefer family friendly people/couples 🙂
A big garden with a sauna and a fire pit will make your stay very cosy.
You pay 100€ for one person + 25€ for each extra person + 10€ for kids on the sleeper couch.
Public: U/S-Bahn Trudering or Gronsdorf

name: Im Park Grün + sehr gut vernetzt
description: Very quiet and very well connected. Near Nymphenburg Castle and 30 minutes by public transport to Oktoberfest (Theresienwiese)

name: Wohnung am Englischen Garten
description: Enjoy the simple life at this quiet and centrally located home.

name: Bavarian Juwel Ruhige, zentrale Lage&Luxusmatratze
description:

It's colorful, creative and  cosmopolitan, but also green and completely relaxed. From the hotel, you can take public transport, which starts right outside the door, within minutes to the most beautiful and exciting corners of the city: Maximilianstraße, Marienplatz, Viktualienmarkt, Wiener Platz or the Museum Triangle in Schwabing. But here you are already in the middle of city life and can easily walk to the neighborhood from the Gasteig cultural center to the Isar, the Müllersche Volksbad, the Deutsche Museum, the Stadtcafe Film Museum, the shopping street Motorama and also the oldest cinema in the city "Die Museum Lichtspiele" on foot.

name: Zimmer mit Bett spontan-
description: Dog hair is always there - & some chaos too - it is good for sleeping - as long as you are not taller than 1.75 - from then on it is too short. with 1.75m height it is gut.Sonnenauf/untergang 👍🏽because we are on the 11th floor -  since everyone shares a bathroom (several airbnb users) it is great if one person does not occupy it too long. In the reviews afterwards, it would also be great if you did not rate the point of cleanliness so strictly, because then this Airbnb listing will eventually be closed

1x double bed
If necessary - 1x inflatable double bed



450 m to the Theresienwiese
15 min walk to Central Station

5 minutes to the Schwanthalerhöhe subway
Lots of shopping + restaurants and cafes
Garages parking space

name: Nice apartment

name: Gemütliche City-Wohnung-perfect for Oktoberfest

name: Wunderschöne Wohnung
description:
My beautiful apartment is just off the S-Bahn Hirschgarten.
It's less than 10 minutes to downtown.
And the Oktoberfest can be reached in 5 minutes by S-Bahn.

The apartment, which is fully equipped, includes a small garden with terrace.

All public transport, supermarkets and a beautiful beer garden are within walking distance.

Please be aware that usually a dog lives in the apartment.

name: Zentrale schöne 5-Zimmer Wohnung in Maxvorstadt
description: Enjoy the simple life in this beautiful, quiet and centrally located 5-room ground floor apartment. It has 4 bedrooms, equipped kitchen, living room, bathroom and toilet. Sleeps 8 and right on Schellingstraße, probably Munich's coolest area with plenty of bars, cafes and restaurants. Direct subway connection (Josephsplatz).
neighborhood_overview:
Enjoy the simple life in this quiet and centrally located 5-room apartment. Directly on Schellingstraße, near Theresienstraße, the apartment is the optimal starting point in Munich's coolest neighborhood. Directly surrounded by cool bars and restaurants and walking distance to the university and English garden.

The Josephsplatz metro station is at 1 minute walking distance.

The bus also runs almost at the front door in all directions. Nearby is a supermarket and a park.

Although the apartment is downtown, it is very green and traffic-calmed.

name: Oktoberfest Wohnung
description: Apartment for rent in September. Great for visitors to Oktoberfest or for a getaway. Ideal for a family with child (cot 70*140). Not a great luxury, but everything you need. The large mattress is 180*200 and is like new. In the small room, a larger mattress can also be set up for an extra adult. Only 3 metro stations from Oktoberfest. The apartment is right at the Thalkirchen subway station. Let us know if you have any questions.

name: Rooftop jewel near Munich City Center
description:
The apartment is absolutely unique with an almost 50 sqm roof terrace in the middle of Munich. Due to the location in a courtyard, it is still absolutely quiet, also because otherwise there are only offices in the house.
Inside, the apartment is small but nice, with all the luxury for a short trip. Marienplatz and city center are 5 minutes on foot, to the metro 50 meters and to Oktoberfest 10 minutes by taxi or bike.

name: Wunderschöne Wohnung in München
description:
Our stylish apartment spans 140 sqm and has a beautiful kitchen and dining area, living room, study with sleeping facilities, a bedroom and a lower duplex area with sofa bed, large bathroom and laundry room. The apartment has a large garden. About 15 minutes from the MAIN TRAIN STATION by S-Bahn train, 20 minutes by car.
The apartment is rented either as a whole or as a shared living space.

Looking forward to seeing you soon!

name: Cozy 1-Bedroom Apartment Munich
description: I’m renting out my charming 1-bedroom apartment, and everything included can be seen in the photos. Located in Giesing, it’s just a short trip to the Wiesn by public transport.

description: Reopening in a prime location. This brand new beautiful apartment in a super central location in downtown Munich is waiting for you! name: Fußläufig Oktoberfest-Theresienwiese
description:
Apartment for considerate visitors or couples😊. It is 500 m (about 8 minutes) from the Theresienwiese/ Oktoberfest. The apartment is on the ground floor and has shutters on the windows. The bathroom has a bathtub. There is enough parking space in front of the house (4h free).
There is also the option to sleep on the sofa and a high air mattress:)

name: Dein Rückzugsort zum Wohlfühlen in München!
description: Central Hotel-Apart Munich is located in the Berg am Laim district in a very quiet location east of the city center, surrounded by cozy inns/restaurants as well as shops for shopping for daily needs (bakery, butcher, pharmacies, supermarkets). The city center can be reached within about 12 minutes due to the easy access to public transport. Neue Messe München with its important events is about 4 km away.

name: Nur 450m zum Oktoberfest / Wiesn Zentrums nah
description: Central and very close to the Theresienwiese / Oktoberfest - only 450m  !!!Modern and fully equipped - walking distance to the subway and S-Bahn.

name: Schönes Apartment im Süden
description:
The apartment is located in the Forstenried directly at the subway stop Forstenrieder Allee (U3)
Supermarket, bakery around the corner. The apartment is very bright and fully furnished. Large living room and bedroom (approx. 31 m2), separate kitchen and bathroom.

name: Large Apart 2 min to Oktoberfest
description: Spacious and comfortable apartment just a 2-minute walk from Oktoberfest! This large, 95 sqm apartment is perfect for groups or families. It features three sleeping areas: a king-size bed, a queen-size bed, and a sofa that converts into a king-size bed, comfortably accommodating up to 6 guests. There are two bathrooms and a fully equipped kitchen. Relax in the cozy living room with two sofas, breath some fresh air on the balcony. Enjoy all the comforts in this ideal location near Oktoberfest!

Supermarkets, Cafes just across the street.

description:
Our beautiful and very spacious apartment near Pasinger Bahnhof is optimally located for Munich visitors, because the center can be reached by S-Bahn or tram from Pasing in 20 minutes, the Oktoberfest in about 25 minutes. Even at night there are good public transport connections.
There are 2 bedrooms and a bathroom exclusively for the guests. The spacious, light-flooded living room and balcony invite you to share meals.

name: Zentrale Wohnung in Obergiesing
description:
Very central apartment in Obergiesing district. Many beautiful, local shops in the neighborhood, direct connection to the central station and Ostbahnhof and you can walk to Isar and downtown.
The apartment is accessible by elevator and has an optimal layout with 2 balconies, so you can sit outdoors in the sun all day. The bedroom goes to the backyard, is therefore very quiet.
Feel in my home as if it were your own and enjoy the flair of Munich.

name: Only 5 min to Octoberfest - prime location
description:

The legendary Glockenbachviertel, with its many bars and cafés, is only a stone's throw away

See you there!

Munich city life can be fully enjoyed in this quiet accommodation. The little balcony to the backyard is perfect for relaxation.

This place is located in a quiet neighborhood, perfect to get a good rest before jumping into your next Munich adventure.

Look forward to:

· 4 bedrooms
· 2 bathrooms
· Open plan living/dining area with fully equipped kitchen
· Garden with playhouse for children
· 40m² garden terrace with BBQ
· Private parking

Explore Munich and enjoy relaxing evenings!
neighborhood_overview:
Discover the diversity of Munich and Bavaria!

You are only 10 minutes by subway from Marienplatz and can reach many attractive destinations in a short time:

· In about 25 minutes you can reach Lake Starnberg by car and enjoy the beautiful landscape.

· The Dachau Concentration Camp Memorial Site can be reached in 30 minutes by car.

· The charming spa town of Bad Tölz is only 35 minutes away by car and invites you to relax and unwind.

· Garmisch-Partenkirchen with the Zugspitze, Germany's highest mountain, can be reached in 50 minutes by car.

· The world-famous Neuschwanstein Castle can be reached in 80 minutes by car.

· In the opposite direction, the picturesque Königssee awaits you after 100 minutes by car.

No matter whether you want to enjoy nature, experience culture or just relax - from your accommodation you can reach everything comfortably and quickly!

The address of the apartment in Munich is a centrally located area in the Maxvorstadt neighborhood, known for its vibrant urban feel, artsy culture, and historical landmarks. Here’s a bit more about the area, along with some additional recommendations for guests staying there:

1. Cultural Highlights Nearby
- Königsplatz: Just a 10-minute walk away, Königsplatz is a stunning square inspired by classical Greek architecture. It’s home to three major museums—the Glyptothek, the Staatliche Antikensammlungen (State Collection of Antiquities), and the Lenbachhaus (known for its Blue Rider art collection). Great for art lovers and history buffs!
- Munich’s Art Quarter (Kunstareal): A little further on, Munich’s “Kunstareal” is home to museums like the Alte Pinakothek, Neue Pinakothek, and the Pinakothek der Moderne, which feature art from the Renaissance to modern times.

2. Shopping and Essentials
- Stachus (Karlsplatz): About a 15-minute walk or s

neighborhood_overview:
Discover the diversity of Munich and Bavaria!

· You'll be staying close to city center and can reach many attractive destinations in a short time:

· In 8 minutes by subway or 10 minutes by car, you'll be at the Allianz Arena (FC Bayern).

· The Munich Olympic Park with the nearby BMW World can be reached in 10 minutes by car.

· In about 25 minutes by car, you'll be at Lake Starnberg and can enjoy the beautiful scenery.

· The Dachau Concentration Camp Memorial Site can be reached in 30 minutes by car.

· The charming spa town of Bad Tölz is only a 50-minute drive away and invites you to relax and unwind.

· Garmisch-Partenkirchen with the Zugspitze, Germany's highest mountain, can be reached in 75 minutes by car.

· The world-famous Neuschwanstein Castle can be reached in 100 minutes by car.

· In the opposite direction, the picturesque Königssee awaits you after a 110-minute drive.

neighborhood_overview:
Herzogpark, located in the upscale district of Bogenhausen, is one of Munich’s most exclusive and tranquil residential areas. Known for its elegant villas, tree-lined streets, and lush greenery, it offers a peaceful retreat just minutes from the city center.

The neighborhood is quiet, safe, and surrounded by nature – perfect for relaxing after a day of sightseeing or business. The famous English Garden and the Isar River with its scenic walking and cycling paths are just a short stroll away. In summer, the Isar’s pebble beaches invite you to sunbathe and swim; in winter, the area is ideal for peaceful walks.

Nearby, you'll find:

Charming cafés and bakeries, especially around Montgelasstraße and Alt-Bogenhausen
Fine restaurants and traditional beer gardens
Supermarkets and convenience stores within walking distance
Excellent public transport connections (bus, tram, and subway) to downtown Munich
Cultural highlights like the Prinzregen

neighborhood_overview:
Welcome to Neuhausen – Munich's charming neighborhood with heart

My accommodation is located on Richelstraße, in the middle of the popular district of Neuhausen, one of the most lively and at the same time most relaxing neighborhoods in Munich. Here, historic charm, green oases and urban life meet – perfect for those who want to experience Munich authentically.

In the immediate vicinity you will find numerous cafes, bakeries and small boutiques that invite you to linger. Rotkreuzplatz is particularly popular within walking distance – a central meeting point with weekly market, restaurants and easy access to public transport.

A real highlight is the nearby Nymphenburg Castle – one of the most magnificent baroque castles in Europe with extensive castle park, museums and romantic walks. Also easily accessible is the Olympic Park, ideal for sports, concerts or simply a relaxing afternoon overlooking the Olympic Tower.

For art and culture enthusia

Welcome to Neuhausen – Munich's charming neighborhood with heart

In the immediate vicinity you will find numerous cafes, bakeries and small boutiques that invite you to linger. Rotkreuzplatz is particularly popular within walking distance – a central meeting point with weekly market, restaurants and easy access to public transport.

A real highlight is the nearby Nymphenburg Castle – one of the most magnificent baroque castles in Europe with extensive castle park, museums and romantic walks. Also easily accessible is the Olympic Park, ideal for sports, concerts or simply a relaxing afternoon overlooking the Olympic Tower.

For art and culture enthusia

Discover the charm of Munich from one of its most stylish and central locations. Just a short stroll from the iconic Königsplatz, this elegant neighborhood is the perfect blend of cultural richness and modern indulgence. You're moments away from the Alte Pinakothek, Neue Pinakothek, and Pinakothek der Moderne—a trio of world-renowned art museums that attract travelers and creatives from around the globe.

Wake up with a cappuccino from one of Maxvorstadt’s boutique cafés, wander through the English Garden, or explore the grand boulevards of Karlsplatz (Stachus) and Marienplatz, both within easy reach by foot or tram. For those who love a touch of luxury, the area is dotted with upscale restaurants, wine bars, and designer shops. Come nightfall, the neighborhood transforms into a cozy, intimate scene perfect for relaxed dinners or a glass of wine under the stars.

With Munich Central Station just minutes away, day trips to Nymphenburg Palace, BMW Welt, and even the B

neighborhood_overview:
Denning is a charming, green, and family-friendly residential area located in the eastern part of Munich’s Bogenhausen district. It combines the appeal of a quaint village atmosphere with excellent connections to the city—perfect for guests seeking peace and quiet without giving up the convenience of urban life.

Ostpreußenstraße serves as the main shopping street, home to over 100 stores, bakeries, butcher shops, cafés, and restaurants.

Authentic craft shops, cozy eateries, and the historic Alter Kernhof (the oldest property in the area) contribute to Denning’s small-town charm.

Short distances to Arabellapark provide access to supermarkets, a weekly market, a cinema, and a wide range of services and leisure activities.

🌱 Leisure & Recreation

The expansive Denninger Anger greenbelt is perfect for walking, jogging, picnicking, and enjoying nature—partially left in a natural state and partly landscaped like a park.

Shops for daily needs are located in the immediate vicinity. Internet access and bed linens are provided.

This lovingly furnished apartment offers everything you need for a comfortable stay – ideal for singles or couples who appreciate comfort and style.

The separate bedroom has a comfortable bed (160 x 220 cm) with a high-quality mattress – perfect for relaxing nights. A spacious wardrobe offers plenty of space for your wardrobe, even for longer stays.

Sublet: July 24 to September 7

Beautiful shared apartment room in Nymphenburg for rent for 1.5 months.

An incredible number of restaurants within walking distance and tram station right across the street. The Neuhausen subway station is also only about 4 minutes' walk.

If you are interested, please let us know.

July 24 to September 7

name: Arrivel Trudering - Apartment 1

The apartment has been lovingly furnished and offers everything you need to feel comfortable for a few days in Munich. Lots of shopping and cafes are nearby. To the center 20 min, to the Isar and German Museum 10 min walk.
Airport connection, 40 min S-Bahn.

Supermarkets, cafes, and shops are all within walking distance, making it easy to enjoy both city life and quiet moments at home.

In the immediate vicinity of the subway, the Olympic Park and BMW Welt. Ideal for families, couples or business travelers – quietly located and yet quickly in the city center. Book now & feel good!

name: Möbeliertes Doppelschlafzimmer

Enjoy easy access to everything from this perfectly located home.

name: Westend-Charme Nähe Oktoberfest
description:
Charming 1-bedroom apartment (30 m²) in the heart of Munich's Westend, just a 5-minute walk to Theresienwiese!
Perfectly located for Oktoberfest or a city trip. The apartment offers a cozy bedroom, a separate, fully equipped kitchen and a small bathroom with shower. Central, quiet and ideally connected – your temporary home in Munich!

name: Zentrales Loft: Dachterrasse, Parkplatz, Nespresso
description:
Welcome to this stylish loft, which offers you everything for a great short or long-term stay in Munich:

→ Large roof terrace with lounge
→ Stylish mid-century charm
→ Quiet top location near Isar & City
→ 2 bedrooms & sleeps 4
→ Kitchenette & dishwasher
→ Free underground parking
→ Bright workspace by the window
→ Newly renovated and modernly furnished

☆"Great apartment – stylish, quiet & perfectly located!"

name: Cozy flat near Englischer Garten
description: Bright, modern one-bedroom retreat in leafy Sendling, Munich. Sunlit workspace & cozy dining area with green views from the balcony and large windows. Steps to the U3 (Brudermühlstraße) offering direct access to Marienplatz in ~11 min. Local favorites nearby – artisan bakery, cafés, weekly market, plus easy access to Isar river paths for relaxing walks or picnics. Ideal for work, relaxation, and exploring!

name: Appartment unterm Dach
description: This lovely accommodation offers wonderful space for 1-2 people to feel comfortable here. In the cozy bunk bed, you sleep like a log. The small kitchen offers everything to cater for yourself.

name: Room on Wolfratshauser Straße
description: This inviting private room on Wolfratshauser Straße 247 offers 14 m² of comfortable living space. It is furnished with a cozy bed, a spacious wardrobe with plenty of storage, and a desk ideal for working or studying. The 97 m² apartment is shared with friendly housemates. Central heating and high-speed WiFi ensure a comfortable and well-connected living environment year-round. Shared areas include a modern bathroom, a separate toilet, a fully equipped kitchen, and a washing machine.

name: Cozy and central one-room flat
description:
This bright 1-room apartment is perfectly located near S-Bahn Rosenheimer Platz (2 stops to Marienplatz) and U-Bahn Ostbahnhof (4 stops to the Hbf and just 15–20 minutes to Theresienwiese).
The apartment is fully equipped with everything you might need for comfortable life, also you'll find a comfortable sofa that turns into a 140×200 bed, as well as a separate 140×200 bed - ideal for up to 4 guests. The neighbourhood is full of life, with many restaurants, bakeries, and cafés just steps away.

name: Private room in Munich
description: This well-appointed private room at Plievierpark 18 in Munich-Ramersdorf-Perlach offers a comfortable and functional living space. Furnished with a cozy bed, spacious wardrobe, and desk, it’s ideal for both relaxation and productivity. The 80 m² apartment is shared with three friendly housemates and includes central heating and high-speed WiFi for year-round comfort. Residents share a clean bathroom, separate toilet, fully equipped kitchen, and a washing machine for everyday convenience.

name: Modern Room in Munich
description: This well-appointed private room at Plievierpark 18 in Munich-Ramersdorf-Perlach offers a comfortable and functional living space. Furnished with a cozy bed, spacious wardrobe, and desk, it’s ideal for both relaxation and productivity. The 80 m² apartment is shared with three friendly housemates and includes central heating and high-speed WiFi for year-round comfort. Residents share a clean bathroom, separate toilet, fully equipped kitchen, and a washing machine for everyday convenience.

name: Room at Maxhofstraße
description: This inviting private room on Maxhofstraße in Munich offers 14 m² of comfortable living space. It is furnished with a cozy bed, spacious wardrobe, and a desk—perfect for both relaxation and productivity. The 84 m² apartment is shared with two friendly housemates, creating a warm and communal atmosphere. The room includes modern decor, central heating, and high-speed WiFi. Residents share a clean bathroom, separate toilet, fully equipped kitchen, and a washing machine for everyday convenience.

name: Room w/ Balcony in a 2-prson WG
description:
🚇 6-minute walk to U5

🌿 The apartment is located in Neuperlach, in a peaceful and green area near Ostpark – perfect for students or working professionals looking for a comfortable and quiet living space.

name: Großzügige Wohnung mit Terasse
description:
We rent out our beautiful, spacious apartment for August.
The apartment is close to the U3 (Forstenrieder Allee), has a small garden with flower beds and a sun terrace. It is fully equipped with everything you need to unwind.

It is quietly located, countless shopping facilities can be reached in 5-10 minutes on foot, the city center can be reached in 15 minutes by subway and Lake Starnberg can also be reached in 15 minutes by car.

name: Oktoberfestunterkunft für die Familie
description:
Welcome to Munich – at Oktoberfest time!

During Oktoberfest, we rent our lovingly furnished apartment to guests who want to experience the city in a relaxed way – whether as a couple or with the family.

Our apartment is also perfect for excursions to the Alps, lakes or castles.

name: Premium-Apartment mit Top-Ausst.
description:
Modern design meets coziness – luxuriously equipped apartment with high-quality kitchen.

Welcome to your stylish retreat! This bright, open-plan apartment boasts high-quality interiors, loving details and a fully equipped designer kitchen – perfect for connoisseurs, hobby cooks and all those who value quality.

Ideal for couples, business travelers or solo travelers who value comfort and style.

name: Penthouse in Schwabing an Pinakotheken mit Balkon
Sankt Anna Platz 6 min to Oktoberfest (ends Oct 5)
description: This spacious 5-room apartment with over 3-meter-high ceilings is a Munich resident's dream home: On a square in the citie’s best quarter, lined with chestnut trees, restaurants and cafés, it features its own small garden and two balconies. The Lehel subway station is right outside, taking you to the main train station in four and to Oktoberfest in six minutes. Located between Prinzregentenstreet and Maximilianstreet: City Center, English Garden and Isar River are less than 10 minutes on foot.

name: 1-Zimmer Apartment mit Garten
description: 20 min to Oktoberfest! Furnished ground floor apartment with terrace and garden in a quiet location with bright sleeping and living area, pull-out bed, small kitchen and a bathroom with shower. Close to the A8 motorway and a 2-minute walk to the nearest bus stop. Shopping, cafes, restaurants and green areas right around the corner. Ideal for those who are looking for peace and still want to live centrally. Bed linen & towels included.

name: Cosy apartment close to the Isar
description: My place is a cosy, 50 sq metre apartment just a 10 minute walk from the Isar river. Perfect for solo travellers and couples, the apartment has a double bedroom with king-sized bed and a small balcony. The living room is spacious enough to be used for multiple purposes. There is a large sofa that also folds out as a bed, should you need it. It also has a dining table for two people, and a desk with large monitor. There is also a full kitchen and a bathroom with a washing machine as well.

name: Modern flat close to Olympiapark
description:
Welcome to our flat in the lovely area of Neuhausen.

The apartment is full of light, fully equipped and offers an unique atmosphere.

The window front allows the sun to lighting up the entire place. Especially in autumn, this makes warm and cosy atmosphere.

The apartment is behind another building which makes it very quite and peaceful. You can enjoy the balcony or just relax.

By rain, you can enjoy the big TV with a comfortable sofa or just make some nice food in the fully equipped kitchen

name: Luxury, charming & spacious apartment with 4 rooms
description:
We are renting our unique luxury apartment, 4 rooms, 130 m², full of charm. The building is Art Nouveau, with 3.5-meter-high ceilings. It has a beautiful balcony facing the inner courtyard. The bathroom, toilet, and kitchen are newly renovated (2022) & new wood-burning stove. The apartment is absolutely quiet. The apartment is fully furnished with everything you need.
Location right next to Theresienwiese and close to subway.
We are looking for temporary tenants who will take good care of gem.

name: Charmante Penthouse Wohnung
description:
Charming and spacious condominium in the heart of Munich for rent.

Centrally located and close to the Olympic Park in Munich. Quiet location and quick access to public transport.

name: Freimann - 2 Zi. - 60qm -

description:
Very clean place! Privat room with privat bathroom, working space + desk and private balcony.

- Messe München / ICM is 15 min. away
- Oktoberfest is 30 min. away
- Parking on street available and always available

The room is inside a big apartment (130 square meters) on its own floor where only Airbnb guest will have access.

The kitchen is one flor down and guest will share is with two people.

- Laundry in-house for 4,- per load

name: StylisTop-Floor Apartment in the Heart of the City
description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home.

name: Traumwohnung mitten in Schwabing
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home. Beautiful cozy 3-room apartment in the middle of Schwabing directly on Elisabethplatz, where the neighborhood lives.

Balcony and bedroom at the back, which makes it very quiet.

The double bed in the master bedroom is 1.40 m wide and 2.00 m long. The guest bed on the couch folds out and is then 1.40 m wide and 2.00 m long. Both beds have two blankets and pillows available.

name: Einfamilienhaus in München
description: Have fun with the whole family at this stylish place.

name: Schöne 2-Zimmerwohnung + Balkon
description: Stylish, fully furnished 2-room apartment on the 8th floor (with elevator) in the Olympic Village with balcony. Leather sofa, dining table, workspace, flat screen. Open design kitchen with dishwasher, oven, fridge-freezer. Bedroom with box spring bed (180x200) & glass wardrobe. Bathroom with rainfall shower. Noble tiles with underfloor heating. Internet. Laundry room with coin-operated appliances. 4 min to the subway, directly to Marienplatz and Oktoberfest in 15 min.

name: 1-Bedroom Apt – Space to Settle In  (#219)
neighborhood_overview:
Discover the charm of Munich from one of its most stylish and central locations. Just a short stroll from the iconic Königsplatz, this elegant neighborhood is the perfect blend of cultural richness and modern indulgence. You're moments away from the Alte Pinakothek, Neue Pinakothek, and Pinakothek der Moderne—a trio of world-renowned art museums that attract travelers and creatives from around the globe.

Wake up with a cappuccino from one of Maxvorstadt’s boutique cafés, wander through the English Garden, or explore the grand boulevards of Karlsplatz (Stachus) and Marienplatz, both within easy reach by foot or tram. For those who love a touch of luxury, the area is dotted with upscale restaurants, wine bars, and designer shops. Come nightfall, the neighborhood transforms into a cozy, intimate scene perfect for relaxed dinners or a glass of wine under the stars.

With Munich Central Station just minutes away, day trips to Nymphenburg Palace, BMW Welt, and even the B

The 3.5-room apartment with 120 square meters is located directly on the world-famous Nockherberg. The apartment is generously equipped and offers everything your heart desires.

From this centrally located home, you'll be in all the important places in no time.

Experience true Munich charm in one of its most beautiful neighborhoods.

Perfectly located and cozy, equipped space.

✨ Ideal for solo travelers or couples who want to experience authentic Munich living in a quiet yet central location. No party and smoking allowed.

Stylish, newly renovated 105 m² design apartment in an exclusive house-in-house construction – ideal for families, couples & business travelers.

2 bedrooms, open living area with elegant couch & TV wall, custom kitchen, designer bathroom with rain shower, separate office, plenty of storage space.

Great connection U6 within walking distance – center in 18 minutes and yet quiet location by the forest.

High-quality amenities, completely renovated in 2024.

name: Großzügige 2-Zimmerwohnung
description: Relax with the whole family at this peaceful place. Large balcony and 2 bathrooms/WC available. Child-friendly (crib available).

16.5m² simple room with beautiful south facing balcony.

The room has roll-down blinders and solid isolation to a quiet street.

18 minutes to Theresienwiese (Oktoberfest):
- 13 min walk to U5, then 5 min ride
- 7 min walk to tram 18 or 19, then 8 min ride, then 6 min walk

If you’re looking for a chill temporary stay in a friendly flatshare, we’d be happy to welcome you!

description:
Long-term bookings longer than 6 months are possible by arrangement.

The penthouse in the heart of Schwabing combines urban luxury, tranquility and absolute privacy. Ideal for discerning guests, business travelers or families who value design, comfort and service.

Enjoy easy access to everything you need at this well-located home.
Next to Oktoberfest, 15 min walk, shared apartment with my family, we are 3 adults and 1 child of 2 and a half years, who is in school during the day, the available room has 1 single bed, and it is also possible to add another mattress, totaling 2 places. The kitchen and the other rooms are shared with the family, we have no animals, and there is an outdoor area for smokers.

name: Stylisches City Appartment, Nähe englischer Garten
description: Enjoy my unique living unit in Munich. I offer you a home in a foreign city. Whether for a city trip with friends or on a business trip, alone or with your team. The apartment impresses with modern design, a central location, easy access and equipment that leaves nothing to be desired. I look forward to welcoming you.

name: Klein aber fein - in Isar-Nähe
description: This chic one-bedroom apartment with a south-facing balcony offers the perfect base for your time in Munich. The Schyrenbad outdoor pool and the Isar River are within walking distance. It offers easy access to the city center. On Sommerstraße, you can experience why Munich is such a great place to live, with a quiet retreat featuring a luxurious bathroom, a fully equipped kitchenette, a comfortable 120cm bed, a dining table/desk, and a recliner. This apartment is not rented to Oktoberfest-goers.

name: Freshly Renovated in central MUC
description: Enjoy your stay in this freshly renovated, light-filled studio in a quiet rear building on Munich’s Tegernseer Landstraße in the Giesing district. It features modern furnishings, a double bed, and a pull-out couch – perfect for solo travelers, couples, or small families. Relax on the quiet sunny balcony and enjoy excellent public transport, plus plenty of hip cafés, restaurants, and bars in walking distance.

name: Good located Apartment
description:
Hey,
Welcome to munich.
We are happy to host you in our 55qm fully furnitured Apartment. The Apartment is well located in walking distance 10–15 Min to the down town city of munich. Also Oktoberfest is near by. We have one bed room with a 160x200 bed and in the livingroom a sleeping couch for another to person.

name: Renovierter Altbau, beste Lage
description: Spacious apartment in the Westend, close to Theresienwiese and just 2 minutes to the U-Bahn station Heimeranplatz.

Our bright, friendly apartment is in the heart of Haidhausen, one of Munich's most popular neighborhoods. You will live in light-flooded rooms with plenty of space to relax or work. The kitchen offers everything for a pleasant stay.
The apartment is located in a quiet residential area, surrounded by cafes, restaurants, bars and numerous shopping facilities. The beautiful Isar is a few minutes' walk away.
You can easily reach Oktoberfest – without changing trains.

You’ll find plenty of independent shops, cozy cafés, bakeries, organic supermarkets, and small boutiques just around the corner – all within easy walking distance and away from the hustle and bustle of downtown.

Quiet, private, and perfectly located in the center of the city – ideal for couples, friends, or solo travelers.

Why guests love staying here

Green & tranquil: Tree-lined streets and large gardens create a peaceful atmosphere all year round. In summer, enjoy long evenings outdoors, cycling, or walking in nearby parks or along the Isar; in winter, the quiet streets and snowy gardens feel wonderfully cosy.

Local charm: Alt-Solln has a historic village centre with traditional architecture, local cafés, and shops — giving guests an authentic Munich feel away from the crowds.

neighborhood_overview:
- Within 1 minute's walk you are at the S-Bahn station Isartor, which is connected to the main line and takes you to both the main train station and the airport without changing trains.
- Within 3 minutes' walk you will find everything you need for everyday needs in shops and restaurants.
- Within 5 minutes' walk you are at the Isar, where you can go swimming and take a walk in the countryside.
- Within 10 minutes' walk you are at Marienplatz (Munich's most central location), the Viktualienmarkt (Munich's prominent open-air gourmet paradise) and the Glockenbachviertel (a very trendy bar and scene district). By the way, from Marienplatz you can also get directly to Oktoberfest in a few subway stations.

description: Modern 4-room apartment in Munich’s city center, just steps from Marienplatz. Perfect for groups up to 7 guests and only minutes to Oktoberfest. Stay central, explore, and enjoy the Wiesn!
neighborhood_overview:
The apartment is located in the heart of Munich’s Old Town, right on lively Sendlinger Straße – a charming pedestrian street lined with boutiques, cafés, and restaurants. Just a short walk takes you to Marienplatz, the famous Glockenspiel, Viktualienmarkt, or the Frauenkirche.

For shopping, you’ll find everything from big brands to unique designer stores. In the evenings, enjoy the wide choice of bars, traditional beer halls, and modern restaurants.

The Theresienwiese, home of the Oktoberfest, is just a few minutes away by U-Bahn. Other highlights like the Isar River, the Deutsches Museum, or the English Garden are also easy to reach.

In short: you’ll be staying in one of Munich’s most vibrant and central neighborhoods – perfect for experiencing city life and culture right outside your door.
