Alternatively, the Arabellapark (U4) stop can also be reached via the tram connection or on foot in about 15 minutes. This also goes directly to Theresienwiese without changing.
neighborhood_overview: Quiet residential area

name: Lux Penthouse mit Terrasse
description:
Enjoy plenty of space and a unique view over Munich.
A penthouse like no other in Munich...

name: Privates Zimmer im Zentrum Münchens - Oktoberfest
description:
Welcome to Munich! During Oktoberfest, we rent a cozy room for a maximum of two guests in our apartment. The apartment is right in the center, in the lively university district with lots of bars, cafes and restaurants. The old town is 10 minutes away and the Oktoberfest is only 20 minutes away.
Room with spacious sofa bed. Kitchen and bathroom are shared with the housemates. Munich's delicious beer awaits you at check-in.

name: Ganzes Holzhaus mit großem Loft, Terrasse & Garten
description: Experience Oktoberfest and relax afterwards in your private retreat🌙. This charming wooden house combines Bavarian coziness with modern comforts – with a garden, spacious living area and stylish details. Perfect for groups & families looking for proximity to Munich and still want to enjoy peace and quiet.

name: Gemütliches Zimmer Nähe Theresienwiese
description: Enjoy the Bavarian capital in this quiet yet central accommodation. Your room is small but cozy and ideal for feeling good. The bright apartment is stylish and cozy; you can use the kitchen, dining and living area. Just a 3-minute walk to the Goetheplatz subway station, EDEKA, cafes and shops right around the corner. Perfect for anyone looking to experience Munich in a relaxed and uncomplicated way.

name: Ganze 3 Zimmer Wohnung Nähe Oktoberfest in München
description:
I rent out an entire apartment, 60 square meters. There is only one bed - but plenty of room for sleeping pads. On request, I can buy you a sleeping mat (€30) and sleeping bag (€30).

In 30 minutes by bus and subway to Oktoberfest.

With balcony.

There is no kitchen and no dishes, so no plates and glasses. A large supermarket is only 5 minutes away on foot. Cafes, restaurants and food delivery services are all in close proximity.

Towels are provided.

name: Gemütliche, ruhige Unterkunft
description: Your room offers you a quiet place to relax after a long day in the city. The kitchen-living room invites you to cook and supermarkets are within minutes. You can walk to the subway in 3 minutes. In 10 minutes you are by subway at the main station and the Wiesn is only one station further.

name: Design-Apartment Münchner Freiheit
description: The property is located at the Münchner Freiheit in the district of Schwabing: the center of vibrant life. Suitable for 4 people with double bed and sofa bed. All the important points of contact are nearby, restaurants within walking distance – making it easy to plan your stay. Enjoy the view of the Fuchsbau, an architectural icon of Munich from the 70s, from the quiet balcony. The underground parking space simplifies arrival and departure.

name: Schönes, gemütliches Zimmer in München Schwabing
description:
I rent my beautiful, approx. 22 m² room in a 3.5-room apartment in Schwabing. The room is furnished, bright and quiet.

Amenities: cozy double bed (box spring bed), desk & dresser, large closet, plenty of daylight
For shared use: a large kitchen with dining area, bathroom, separate toilet, living room and balcony

The apartment is in the attic without an elevator – but with sun and fitness included

Location: 3 min. to the subway Bonner Platz, 8 min. to Münchner Freiheit

name: Apartament am Schloss - 20 Min. zum Oktoberfest
description: Quiet apartment right at Nymphenburg Castle – ideal for relaxing! Surrounded by lakes and river, yet central: only 10 minutes by tram to Munich Central Station. The apartment offers a fully equipped kitchen with oven, a spacious bathroom with shower, a large, cozy sofa, flat-screen TV, dining area and a comfortable bed – perfect for couples or solo travelers.

name: Stylish Schwabing Flat, 10 min to Oktoberfest
description: Enjoy this beautifully designed 1-bedroom apartment with elegant interiors, a modern kitchen, chic bathroom, and a cozy balcony. Just 10 min. from Oktoberfest by U-Bahn (station U6 Nordfriedhof only 100m away). A bakery, grocery shop, and pharmacy are right around the corner (50m). Located in vibrant Schwabing, you’re steps away from English Garden. Perfect for couples or business travelers looking for comfort and style in one of the city’s most desirable neighborhoods.

name: Charming Schwabing Apartment
description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space. Situated in a peaceful back building, the light-filled apartments offers everything you need during your stay in Munich. It’s located very central in Schwabing with Bus, Tram and Ubahn right on the doorstep.

Munich Loft Retreat

Cozy stay with balcony in Munich
Bright living room with sofa bed, balcony, kitchen & bathroom Metro in 5 min, city center in 10–15 min. Great choice for couples or solo travelers.

You can easily reach the Oktoberfest in just 20–25 minutes by train. The surroundings in Nymphenburg (on the canal) are also incredibly beautiful!
Here you can expect comfort and the ideal location for your stay in Munich.

No smoking. Not suitable for guests with pets.
Perfect Munich center experience for two.

The U-Bahn station Münchner Freiheit (U3/U6) is only a few steps away, with direct trains to the Oktoberfest (station “Goetheplatz”) and the city center without changing lines.
Perfect for anyone who wants to experience Munich both centrally and comfortably.

description: 12 square meter bedroom

name: Oktoberfest 2 Floor Apartment, Munich
description: Perfect short-stay apartment in Munich! Peaceful, central (next to BMW), and well connected. Features a spacious double bed, extra sleeping space, kitchen, WiFi, and laundry facilities nearby. Easy access to cafés, culture, and a large park. Only 15 minutes to the heart of Munich by U-Bahn.

name: Cozy studio apartment in Munich (1.0.6.)
description: Beautiful, new & modern, fully furnished and equipped studio apartment with private balcony in a quiet and prime location in Munich. The apartment offers a fully equipped modern kitchen and a spacious bathroom with shower. Marienplatz/Munich center can be reached in 13 minutes by Metro.

name: Ruhig & zentral - in 20min zu Fuß zum Oktoberfest
description: In this quiet & centrally located accommodation, you are about 20 minutes from the Hackerbrücke and thus in the middle of the Oktoberfest spectacle. The apartment is quietly located and accordingly parties or similar loud behavior (even after the Oktoberfest visit🍻) are prohibited. The apartment has a room with a bed for 2 people, with a couch, TV corner and direct access to the private balcony. The kitchen is fully equipped with everything you need. From the hallway with wardrobe you can reach the bathroom.

name: 1.5 Room Apartment in the center of Munich
description:
A bright and cozy 1.5-room apartment in Munich, just 10 minutes by U-Bahn from the main station. Centrally located near Giesing and the beautiful Isar river, the apartment offers both convenience and charm.

It’s on the 3rd floor (no lift) and comes fully furnished with all amenities. There is a separate kitchen and bathroom, one double bed, plus a sofa bed that sleeps two.

Perfect for a comfortable stay during Oktoberfest!

Please send me a message for details about the property

name: Cozy one bedroom apartment in Munich (2.1.5.)
description: Beautiful, new & modern, fully furnished and equipped studio apartment with private balcony in a quiet and prime location in Munich. The apartment offers a fully equipped modern kitchen and a spacious bathroom with shower. Marienplatz/Munich center can be reached in 13 minutes by Metro.

name: Zimmer in München - 18 min. von Hbf entfernt
description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space.

name: Ruhiges Zimmer in München
description:
Your room: Very quiet room with workstation incl. Monitor, storage space and 1.40 m bed in private apartment. Super connected with a 5-minute walk to the U2, which is optimally connected to the whole city.

Our apartment: living room with TV, well-equipped kitchen, shared bathroom with bathtub can be shared.

name: room in central Munich 10 min. from Oktoberfest.
description:
nice spacious room in central Munich. Close to the metro and Oktoberfest.

You will live with me but you will have your own room with shared bathroom.

name: Englischer Garten
description:
Forget your worries in this spacious and quiet space. From here, you are in the most beautiful part of the English Garden - the largest city park in the world.
In 20 minutes at the central station and in 30 minutes at the airport.

We rent a room in our apartment, which has a very special layout.
Bathroom with bathtub;
In the basement there is a washing machine and dryer.

We have two very friendly and quiet dogs.

name: Zwei Zimmer Wohnung im Stadtteil Milbertshofen
description:
I am renting out my two bedroom apartment. The bedroom is locked and not accessible. Certain cabinets are locked and cannot be used.

The living area is extendable and sleeps 3.

TV has cable, Netflix, RTLPlus and Disney access.

The apartment is rented between 09/25/25 and 10/02/25.

Dishwasher + washing machine available.

Since the apartment has been freshly renovated, we ask for SPECIAL care with the walls and furniture. A security deposit is therefore required.

name: Oktoberfest Zimmer 3 Personen
description:
Hey everyone :)
We rent a 9 m² room in our apartment during Oktoberfest - only 10 minutes' walk to Theresienwiese. Sleeps 3 people.
- Period: 09/26 - 10/02, at least 2 nights
- Price: €150 per person/night (+ €150 deposit per stay)
We (two young girls) attach great importance to feeling comfortable with each other – we are looking for loving, relaxed guests who enjoy Oktoberfest, but do not completely escalate.
We look forward to hearing from you <3

name: Zimmer nur 15 Minuten vom Oktoberfest •NUR Frauen•
description:
Hello 🌞🌼🌻🌙
The private room is only available to women. We are among women, as I live here with my mom, so you can feel safe and comfortable here.
• The nearest supermarket is 10 minutes' walk away (Penny)
• Parking in front of the apartment is free
• The nearest tram stop is a 3-minute walk away
• 2nd floor, no elevator

name: Schöne Maisonettewohnung in Haidhausen, München
description:
Welcome to my stylish duplex apartment in the heart of Haidhausen, one of the most charming districts of Munich! This light-flooded apartment offers the perfect retreat for 1-2 people who appreciate comfort, design and a central location.

Listing highlights:

• Quiet location with excellent connections – just a few minutes to the city center
• Perfect for couples, friends or solo travelers
• Ideal starting point for a visit to Oktoberfest

name: Cozy Room in beautiful apartment near Oktoberfest
description:
Stay in a warm and welcoming private room in a clean, tidy apartment.
You’ll have access to a beautiful living room with a balcony to relax on and a fully equipped kitchen to prepare meals and snacks — shared with only ONE tenant.

The location is ideal , only 4 km from Oktoberfest, with easy access by bike or public transport. After a fun day at the festival or exploring Munich, return to a peaceful and cozy space to unwind.

name: Modernes Apartment – 5 Min zum Oktoberfest
description:
Stylish apartment – only 5 minutes to Oktoberfest
Experience Munich in style! This modern apartment is a 5 minute walk from Theresienwiese – ideal for couples and business travelers.
Look forward to a comfortable double bed, a fully equipped kitchen and a modern bathroom.
Relax with smart TV and WiFi in a quiet but central location. Restaurants, supermarkets and subway are right outside the door.
Your perfect retreat during the Oktoberfest – we look forward to your visit!

name: Apartment 2 bed rooms 4 persons in Munich Laim
description:
Beautiful Apartment with 2 bedrooms for 4 Persons, one bathroom and kitchen full of equipments.

Only 15 Minutes to Oktoberfest with Tram 18 to U- Westendstraße, then U5 to Theresienwiese. 10 Minutes by car.

name: Oktoberfest-Wochenende: Zimmer Nähe Theresienwiese
description:
📍 Location: Right on the Donnersbergerbrücke – super connected with S-Bahn, bus & tram.
🚶 Distance to Theresienwiese:
• About 20 minutes' walk
• About 10 minutes by Lime/scooter
• A few minutes by S-Bahn

🛏 Room: Bright, furnished room with bed, desk and wardrobe.
🏠 Apartment: Shared apartment with friendly roommates, shared kitchen & bathroom. WiFi of course available.

Feel free to ask me more questions!

name: Zimmer 10 Meter vom Oktoberfest
description:
We are a student apartment that has a room available during Oktoberfest and would like to offer it.

The apartment is part of a beautiful old building and can be described as a clean, quiet and friendly shared apartment.

We are very relaxed, but there is a rule that no drinking is allowed in the house itself.
Since we basically live at the Oktoberfest, there are more than enough alternatives to quench your thirst in a beautiful place.

Security deposit 200€

name: Aussergewöhnlich schöne Unterkunft in Schwabing
description: Exceptionally beautiful accommodation in Munich-Schwabing. Modern with clearly designed furniture and contemporary art. Centrally located, yet quiet (bicycle street, 30 zone), 3 subway stations in the immediate vicinity, only 4 stops to Marienplatz (U3, U6), airport in 25 minutes by car or in 50 minutes by S-Bahn (S1, S8), main train station only 4 stops away (U2). English Garden, museums, restaurants, cafes and shops within walking distance.

name: Exklusives Wohnen am Englischen Garten - traumhaft
description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located villa. Fully furnished with everyday essentials. You have to experience it, I don't have to write much about it, just fantastic.

name: Modernes City-Apartment I S-Bahn
description: Experience Munich at its best! Our stylish apartment is located directly on the Hirschgarten, one of the most beautiful parks in the city with the world-famous beer garden. In just 7 minutes you are in the city center, you can reach the Oktoberfest in about 15 minutes. The apartment offers you modern comfort: a fully equipped kitchen, an elegant bathroom and a cozy living area. Cafes, restaurants and Bavarian coziness await right outside the door – perfect for your city trip.

name: „Wiesn-Bleibe“ für Jedermann
description: Charming apartment in the heart of Munich – only 15 minutes' walk to the Oktoberfest! Relax after the party in the quiet backyard garden with a campfire or enjoy Munich's top street food spot right in the house. Across the street you'll find a kiosk with a wide selection. You can walk to the metro, tram and Isar in just 2 minutes. A free minibar with various beers awaits in the apartment – ideal for your unforgettable Oktoberfest experience! 🍻🥨🌭

name: Ein Zimmer mitten in Altschwabing!
description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located home. In the middle of Schwabing. It's never boring here!

name: Möbliertes Modernes Apartment direkt am Ostbahnhof
description:
The apartment is a 5-minute walk from Ostbahnhof and has a balcony.

In the immediate vicinity are numerous shopping facilities, including a Lidl and a bakery.

The apartment complex also includes a laundry room (since there is no private washing machine connection) and a gym that can be shared.
